```typescript
/**
 * Grsai API 调用层（§6）
 *
 * M1 阶段使用 replyType: 'json' 同步返回。
 * 后续里程碑切换为 replyType: 'async' + 轮询。
 */

import { getPixelSize } from './pixelTable';

/** API 生成请求参数 */
export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
}

/** 生成响应 */
export interface GenerateResponse {
  id: string;
  status: 'running' | 'violation' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';
  results?: { url: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

/** 配置快照 */
export interface ApiConfig {
  baseUrl: string;
  apiKey: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
}

function isNanoBanana(model: string): boolean {
  return model.startsWith('nano-banana');
}

/**
 * 构造请求体 —— 按模型系列区分尺寸字段（§6）：
 * - nano-banana: aspectRatio + imageSize
 * - gpt-image-2: 仅 aspectRatio（比例字符串）
 * - gpt-image-2-vip: aspectRatio 为像素值（如 "864x1152"）
 */
export function buildGenerateBody(req: GenerateRequest): Record<string, unknown> {
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: req.model,
    prompt: req.prompt,
    images: req.images,
    replyType: 'json',
  };

  if (isNanoBanana(req.model)) {
    // nano-banana 系列：传 aspectRatio（比例）+ imageSize
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
    body.imageSize = req.imageSize;
  } else if (req.model === 'gpt-image-2') {
    // gpt-image-2：只传 aspectRatio 比例，不带 imageSize
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
  } else if (req.model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') {
    // gpt-image-2-vip：aspectRatio 填像素值
    body.aspectRatio = getPixelSize(req.aspectRatio, req.imageSize);
  }

  return body;
}

const TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000;

/**
 * 提交生成请求（同步模式，M1 用 replyType: 'json'）。
 * 提交成功返回响应体；失败抛出 Error。
 */
export async function submitGenerate(
  config: ApiConfig,
  prompt: string,
  images: string[],
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const body = buildGenerateBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt,
    images,
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
  });

  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(`${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${config.apiKey}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!resp.ok) {
      const text = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(`API 返回错误 HTTP ${resp.status}${text ? ': ' + text : ''}`);
    }

    const json: unknown = await resp.json();
    return validateGenerateResponse(json);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/**
 * 运行时校验生成响应形状（§6）。
 * 不匹配 → 抛出带描述的 Error。
 */
export function validateGenerateResponse(json: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (!json || typeof json !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('生成响应格式异常：不是 JSON 对象');
  }

  const obj = json as Record<string, unknown>;

  if (typeof obj.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('生成响应格式异常：缺少 id 或 id 不是字符串');
  }

  const validStatuses = ['running', 'violation', 'succeeded', 'failed'];
  if (typeof obj.status !== 'string' || !validStatuses.includes(obj.status)) {
    throw new Error(`生成响应格式异常：status 值无效 (${String(obj.status)})`);
  }

  const status = obj.status as GenerateResponse['status'];

  // failed / violation 必须有 error
  if ((status === 'failed' || status === 'violation') && obj.error === undefined) {
    throw new Error('生成响应格式异常：failed/violation 缺少 error');
  }

  // succeeded 必须有 results
  if (status === 'succeeded') {
    if (!Array.isArray(obj.results) || obj.results.length === 0) {
      throw new Error('生成响应格式异常：succeeded 缺少 results 或 results 为空');
    }
    for (const r of obj.results) {
      if (!r || typeof r !== 'object' || typeof (r as Record<string, unknown>).url !== 'string') {
        throw new Error('生成响应格式异常：results 元素缺少 url');
      }
    }
  }

  // progress 若存在须为 0~100 的数字
  if (obj.progress !== undefined && obj.progress !== null) {
    const p = Number(obj.progress);
    if (!Number.isFinite(p) || p < 0 || p > 100) {
      throw new Error(`生成响应格式异常：progress 值无效 (${String(obj.progress)})`);
    }
  }

  return {
    id: obj.id,
    status,
    results: obj.results as GenerateResponse['results'],
    progress: obj.progress as number | undefined,
    error: obj.error as string | undefined,
```
  };
}


```typescript
/** 前后端共享类型与 postMessage 消息协议（§8.1），两端共用以避免漂移 */

// ── 配置快照 ──
export interface AppConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

// ── 生效 MD 信息 ──
export interface MdInfo {
  fileName: string;
  filePath: string;
}

// ── 素材库（为 M4 预留接口） ──
export interface MaterialLib {
  type: 'auto' | 'manual';
  label: string;
  dirPath: string;
}

// ── 任务（为 M3 预留接口） ──
export interface TaskInfo {
  folderName: string;
  model: string;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'done' | 'failed';
  jobCount: number;
  doneCount: number;
  failedCount: number;
  startedAt: number;
  images: string[];
  errors: string[];
}

// ── 消息定义 ──

/** 扩展 → Webview */
export type ExtMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; config: AppConfig; md?: MdInfo; tasks: TaskInfo[]; materialLibs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; config: AppConfig }
  | { type: 'activeMdChange'; md?: MdInfo }
  | { type: 'statusMessage'; message: string; isError: boolean }
  | { type: 'tasksUpdate'; tasks: TaskInfo[] }
  | { type: 'materialLibsUpdate'; libs: MaterialLib[] };

/** Webview → 扩展 */
export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'updateConfig'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'generateClick' }
  | { type: 'previewClick' }
  | { type: 'addMaterialFolder' }
  | { type: 'removeMaterialFolder'; path: string };

```

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 扩展入口
 *
 * M1：端到端生成 + 右键命令
 * M2：侧栏 Webview Provider + 配置自管（secrets / globalState）+ 注入种入
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdown, readRefImages } from './markdownParser';
import { submitGenerate } from './apiClient';
import { getExtFromUrl, isImageExt } from './imageTypes';
import { getConfig, seedModelInjections } from './configuration';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';
import type { AppConfig, MdInfo } from './shared';

let sidebarProvider: SidebarProvider | undefined;

// ── 生效 MD 跟踪（§8.2） ──

function extractMdInfo(editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined): MdInfo | undefined {
  if (!editor) return undefined;
  if (path.extname(editor.document.fileName) !== '.md') return undefined;
  return {
    fileName: path.basename(editor.document.fileName),
    filePath: editor.document.fileName,
  };
}

function startTrackingActiveMd(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  const update = (editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined) => {
    const md = extractMdInfo(editor);
    sidebarProvider?.setActiveMd(md);
  };

  // 初始化
  update(vscode.window.activeTextEditor);

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor(update),
  );
}

// ── 生成同秒不重复的文件夹名 ──

let lastTs = '';
let seqCounter = 0;

function nextTaskFolderName(): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const pad = (n: number) => String(n).padStart(2, '0');
  const ts = `${now.getFullYear()}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
  if (ts !== lastTs) {
    lastTs = ts;
    seqCounter = 0;
  }
  const name = seqCounter === 0 ? `task-${ts}` : `task-${ts}-${seqCounter}`;
  seqCounter++;
  return name;
}

// ── 图片下载 ──

async function downloadImage(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {
  const resp = await fetch(url);
  if (!resp.ok) {
    throw new Error(`下载失败 HTTP ${resp.status}: ${url}`);
  }
  const buf = Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer());
  fs.writeFileSync(destPath, buf);
}

// ── 核心生成命令 ──

async function handleGenerateImage(uri?: vscode.Uri, context?: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  const mdUri = uri || (vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri);
  if (!mdUri || path.extname(mdUri.fsPath) !== '.md') {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开或右键一个 Markdown 文件');
    return;
  }

  const config = context ? await getConfig(context) : getLegacyConfig();
  if (!config.apiKey) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在设置中配置 image-flow.apiKey（Grsai API Key）');
    return;
  }

  const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
  const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');

  if (!content.trim()) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('内容为空：Markdown 文件无有效内容');
    return;
  }

  const parseResult = parseMarkdown(content);
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  let dataUris: string[];
  try {
    dataUris = readRefImages(mdDir, parseResult.refs);
  } catch (e: unknown) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(e instanceof Error ? e.message : '参考图读取失败');
    return;
  }

  const prompt = parseResult.body;

  const taskFolderName = nextTaskFolderName();
  const taskFolderPath = path.join(mdDir, taskFolderName);
  fs.mkdirSync(taskFolderPath, { recursive: true });

  const N = Math.max(1, config.concurrency);
  const submitPromises: Promise<{ ok: boolean; results?: string[]; error?: string }>[] = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
    submitPromises.push(
      submitGenerate(config, prompt, dataUris)
        .then(resp => {
          if (resp.status === 'succeeded' && resp.results) {
            return { ok: true, results: resp.results.map(r => r.url) };
          }
          return { ok: false, error: resp.error || `状态: ${resp.status}` };
        })
        .catch((e: unknown) => ({
          ok: false,
          error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
        })),
    );
  }

  const outcomes = await Promise.all(submitPromises);
  const allFailed = outcomes.every(o => !o.ok);

  if (allFailed) {
    try { fs.rmdirSync(taskFolderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
    const errors = new Set(outcomes.filter(o => o.error).map(o => o.error!));
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
      `全部 ${N} 个生成请求均失败:\n${[...errors].map(e => `  - ${e}`).join('\n')}`,
    );
    return;
  }

  const mdName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');
  let imgSeq = 0;
  let successCount = 0;
  const failures: string[] = [];

  for (const outcome of outcomes) {
    if (!outcome.ok || !outcome.results) {
      if (outcome.error) failures.push(outcome.error);
      continue;
    }
    for (const url of outcome.results) {
      imgSeq++;
      const ext = getExtFromUrl(url);
      const safeExt = isImageExt(ext) ? ext : 'png';
      const destPath = path.join(taskFolderPath, `${mdName}-${imgSeq}.${safeExt}`);
      try {
        await downloadImage(url, destPath);
        successCount++;
      } catch (e: unknown) {
        failures.push(e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));
      }
    }
  }

  if (failures.length > 0) {
    if (successCount > 0) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
        `部分图片生成成功（${successCount} 张），${failures.length} 个失败。已保存至 ${taskFolderName}/`,
      );
    } else {
      try { fs.rmdirSync(taskFolderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
      const deduped = [...new Set(failures)];
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
        `图片生成失败:\n${deduped.map(f => `  - ${f}`).join('\n')}`,
      );
    }
  } else {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
      `图片生成成功（${successCount} 张），已保存至 ${taskFolderName}/`,
    );
  }
}

/** M1 回退配置（当 context 不可用时读取 VSCode 原生配置） */
function getLegacyConfig(): AppConfig {
  const cfg = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
  return {
    apiKey: cfg.get<string>('apiKey') || '',
    baseUrl: cfg.get<string>('baseUrl') || 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
    model: cfg.get<string>('model') || 'nano-banana-2',
    aspectRatio: cfg.get<string>('aspectRatio') || '3:4',
    imageSize: cfg.get<string>('imageSize') || '1K',
    concurrency: cfg.get<number>('concurrency') || 1,
    workbenchCols: cfg.get<number>('workbenchCols') || 4,
    tasksCols: cfg.get<number>('tasksCols') || 2,
    modelInjections: cfg.get<Record<string, string>>('modelInjections') || {},
  };
}

/** 预览请求 —— M5 完整实现 */
async function handlePreviewRequest(_uri?: vscode.Uri) {
  vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
}

// ── 激活 ──

export async function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  // 1. 先种入模型注入种子（§4.3），保证侧栏首次读配置时默认句已可见
  await seedModelInjections(context);

  // 2. 注册侧栏 Provider
  sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider(SidebarProvider.viewType, sidebarProvider),
  );

  // 3. 生效 MD 跟踪
  startTrackingActiveMd(context);

  // 4. 注册命令
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', (uri?: vscode.Uri) =>
      handleGenerateImage(uri, context),
    ),
  );
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', handlePreviewRequest),
  );

  // TODO M3: 激活时 resume() 续拉未完成任务
}

export function deactivate() {
  sidebarProvider = undefined;
}

```

```typescript
/**
 * 任务管理器（§7）
 *
 * 管理异步生成任务的全生命周期：提交 → 轮询 → 下载 → 持久化 → 续拉。
 * 使用单一 PollTimer 服务所有 running job，globalState 持久化任务列表。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { submitGenerate, pollResult, type ApiConfig, type GenerateResponse } from './apiClient';
import { PollTimer } from './pollTimer';
import { downloadImage } from './downloader';
import { isTransientError, isJobTimedOut, dedupeErrors, JOB_TIMEOUT_MS } from './jobStateMachine';
import { getExtFromUrl, isImageExt } from './imageTypes';
import type { TaskInfo } from './shared';

// ── 可序列化的内部记录 ──

interface JobRecord {
  jobId: string;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  submitTime: number;
  errors: string[];
  results?: { url: string }[];
  downloadedImages: string[];
}

interface TaskRecord {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  model: string;
  status: 'running' | 'done' | 'failed';
  startedAt: number;
  mdName: string;
  jobs: JobRecord[];
}

type ChangeCallback = (tasks: TaskInfo[]) => void;

export class TaskManager {
  private _context: vscode.ExtensionContext;
  private _config: ApiConfig;
  private _pollTimer: PollTimer;
  private _tasks: TaskRecord[] = [];
  private _onChange: ChangeCallback | null = null;
  private _sessionStartMs: number;

  constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, config: ApiConfig) {
    this._context = context;
    this._config = config;
    this._sessionStartMs = Date.now();
    this._pollTimer = new PollTimer(() => this._pollAllRunningJobs());
  }

  /** 更新配置（用于配置变更后同步） */
  setConfig(config: ApiConfig): void {
    this._config = config;
  }

  /** 注册 UI 变更回调 */
  setOnChange(cb: ChangeCallback): void {
    this._onChange = cb;
  }

  /** 从 globalState 恢复未完成任务并续拉 */
  async resume(): Promise<void> {
    const stored: TaskRecord[] | undefined = this._context.globalState.get('tasks');
    if (!stored || !Array.isArray(stored)) return;

    const now = Date.now();
    let hasRunning = false;

    for (const t of stored) {
      if (t.status === 'done' || t.status === 'failed') {
        this._tasks.push(t);
        continue;
      }
      // 检查每个 job 是否超时
      let taskHasRunning = false;
      for (const j of t.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'running' || j.status === 'submitting') {
          if (isJobTimedOut(this._sessionStartMs, j.submitTime)) {
            j.status = 'failed';
            j.errors.push('任务超时');
          } else {
            taskHasRunning = true;
            hasRunning = true;
          }
        }
      }
      if (!taskHasRunning) {
        t.status = t.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'failed') ? 'failed' : 'done';
      }
      this._tasks.push(t);
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();
    if (hasRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(true);
    }
  }

  /** 发起一次生成：提交 N 个并发 job，全部异步 */
  async createTask(
    config: ApiConfig,
    prompt: string,
    dataUris: string[],
    folderName: string,
    folderPath: string,
    mdName: string,
  ): Promise<void> {
    const N = Math.max(1, config.concurrency);
    const taskId = folderName;
    const startedAt = Date.now();

    const task: TaskRecord = {
      taskId,
      folderName,
      folderPath,
      model: config.model,
      status: 'running',
      startedAt,
      mdName,
      jobs: [],
    };

    // 先持久化并通知 UI「提交中」状态
    this._tasks.unshift(task);
    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();

    // 并发提交（独立提交，各自处理结果）
    const submitPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
      submitPromises.push(this._submitOneJob(task, config, prompt, dataUris));
    }

    // 等待所有提交完成，然后启动轮询
    await Promise.allSettled(submitPromises);

    // 检查是否有 running job 需要轮询
    const hasRunning = task.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running');
    if (hasRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(true);
    } else if (task.jobs.length === 0 || task.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'failed')) {
      task.status = 'failed';
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();
  }

  /** 提交单个 job */
  private async _submitOneJob(
    task: TaskRecord,
    config: ApiConfig,
    prompt: string,
    dataUris: string[],
  ): Promise<void> {
    const job: JobRecord = {
      jobId: '',
      status: 'submitting',
      submitTime: Date.now(),
      errors: [],
      downloadedImages: [],
    };
    task.jobs.push(job);

    try {
      const resp = await submitGenerate(config, prompt, dataUris);
      job.jobId = resp.id;
      job.status = 'running';
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
      if (isTransientError(undefined, msg)) {
        // 瞬时错误——仍视为 running，等待轮询重试
        job.status = 'running';
        job.errors.push(msg);
      } else {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.errors.push(msg);
      }
    }
  }

  /** 轮询所有 running job */
  private async _pollAllRunningJobs(): Promise<void> {
    const runningJobs: { task: TaskRecord; job: JobRecord }[] = [];
    for (const t of this._tasks) {
      if (t.status !== 'running') continue;
      for (const j of t.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'running') {
          runningJobs.push({ task: t, job: j });
        }
      }
    }

    if (runningJobs.length === 0) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(false);
      return;
    }

    // 并发轮询所有 job
    await Promise.allSettled(
      runningJobs.map(({ task, job }) => this._pollOneJob(task, job)),
    );

    // 更新各 task 状态
    for (const t of this._tasks) {
      if (t.status !== 'running') continue;
      const hasRunning = t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running');
      if (!hasRunning) {
        t.status = t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'succeeded') ? 'done' : 'failed';
      }
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();

    // 检查是否还有 running job 需要继续轮询
    const stillRunning = this._tasks.some(t =>
      t.status === 'running' && t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running'),
    );
    if (!stillRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(false);
    }
  }

  /** 轮询单个 job */
  private async _pollOneJob(task: TaskRecord, job: JobRecord): Promise<void> {
    try {
      const resp = await pollResult(this._config.baseUrl, this._config.apiKey, job.jobId);
      this._handlePollResponse(task, job, resp);
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
      if (isTransientError(undefined, msg)) {
        job.errors.push(msg);
      } else {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.errors.push(msg);
      }
    }
  }

  /** 处理轮询响应 */
  private async _handlePollResponse(
    task: TaskRecord,
    job: JobRecord,
    resp: GenerateResponse,
  ): Promise<void> {
    switch (resp.status) {
      case 'succeeded': {
        job.status = 'succeeded';
        if (resp.results) {
          job.results = resp.results;
          // 下载图片
          for (const r of resp.results) {
            try {
              const imgSeq = job.downloadedImages.length + 1;
              const ext = getExtFromUrl(r.url);
              const safeExt = isImageExt(ext) ? ext : 'png';
              const destBase = path.join(task.folderPath, `${task.mdName}-${imgSeq}`);
              await downloadImage(r.url, destBase);
              job.downloadedImages.push(`${task.mdName}-${imgSeq}.${safeExt}`);
            } catch (e: unknown) {
              job.errors.push(e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));
            }
          }
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'failed':
      case 'violation': {
        job.status = resp.status;
        if (resp.error) job.errors.push(resp.error);
        break;
      }
      case 'running': {
        // 仍在运行，更新进度
        job.status = 'running';
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  /** 转换为 UI 用的 TaskInfo 列表 */
  getTaskInfos(): TaskInfo[] {
    return this._tasks.map(t => ({
      taskId: t.taskId,
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      status: t.status,
      jobCount: t.jobs.length,
      doneCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
      failedCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
      startedAt: t.startedAt,
      images: t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages),
      errors: dedupeErrors(t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.errors)),
    }));
  }

  /** 获取所有任务（含已完成）用于持久化 */
  private _getSerializable(): TaskRecord[] {
    return this._tasks;
  }

  /** 持久化到 globalState */
  private async _persist(): Promise<void> {
    await this._context.globalState.update('tasks', this._getSerializable());
  }

  /** 通知 UI */
  private _notifyUI(): void {
    if (this._onChange) {
      this._onChange(this.getTaskInfos());
    }
  }

  /** 清理（扩展停用时调用） */
  dispose(): void {
    this._pollTimer.dispose();
  }
}

```
</details>

```css
/* Image Flow 侧栏样式 */

/* ── 基础重置 ── */
* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}

body {
  font-family: var(--vscode-font-family, -apple-system, sans-serif);
  font-size: var(--vscode-font-size, 13px);
  color: var(--vscode-foreground);
  background: var(--vscode-sideBar-background);
  padding: 0;
}

/* ── Loading ── */
.loading {
  padding: 8px;
  color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);
}

/* ── 全局状态行 ── */
.global-status {
  padding: 4px 8px;
  font-size: 12px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--vscode-panel-border);
}
.global-status.error {
  color: var(--vscode-errorForeground);
}

/* ── Tabs（Radix UI）── */
.tabs-root {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100vh;
}

.tabs-list {
  display: flex;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--vscode-panel-border);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.tabs-trigger {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 6px 0;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
  color: var(--vscode-foreground);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: inherit;
  transition: border-color 0.15s;
}
.tabs-trigger:hover {
  background: var(--vscode-toolbar-hoverBackground);
}
.tabs-trigger[data-state='active'] {
  border-bottom-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder);
  font-weight: 600;
}

.tabs-content {
  flex: 1;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: 8px;
}

/* ── 控件行 ── */
.controls-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr auto;
  gap: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.control-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 2px;
}
.control-label {
  font-size: 10px;
  color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.control-select,
.control-input {
  padding: 3px 4px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: inherit;
  background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border);
  border-radius: 2px;
}
.control-select:focus,
.control-input:focus {
  outline: 1px solid var(--vscode-focusBorder);
}

.control-stepper .control-input {
  width: 56px;
  text-align: center;
}

/* ── 生成行 ── */
.generate-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.active-md {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.active-md.none {
  color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);
  font-style: italic;
}

.btn {
  padding: 4px 10px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 3px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: inherit;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.btn-primary {
  background: var(--vscode-button-background);
  color: var(--vscode-button-foreground);
}
.btn-primary:hover {
  background: var(--vscode-button-hoverBackground);
}
.btn-primary:disabled {
  opacity: 0.5;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
.btn-secondary {
  background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryBackground);
  color: var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground);
}
.btn-secondary:hover {
  background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryHoverBackground);
}

/* ── 状态行 ── */
.status-row {
  font-size: 11px;
  min-height: 16px;
  color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);
}
.status-row:empty {
  display: none;
}

/* ── 占位文本 ── */
.placeholder-text {
  color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);
  font-style: italic;
  padding: 16px 0;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 12px;
}

/* ── 素材库区 ── */
.material-section {
  min-height: 60px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

/* ── 设置页 ── */
.settings-tab {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 12px;
}

.setting-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
}

.setting-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.setting-sublabel {
  font-weight: normal;
  margin-left: 8px;
}
.setting-sublabel a {
  color: var(--vscode-textLink-foreground);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 11px;
}
.setting-sublabel a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.setting-input,
.setting-select {
  padding: 4px 6px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: inherit;
  background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border);
  border-radius: 2px;
}
.setting-input:focus,
.setting-select:focus {
  outline: 1px solid var(--vscode-focusBorder);
}

.setting-textarea {
  padding: 4px 6px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: inherit;
  background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border);
  border-radius: 2px;
  resize: vertical;
}
.setting-textarea:focus {
  outline: 1px solid var(--vscode-focusBorder);
}

```

```typescript
/** 任务标签页（§8.4）—— 异步任务列表，实时显示进度与结果 */

import React from 'react';
import type { TaskInfo } from '../../src/shared';

interface Props {
  tasks: TaskInfo[];
}

function formatTime(ts: number): string {
  const d = new Date(ts);
  const pad = (n: number) => String(n).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${pad(d.getHours())}:${pad(d.getMinutes())}:${pad(d.getSeconds())}`;
}

function statusLabel(status: TaskInfo['status']): string {
  switch (status) {
    case 'running': return '进行中';
    case 'done': return '已完成';
    case 'failed': return '失败';
  }
}

export const TasksTab: React.FC<Props> = ({ tasks }) => {
  if (tasks.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="tasks-tab">
        <p className="placeholder-text">暂无任务——在编辑区右键 Markdown 文件选择「生成图片」</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="tasks-tab">
      {tasks.map(task => {
        const total = task.jobCount;
        const done = task.doneCount;
        const failed = task.failedCount;
        const pct = total > 0 ? Math.round((done / total) * 100) : 0;

        return (
          <div key={task.taskId} className={`task-card status-${task.status}`}>
            <div className="task-card-header">
              <span className="task-folder" title={task.folderName}>{task.folderName}</span>
              <span className={`task-badge badge-${task.status}`}>{statusLabel(task.status)}</span>
            </div>
            <div className="task-meta">
              <span>{task.model}</span>
              <span>{formatTime(task.startedAt)}</span>
            </div>
            {total > 0 && (
              <div className="task-progress">
                <div className="progress-bar">
                  <div className="progress-fill" style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} />
                </div>
                <span className="progress-text">{done}/{total}{failed > 0 ? ` (${failed} 失败)` : ''}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            {task.images.length > 0 && (
              <div className="task-images">
                {task.images.map((img, i) => (
                  <span key={i} className="task-image-name">{img}</span>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
            {task.errors.length > 0 && (
              <ul className="task-errors">
                {task.errors.map((err, i) => (
                  <li key={i}>{err}</li>
                ))}
              </ul>
            )}
          </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
};

```
</details>

```typescript
/** 侧栏 Webview 入口（§8）—— React 19 单页应用，Radix UI Tabs */

import React, { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';
import { postMessageToExt } from './hooks/useVsCodeApi';
import { WorkbenchTab } from './components/WorkbenchTab';
import { TasksTab } from './components/TasksTab';
import { SettingsTab } from './components/SettingsTab';
import type { AppConfig, ExtMessage, MdInfo, TaskInfo, MaterialLib } from '../src/shared';

const App: React.FC = () => {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<AppConfig | null>(null);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('workbench');
  const [md, setMd] = useState<MdInfo | undefined>();
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<TaskInfo[]>([]);
  const [materialLibs, setMaterialLibs] = useState<MaterialLib[]>([]);
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<{ message: string; isError: boolean } | null>(null);

  const handleMessage = useCallback((e: MessageEvent<ExtMessage>) => {
    const msg = e.data;
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init':
        setConfig(msg.config);
        setMd(msg.md);
        setTasks(msg.tasks);
        setMaterialLibs(msg.materialLibs);
        break;
      case 'configUpdate':
        setConfig(prev => prev ? { ...prev, ...msg.config } : null);
        break;
      case 'activeMdChange':
        setMd(msg.md);
        break;
      case 'statusMessage':
        setStatus({ message: msg.message, isError: msg.isError });
        // 5 秒后自动清除
        setTimeout(() => setStatus(null), 5000);
        break;
      case 'tasksUpdate':
        setTasks(msg.tasks);
        break;
      case 'materialLibsUpdate':
        setMaterialLibs(msg.libs);
        break;
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    window.addEventListener('message', handleMessage);
    // 挂载后发 init
    postMessageToExt({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handleMessage);
  }, [handleMessage]);

  // 暂未收到配置 → loading
  if (!config) {
    return <div className="loading">加载中...</div>;
  }

  return (
    <Tabs.Root
      className="tabs-root"
      value={activeTab}
      onValueChange={setActiveTab}
    >
      <Tabs.List className="tabs-list" aria-label="标签页">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="workbench">
          工作台
        </Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="tasks">
          任务
        </Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="settings">
          设置
        </Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="workbench">
        <WorkbenchTab config={config} md={md} />
      </Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="tasks">
        <TasksTab tasks={tasks} />
      </Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="settings">
        <SettingsTab config={config} />
      </Tabs.Content>

      {/* 全局状态行 */}
      {status && (
        <div className={`global-status ${status.isError ? 'error' : ''}`}>
          {status.message}
        </div>
      )}
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
};

const rootEl = document.getElementById('root');
if (rootEl) {
  createRoot(rootEl).render(<App />);
}

```
</details>

```typescript
  /** 从 globalState 恢复未完成任务并续拉 */
  async resume(): Promise<void> {
    const stored: TaskRecord[] | undefined = this._context.globalState.get('tasks');
    if (!stored || !Array.isArray(stored)) return;

    const now = Date.now();
    let hasRunning = false;

    for (const t of stored) {
      if (t.status === 'done' || t.status === 'failed') {
        this._tasks.push(t);
        continue;
      }
      // 检查每个 job 是否超时
      let taskHasRunning = false;
      for (const j of t.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'running' || j.status === 'submitting') {
          if (isJobTimedOut(this._sessionStartMs, j.submitTime)) {
            j.status = 'failed';
```

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 扩展入口
 *
 * M1：端到端生成 + 右键命令
 * M2：侧栏 Webview Provider + 配置自管（secrets / globalState）+ 注入种入
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdown, readRefImages } from './markdownParser';
import { getConfig, seedModelInjections } from './configuration';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';
import { TaskManager } from './taskManager';
import type { AppConfig, MdInfo } from './shared';

let sidebarProvider: SidebarProvider | undefined;
let taskManager: TaskManager | undefined;
let extensionCtx: vscode.ExtensionContext | undefined;

// ── 生效 MD 跟踪（§8.2） ──

function extractMdInfo(editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined): MdInfo | undefined {
  if (!editor) return undefined;
  if (path.extname(editor.document.fileName) !== '.md') return undefined;
  return {
    fileName: path.basename(editor.document.fileName),
    filePath: editor.document.fileName,
  };
}

function startTrackingActiveMd(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  const update = (editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined) => {
    const md = extractMdInfo(editor);
    sidebarProvider?.setActiveMd(md);
  };

  // 初始化
  update(vscode.window.activeTextEditor);

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor(update),
  );
}

// ── 生成同秒不重复的文件夹名 ──

let lastTs = '';
let seqCounter = 0;

function nextTaskFolderName(): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const pad = (n: number) => String(n).padStart(2, '0');
  const ts = `${now.getFullYear()}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
  if (ts !== lastTs) {
    lastTs = ts;
    seqCounter = 0;
  }
  const name = seqCounter === 0 ? `task-${ts}` : `task-${ts}-${seqCounter}`;
  seqCounter++;
  return name;
}

// ── 核心生成命令 ──

async function handleGenerateImage(uri?: vscode.Uri) {
  const mdUri = uri || (vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri);
  if (!mdUri || path.extname(mdUri.fsPath) !== '.md') {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开或右键一个 Markdown 文件');
    return;
  }

  if (!taskManager) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('扩展尚未就绪，请稍后重试');
    return;
  }

  const config = await getConfigForGenerate();
  if (!config.apiKey) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在设置中配置 API Key');
    return;
  }

  const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
  const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');

  if (!content.trim()) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('内容为空：Markdown 文件无有效内容');
    return;
  }

  const parseResult = parseMarkdown(content);
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  let dataUris: string[];
  try {
    dataUris = readRefImages(mdDir, parseResult.refs);
  } catch (e: unknown) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(e instanceof Error ? e.message : '参考图读取失败');
    return;
  }

  const prompt = parseResult.body;
  const mdName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

  const taskFolderName = nextTaskFolderName();
  const taskFolderPath = path.join(mdDir, taskFolderName);
  fs.mkdirSync(taskFolderPath, { recursive: true });

  // 推一条状态消息到侧栏
  sidebarProvider?.showStatus(`正在提交 ${config.concurrency} 个任务到 ${config.model}…`);

  try {
    await taskManager.createTask(config, prompt, dataUris, taskFolderName, taskFolderPath, mdName);
  } catch (e: unknown) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`任务提交失败: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    try { fs.rmdirSync(taskFolderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
  }
}

async function getConfigForGenerate(): Promise<AppConfig> {
  if (!extensionCtx) throw new Error('扩展尚未激活');
  return getConfig(extensionCtx);
}

/** 预览请求 —— M5 完整实现 */
async function handlePreviewRequest(_uri?: vscode.Uri) {
  vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
}

// ── 激活 ──

export async function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  extensionCtx = context;

  // 1. 先种入模型注入种子（§4.3），保证侧栏首次读配置时默认句已可见
  await seedModelInjections(context);

  // 2. 注册侧栏 Provider
  sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider(SidebarProvider.viewType, sidebarProvider),
  );

  // 3. 生效 MD 跟踪
  startTrackingActiveMd(context);

  // 4. 创建 TaskManager 并续拉未完成任务
  const config = await getConfig(context);
  taskManager = new TaskManager(context, config);
  taskManager.setOnChange(tasks => {
    sidebarProvider?.updateTasks(tasks);
  });
  // 配置变更时同步到 TaskManager
  sidebarProvider.setOnConfigChange(async () => {
    const newConfig = await getConfig(context);
    taskManager?.setConfig(newConfig);
  });
  context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => taskManager!.dispose() });
  await taskManager.resume();

  // 5. 注册命令
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', handleGenerateImage),
  );
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', handlePreviewRequest),
  );
}

export function deactivate() {
  taskManager?.dispose();
  taskManager = undefined;
  sidebarProvider = undefined;
  extensionCtx = undefined;
}

```
</details>

<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612093851/src/taskManager.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * 任务管理器（§7）
 *
 * 管理异步生成任务的全生命周期：提交 → 轮询 → 下载 → 持久化 → 续拉。
 * 使用单一 PollTimer 服务所有 running job，globalState 持久化任务列表。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { submitGenerate, pollResult, type ApiConfig, type GenerateResponse } from './apiClient';
import { PollTimer } from './pollTimer';
import { downloadImage } from './downloader';
import { isTransientError, isJobTimedOut, dedupeErrors } from './jobStateMachine';
import { getExtFromUrl, isImageExt } from './imageTypes';
import type { TaskInfo } from './shared';

// ── 可序列化的内部记录 ──

interface JobRecord {
  jobId: string;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  submitTime: number;
  errors: string[];
  results?: { url: string }[];
  downloadedImages: string[];
}

interface TaskRecord {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  model: string;
  status: 'running' | 'done' | 'failed';
  startedAt: number;
  mdName: string;
  jobs: JobRecord[];
}

type ChangeCallback = (tasks: TaskInfo[]) => void;

export class TaskManager {
  private _context: vscode.ExtensionContext;
  private _config: ApiConfig;
  private _pollTimer: PollTimer;
  private _tasks: TaskRecord[] = [];
  private _onChange: ChangeCallback | null = null;
  private _sessionStartMs: number;

  constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, config: ApiConfig) {
    this._context = context;
    this._config = config;
    this._sessionStartMs = Date.now();
    this._pollTimer = new PollTimer(() => this._pollAllRunningJobs());
  }

  /** 更新配置（用于配置变更后同步） */
  setConfig(config: ApiConfig): void {
    this._config = config;
  }

  /** 注册 UI 变更回调 */
  setOnChange(cb: ChangeCallback): void {
    this._onChange = cb;
  }

  /** 从 globalState 恢复未完成任务并续拉 */
  async resume(): Promise<void> {
    const stored: TaskRecord[] | undefined = this._context.globalState.get('tasks');
    if (!stored || !Array.isArray(stored)) return;

    let hasRunning = false;

    for (const t of stored) {
      if (t.status === 'done' || t.status === 'failed') {
        this._tasks.push(t);
        continue;
      }
      // 检查每个 job 是否超时
      let taskHasRunning = false;
      for (const j of t.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'running' || j.status === 'submitting') {
          if (isJobTimedOut(this._sessionStartMs, j.submitTime)) {
            j.status = 'failed';
            j.errors.push('任务超时');
          } else {
            taskHasRunning = true;
            hasRunning = true;
          }
        }
      }
      if (!taskHasRunning) {
        t.status = t.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'failed') ? 'failed' : 'done';
      }
      this._tasks.push(t);
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();
    if (hasRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(true);
    }
  }

  /** 发起一次生成：提交 N 个并发 job，全部异步 */
  async createTask(
    config: ApiConfig,
    prompt: string,
    dataUris: string[],
    folderName: string,
    folderPath: string,
    mdName: string,
  ): Promise<void> {
    const N = Math.max(1, config.concurrency);
    const taskId = folderName;
    const startedAt = Date.now();

    const task: TaskRecord = {
      taskId,
      folderName,
      folderPath,
      model: config.model,
      status: 'running',
      startedAt,
      mdName,
      jobs: [],
    };

    // 先持久化并通知 UI「提交中」状态
    this._tasks.unshift(task);
    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();

    // 并发提交（独立提交，各自处理结果）
    const submitPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
      submitPromises.push(this._submitOneJob(task, config, prompt, dataUris));
    }

    // 等待所有提交完成，然后启动轮询
    await Promise.allSettled(submitPromises);

    // 检查是否有 running job 需要轮询
    const hasRunning = task.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running');
    if (hasRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(true);
    } else if (task.jobs.length === 0 || task.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'failed')) {
      task.status = 'failed';
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();
  }

  /** 提交单个 job */
  private async _submitOneJob(
    task: TaskRecord,
    config: ApiConfig,
    prompt: string,
    dataUris: string[],
  ): Promise<void> {
    const job: JobRecord = {
      jobId: '',
      status: 'submitting',
      submitTime: Date.now(),
      errors: [],
      downloadedImages: [],
    };
    task.jobs.push(job);

    try {
      const resp = await submitGenerate(config, prompt, dataUris);
      job.jobId = resp.id;
      job.status = 'running';
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
      if (isTransientError(undefined, msg)) {
        // 瞬时错误——仍视为 running，等待轮询重试
        job.status = 'running';
        job.errors.push(msg);
      } else {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.errors.push(msg);
      }
    }
  }

  /** 轮询所有 running job */
  private async _pollAllRunningJobs(): Promise<void> {
    const runningJobs: { task: TaskRecord; job: JobRecord }[] = [];
    for (const t of this._tasks) {
      if (t.status !== 'running') continue;
      for (const j of t.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'running') {
          runningJobs.push({ task: t, job: j });
        }
      }
    }

    if (runningJobs.length === 0) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(false);
      return;
    }

    // 并发轮询所有 job
    await Promise.allSettled(
      runningJobs.map(({ task, job }) => this._pollOneJob(task, job)),
    );

    // 更新各 task 状态
    for (const t of this._tasks) {
      if (t.status !== 'running') continue;
      const hasRunning = t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running');
      if (!hasRunning) {
        t.status = t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'succeeded') ? 'done' : 'failed';
      }
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();

    // 检查是否还有 running job 需要继续轮询
    const stillRunning = this._tasks.some(t =>
      t.status === 'running' && t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running'),
    );
    if (!stillRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(false);
    }
  }

  /** 轮询单个 job */
  private async _pollOneJob(task: TaskRecord, job: JobRecord): Promise<void> {
    try {
      const resp = await pollResult(this._config.baseUrl, this._config.apiKey, job.jobId);
      this._handlePollResponse(task, job, resp);
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
      if (isTransientError(undefined, msg)) {
        job.errors.push(msg);
      } else {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.errors.push(msg);
      }
    }
  }

  /** 处理轮询响应 */
  private async _handlePollResponse(
    task: TaskRecord,
    job: JobRecord,
    resp: GenerateResponse,
  ): Promise<void> {
    switch (resp.status) {
      case 'succeeded': {
        job.status = 'succeeded';
        if (resp.results) {
          job.results = resp.results;
          // 下载图片
          for (const r of resp.results) {
            try {
              const imgSeq = job.downloadedImages.length + 1;
              const ext = getExtFromUrl(r.url);
              const safeExt = isImageExt(ext) ? ext : 'png';
              const destBase = path.join(task.folderPath, `${task.mdName}-${imgSeq}`);
              await downloadImage(r.url, destBase);
              job.downloadedImages.push(`${task.mdName}-${imgSeq}.${safeExt}`);
            } catch (e: unknown) {
              job.errors.push(e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));
            }
          }
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'failed':
      case 'violation': {
        job.status = resp.status;
        if (resp.error) job.errors.push(resp.error);
        break;
      }
      case 'running': {
        // 仍在运行，更新进度
        job.status = 'running';
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  /** 转换为 UI 用的 TaskInfo 列表 */
  getTaskInfos(): TaskInfo[] {
    return this._tasks.map(t => ({
      taskId: t.taskId,
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      status: t.status,
      jobCount: t.jobs.length,
      doneCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
      failedCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
      startedAt: t.startedAt,
      images: t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages),
      errors: dedupeErrors(t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.errors)),
    }));
  }

  /** 获取所有任务（含已完成）用于持久化 */
  private _getSerializable(): TaskRecord[] {
    return this._tasks;
  }

  /** 持久化到 globalState */
  private async _persist(): Promise<void> {
    await this._context.globalState.update('tasks', this._getSerializable());
  }

  /** 通知 UI */
  private _notifyUI(): void {
    if (this._onChange) {
      this._onChange(this.getTaskInfos());
    }
  }

  /** 清理（扩展停用时调用） */
  dispose(): void {
    this._pollTimer.dispose();
  }
}

```
</details>

#### 👀 Read `apiClient.ts`

`02:05:51`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612093851/src/apiClient.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * Grsai API 调用层（§6）
 *
 * M3：使用 replyType: 'async' 异步提交 + 轮询结果。
 */

import { getPixelSize } from './pixelTable';
import { REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS } from './jobStateMachine';

/** API 生成请求参数 */
export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
}

/** 生成 / 轮询响应 */
export interface GenerateResponse {
  id: string;
  status: 'running' | 'violation' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';
  results?: { url: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

/** 配置快照 */
export interface ApiConfig {
  baseUrl: string;
  apiKey: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
}

function isNanoBanana(model: string): boolean {
  return model.startsWith('nano-banana');
}

/**
 * 构造请求体 —— 按模型系列区分尺寸字段（§6）：
 * - nano-banana: aspectRatio + imageSize
 * - gpt-image-2: 仅 aspectRatio（比例字符串）
 * - gpt-image-2-vip: aspectRatio 为像素值（如 "864x1152"）
 */
export function buildGenerateBody(req: GenerateRequest): Record<string, unknown> {
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: req.model,
    prompt: req.prompt,
    images: req.images,
    replyType: 'async',
  };

  if (isNanoBanana(req.model)) {
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
    body.imageSize = req.imageSize;
  } else if (req.model === 'gpt-image-2') {
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
  } else if (req.model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') {
    body.aspectRatio = getPixelSize(req.aspectRatio, req.imageSize);
  }

  return body;
}

/**
 * 异步提交生成请求（replyType: 'async'）。
 * 成功返回 { id, status: 'running' }；失败抛出 Error。
 */
export async function submitGenerate(
  config: ApiConfig,
  prompt: string,
  images: string[],
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const body = buildGenerateBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt,
    images,
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
  });

  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(`${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${config.apiKey}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!resp.ok) {
      const text = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(`API 返回错误 HTTP ${resp.status}${text ? ': ' + text : ''}`);
    }

    const json: unknown = await resp.json();
    const result = validateGenerateResponse(json);

    // async 提交，仅 running 含 id 是有效响应
    if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
      throw new Error(result.error || `提交被拒: ${result.status}`);
    }

    return result;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/**
 * 轮询异步任务结果（GET /v1/api/result?id=）。
 * 返回响应；网络/HTTP 错误抛出（由调用方按瞬时错误处理）。
 */
export async function pollResult(baseUrl: string, apiKey: string, jobId: string): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`, {
      method: 'GET',
      headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!resp.ok) {
      const text = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(`轮询失败 HTTP ${resp.status}${text ? ': ' + text : ''}`);
    }

    const json: unknown = await resp.json();
    return validateGenerateResponse(json);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/** 校验 API 返回结构，格式异常直接抛错 */
function validateGenerateResponse(json: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (!json || typeof json !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('API 返回非 JSON 对象');
  }
  const obj = json as Record<string, unknown>;
  if (typeof obj.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('API 返回缺少 id 字段');
  }
  const status = obj.status;
  if (status !== 'running' && status !== 'violation' && status !== 'succeeded' && status !== 'failed') {
    throw new Error(`API 返回未知状态: ${String(status)}`);
  }
  const result: GenerateResponse = {
    id: obj.id,
    status: status as GenerateResponse['status'],
  };
  if (Array.isArray(obj.results)) {
    result.results = (obj.results as unknown[]).filter(
      (r): r is { url: string } => typeof r === 'object' && r !== null && typeof (r as Record<string, unknown>).url === 'string',
    );
  }
  if (typeof obj.progress === 'number') result.progress = obj.progress;
  if (typeof obj.error === 'string') result.error = obj.error;
  return result;
}
```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 侧栏 Webview Provider（§8）
 *
 * 管理 webview 生命周期、CSP、localResourceRoots、postMessage 双向通信。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { getConfig, updateConfigField, getMaterialLibs } from './configuration';
import type { ExtMessage, MdInfo, WebviewMessage, TaskInfo } from './shared';

function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  public static readonly viewType = 'image-flow.sidebar';

  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;
  private _currentMd?: MdInfo;
  private _context: vscode.ExtensionContext;
  private _onConfigChange?: () => Promise<void>;

  constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
    this._context = context;
  }

  /** 注册配置变更回调（供 TaskManager 同步配置用） */
  setOnConfigChange(cb: () => Promise<void>): void {
    this._onConfigChange = cb;
  }

  /** 推一条消息到 webview */
  private postMessage(msg: ExtMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  /** 推送当前生效 MD 到 webview */
  setActiveMd(md: MdInfo | undefined): void {
    this._currentMd = md;
    this.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChange', md });
  }

  /** 推送状态消息 */
  showStatus(message: string, isError = false): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'statusMessage', message, isError });
  }

  /** 推送任务列表 */
  updateTasks(tasks: TaskInfo[]): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'tasksUpdate', tasks });
  }

  /** 推送素材库 */
  updateMaterialLibs(): void {
    const libs = getMaterialLibs(this._context);
    this.postMessage({ type: 'materialLibsUpdate', libs });
  }

  /** 更新 localResourceRoots（素材库增删后调用） */
  updateResourceRoots(libPaths: string[]): void {
    if (!this._view) return;
    const workspaceUri = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri;
    const roots: vscode.Uri[] = [];
    if (workspaceUri) roots.push(workspaceUri);
    for (const p of libPaths) {
      roots.push(vscode.Uri.file(p));
    }
    this._view.webview.options = {
      ...this._view.webview.options,
      localResourceRoots: roots,
    };
  }

  async resolveWebviewView(
    webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,
    _context: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,
    _token: vscode.CancellationToken,
  ): Promise<void> {
    this._view = webviewView;

    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri ?? vscode.Uri.file('/')],
    };

    const nonce = getNonce();
    const sidebarJsUri = webviewView.webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.file(path.join(this._context.extensionPath, 'media', 'sidebar.js')),
    );
    const sidebarCssUri = webviewView.webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.file(path.join(this._context.extensionPath, 'media', 'sidebar.css')),
    );
    const cspSource = webviewView.webview.cspSource;

    webviewView.webview.html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}' ${cspSource};
                 style-src ${cspSource} 'unsafe-inline';
                 img-src ${cspSource} data:;
                 font-src ${cspSource};">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${sidebarCssUri}">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarJsUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;

    // 监听 webview 消息
    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(
      (msg: WebviewMessage) => { this.handleMessage(msg); },
    );
  }

  private async handleMessage(msg: WebviewMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        const config = await getConfig(this._context);
        const libs = getMaterialLibs(this._context);
        this.postMessage({
          type: 'init',
          config,
          md: this._currentMd,
          tasks: [],
          materialLibs: libs,
        });
        break;
      }
      case 'updateConfig': {
        // 「获取 API Key →」链接：用系统浏览器打开
        if (msg.key === 'openExternal') {
          await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(String(msg.value)));
          break;
        }
        const newConfig = await updateConfigField(this._context, msg.key, msg.value);
        // 推送完整最新配置回 webview
        this.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', config: newConfig });
        // 通知 TaskManager 同步配置
        if (this._onConfigChange) await this._onConfigChange();
        break;
      }
      case 'generateClick': {
        await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.generateImage');
        break;
      }
      case 'previewClick': {
        await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.previewRequest');
        break;
      }
      case 'addMaterialFolder': {
        // M4 实现
        break;
      }
      case 'removeMaterialFolder': {
        // M4 实现
        break;
      }
    }
  }
}

```
</details>

```markdown
## M3 — 异步任务机制

**目标**：把 M1 的同步 JSON 模式改为 `replyType: 'async'` 异步提交 + 轮询；任务可跨重启续拉。

### 产出物

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `src/taskManager.ts` | 核心：单例 `TaskManager`，维护任务列表（`Task[]`），`submit()`/`pollAll()`/`resume()`/`persist()` 方法 |
| `src/pollTimer.ts` | 单一 `setInterval`（4s）：仅当存在 running job 时运转，无则 clear；带重入锁（`isPolling` 标志位，一轮未结束不得开下一轮） |
| `src/downloader.ts` | 下载图片到任务文件夹，扩展名校验白名单，失败回退 png；写盘失败判任务失败 |
| `src/jobStateMachine.ts` | Job 状态流转与错误分类：5xx/429/abort/fetch failed → 瞬时（保持 running）；格式异常 → 失败；10 分钟超时 → 失败 |

### 关键行为

1. **提交**（重构自 M1）：
   a. 校验 apiKey → 解析 Markdown → 组装 prompt → 创建 `task-<ts>-<seq>` 文件夹
   b. **立即建卡返回**：创建 N 个 job（全部 `submitting` 态），UI 即时显示，不等网络
   c. 后台并发 N 个 `POST /v1/api/generate`（`replyType: 'async'`），逐个拿到 job id 转 `running`
   d. 全部 N 个提交失败 → 任务作废、从列表移除、删空文件夹、弹聚合错误通知
   e. 提交成功后侧栏自动切到「任务」标签页

2. **轮询**：
   a. 单一 4s 定时器，有 running job 则启动、无则停
   b. `GET /v1/api/result?id=` 逐 job 查询
   c. `succeeded` → 下载 results url 到任务文件夹（文件名含序号接续，多 job 不重名）
   d. `failed`/`violation` → 记录错误
   e. 瞬时错误 → 保持 running，下轮重试
   f. 超时（本会话起算 10 分钟）→ 标记失败

3. **持久化与重启**：
   a. 进行中任务（含 job id、状态、已下载图片、时间戳）每次状态变更即 `persist()` 到 globalState
   b. 扩展激活时 `resume()`：读取持久化任务列表，`submitting` 态无 id 的 job → 直接判「提交未完成」失败；有 id 的 running job → 立即拉一次 + 恢复定时器
   c. 超时从本次会话起算（关机时长不计）
   d. 任务真实开始时间单独保存，重启不重置

4. **任务终结清理**：
   a. 全部 job 终结 → 从持久化列表移除
   b. 有失败 job → 弹通知（有成图→警告；无成图→错误，错误去重聚合）
   c. 无任何成图 → 删空文件夹

### 验证清单

- [ ] 多任务并发提交互不干扰
- [ ] 提交点立即建卡，不等网络返回
- [ ] 单个定时器轮询所有进行中任务
- [ ] 重入锁：下载慢时不会开启重叠轮询
- [ ] 任务完成后刷新页面/重启 VS Code → 任务列表恢复并继续轮询
- [ ] 超时任务正确标记失败
- [ ] 全部提交失败 → 任务移除 + 空文件夹删除 + 错误通知
- [ ] 部分失败有成图 → 警告通知
- [ ] 部分失败无成图 → 错误通知
- [ ] submitting 态被关闭 → 重启后判「提交未完成」
- [ ] 同秒多任务文件夹不覆盖（seq 递增）

---

## M4 — 素材库

**目标**：工作台可浏览「当前路径」自动素材库与手动添加的素材库，右键缩略图插入 Markdown 引用。

### 产出物

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `src/materialLib.ts` | `scanAutoLibs(mdPath)`: 从工作区根下一层到 MD 所在目录，每层取直接图片（不递归）；`scanManualLib(dirPath)`: 递归扫描（深度 ≤3、条目 ≤500）；共用白名单过滤 |
| `src/markdownInsert.ts` | `insertRefAtCursor(editor, imgPath, mdPath)`: 检查当前编辑器是生效 MD；计算 POSIX 风格相对路径（非 `..` 加 `./`；含空格/括号用 `<>` 包裹）；alt 取文件名去扩展名；构造 `![alt](<relPath>)` 插入光标处；跨盘符警告 |
| `media/components/MaterialLibrary.tsx` | 素材库 UI：分段显示自动/手动库；每库折叠展开；缩略图网格（每行张数 = `workbenchCols`）；左键打开原图、右键插入引用 |

### 关键行为

1. **自动素材库（「当前路径」）**：
   a. 从工作区根目录的下一层开始，到生效 MD 所在目录，每一层为一个库
   b. 每层只取该目录下的直接图片文件（不递归），无图片不显示
   c. MD 不在工作区内 → 为空
   d. 生效 MD 变化时重新扫描

2. **手动素材库**：
   a. 「+ 添加」弹出系统文件夹选择器（`vscode.window.showOpenDialog`）
   b. 选中目录加入列表（去重），每个库可单独移除（x 按钮）
   c. 递归扫描：深度上限 3、条目上限 500
   d. 列表存 `workspaceState`

3. **插入引用**：
   a. 仅当前活动编辑器正是生效 MD 时插入（否则 `showWarningMessage` 后忽略）
   b. 路径 = 相对路径（POSIX 风格），非 `..` 时加 `./` 前缀
   c. 路径含空格/半角括号 → `<>` 包裹（与 §5 解析端兼容）
   d. alt = 文件名去扩展名
   e. 跨盘符无法相对引用 → 警告并放弃

4. `localResourceRoots` 随素材库增删重设（`vscode.WebviewView.webview.options.localResourceRoots`）

5. 缩略图经 `asWebviewUri` 转换后才能在 webview 显示

### 验证清单

- [ ] 自动素材库：工作区根有 a/、a/b/、a/b/c/ 三层，MD 在 c/，显示 b/ 和 c/ 两个库，各含直接图片
- [ ] 无图片的层不显示
- [ ] 手动素材库：添加文件夹 → 显示递归图片（不超 3 层 500 条）
- [ ] 重复添加同一文件夹 → 不重复
- [ ] 移除手动库 → 列表中消失
- [ ] 缩略图右键 → 图片引用插入生效 MD 光标处
- [ ] 非生效 MD 编辑器 → 右键插入 → 警告并忽略
- [ ] 路径含空格 → 插入时 `<>` 包裹
- [ ] 插入的引用在 §5 解析端能正确识别
- [ ] 缩略图左键 → VS Code 打开原图
- [ ] 缩略图每行张数随 `workbenchCols` 配置变化

---

## M5 — 预览请求

**目标**：点击「预览请求」生成预览文档，展示最终 prompt、请求地址、参数、参考图概览，不调 API。

### 产出物

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `src/previewProvider.ts` | `generatePreview()`: 走与提交完全相同的解析+拼装管线，构造请求体后不调 API，生成四段文本 → 打开临时文档 |
| `src/promptAssembler.ts` | 抽取 M1/M3 的 prompt 拼装逻辑为独立函数 `assemblePrompt(mdContent, model, workspaceRoot)`（M6 会加入注入和 IMAGES.md），提交与预览共用 |

### 关键行为

1. `previewRequest` 触发后：
   a. 校验当前有生效 MD（否则提示）
   b. 读取 MD 内容 → 解析参考图 → 组装 prompt（与真实提交完全一致，共用 `assemblePrompt`）
   c. 构造完整请求体 JSON
   d. 生成预览文本，四段：
      - 「## 最终提示词」：完整 prompt（含注入，单独成段不转义）
      - 「## 请求地址」：`POST {baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`
```

```typescript
/**
 * 任务管理器（§7）
 *
 * 管理异步生成任务的全生命周期：提交 → 轮询 → 下载 → 持久化 → 续拉。
 * 使用单一 PollTimer 服务所有 running job，globalState 持久化任务列表。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { submitGenerate, pollResult, type ApiConfig, type GenerateResponse } from './apiClient';
import { PollTimer } from './pollTimer';
import { downloadImage } from './downloader';
import { isTransientError, isJobTimedOut, dedupeErrors } from './jobStateMachine';
import { getExtFromUrl, isImageExt } from './imageTypes';
import type { TaskInfo } from './shared';

// ── 可序列化的内部记录 ──

interface JobRecord {
  jobId: string;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  submitTime: number;
  errors: string[];
  results?: { url: string }[];
  downloadedImages: string[];
}

interface TaskRecord {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  model: string;
  status: 'running' | 'done' | 'failed';
  startedAt: number;
  mdName: string;
  jobs: JobRecord[];
}

type ChangeCallback = (tasks: TaskInfo[]) => void;

export class TaskManager {
  private _context: vscode.ExtensionContext;
  private _config: ApiConfig;
  private _pollTimer: PollTimer;
  private _tasks: TaskRecord[] = [];
  private _onChange: ChangeCallback | null = null;
  private _sessionStartMs: number;

  constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, config: ApiConfig) {
    this._context = context;
    this._config = config;
    this._sessionStartMs = Date.now();
    this._pollTimer = new PollTimer(() => this._pollAllRunningJobs());
  }

  /** 更新配置（用于配置变更后同步） */
  setConfig(config: ApiConfig): void {
    this._config = config;
  }

  /** 注册 UI 变更回调 */
  setOnChange(cb: ChangeCallback): void {
    this._onChange = cb;
  }

  /** 从 globalState 恢复未完成任务并续拉 */
  async resume(): Promise<void> {
    const stored: TaskRecord[] | undefined = this._context.globalState.get('tasks');
    if (!stored || !Array.isArray(stored)) return;

    let hasRunning = false;

    for (const t of stored) {
      if (t.status === 'done' || t.status === 'failed') {
        this._tasks.push(t);
        continue;
      }
      // 检查每个 job 是否超时
      let taskHasRunning = false;
      for (const j of t.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'running' || j.status === 'submitting') {
          if (isJobTimedOut(this._sessionStartMs, j.submitTime)) {
            j.status = 'failed';
            j.errors.push('任务超时');
          } else {
            taskHasRunning = true;
            hasRunning = true;
          }
        }
      }
      if (!taskHasRunning) {
        t.status = t.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'failed') ? 'failed' : 'done';
      }
      this._tasks.push(t);
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();
    if (hasRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(true);
    }
  }

  /** 发起一次生成：提交 N 个并发 job，全部异步 */
  async createTask(
    config: ApiConfig,
    prompt: string,
    dataUris: string[],
    folderName: string,
    folderPath: string,
    mdName: string,
  ): Promise<void> {
    const N = Math.max(1, config.concurrency);
    const taskId = folderName;
    const startedAt = Date.now();

    const task: TaskRecord = {
      taskId,
      folderName,
      folderPath,
      model: config.model,
      status: 'running',
      startedAt,
      mdName,
      jobs: [],
    };

    // 先持久化并通知 UI「提交中」状态
    this._tasks.unshift(task);
    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();

    // 并发提交（独立提交，各自处理结果）
    const submitPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
      submitPromises.push(this._submitOneJob(task, config, prompt, dataUris));
    }

    // 等待所有提交完成，然后启动轮询
    await Promise.allSettled(submitPromises);

    // 检查是否有 running job 需要轮询
    const hasRunning = task.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running');
    if (hasRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(true);
    } else if (task.jobs.length === 0 || task.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'failed')) {
      task.status = 'failed';
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();
  }

  /** 提交单个 job */
  private async _submitOneJob(
    task: TaskRecord,
    config: ApiConfig,
    prompt: string,
    dataUris: string[],
  ): Promise<void> {
    const job: JobRecord = {
      jobId: '',
      status: 'submitting',
      submitTime: Date.now(),
      errors: [],
      downloadedImages: [],
    };
    task.jobs.push(job);

    try {
      const resp = await submitGenerate(config, prompt, dataUris);
      job.jobId = resp.id;
      job.status = 'running';
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
      job.status = 'failed';
      job.errors.push(msg);
    }
  }

  /** 轮询所有 running job */
  private async _pollAllRunningJobs(): Promise<void> {
    const runningJobs: { task: TaskRecord; job: JobRecord }[] = [];
    for (const t of this._tasks) {
      if (t.status !== 'running') continue;
      for (const j of t.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'running') {
          runningJobs.push({ task: t, job: j });
        }
      }
    }

    if (runningJobs.length === 0) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(false);
      return;
    }

    // 并发轮询所有 job
    await Promise.allSettled(
      runningJobs.map(({ task, job }) => this._pollOneJob(task, job)),
    );

    // 更新各 task 状态
    for (const t of this._tasks) {
      if (t.status !== 'running') continue;
      const hasRunning = t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running');
      if (!hasRunning) {
        t.status = t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'succeeded') ? 'done' : 'failed';
      }
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();

    // 检查是否还有 running job 需要继续轮询
    const stillRunning = this._tasks.some(t =>
      t.status === 'running' && t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running'),
    );
    if (!stillRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(false);
    }
  }

  /** 轮询单个 job */
  private async _pollOneJob(task: TaskRecord, job: JobRecord): Promise<void> {
    try {
      const resp = await pollResult(this._config.baseUrl, this._config.apiKey, job.jobId);
      this._handlePollResponse(task, job, resp);
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
      if (isTransientError(undefined, msg)) {
        job.errors.push(msg);
      } else {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.errors.push(msg);
      }
    }
  }

  /** 处理轮询响应 */
  private async _handlePollResponse(
    task: TaskRecord,
    job: JobRecord,
    resp: GenerateResponse,
  ): Promise<void> {
    switch (resp.status) {
      case 'succeeded': {
        job.status = 'succeeded';
        if (resp.results) {
          job.results = resp.results;
          // 下载图片
          for (const r of resp.results) {
            try {
              const imgSeq = job.downloadedImages.length + 1;
              const ext = getExtFromUrl(r.url);
              const safeExt = isImageExt(ext) ? ext : 'png';
              const destBase = path.join(task.folderPath, `${task.mdName}-${imgSeq}`);
              await downloadImage(r.url, destBase);
              job.downloadedImages.push(`${task.mdName}-${imgSeq}.${safeExt}`);
            } catch (e: unknown) {
              job.errors.push(e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));
            }
          }
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'failed':
      case 'violation': {
        job.status = resp.status;
        if (resp.error) job.errors.push(resp.error);
        break;
      }
      case 'running': {
        // 仍在运行，更新进度
        job.status = 'running';
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  /** 转换为 UI 用的 TaskInfo 列表 */
  getTaskInfos(): TaskInfo[] {
    return this._tasks.map(t => ({
      taskId: t.taskId,
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      status: t.status,
      jobCount: t.jobs.length,
      doneCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
      failedCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
      startedAt: t.startedAt,
      images: t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages),
      errors: dedupeErrors(t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.errors)),
    }));
  }

  /** 获取所有任务（含已完成）用于持久化 */
  private _getSerializable(): TaskRecord[] {
    return this._tasks;
  }

  /** 持久化到 globalState */
  private async _persist(): Promise<void> {
    await this._context.globalState.update('tasks', this._getSerializable());
  }

  /** 通知 UI */
  private _notifyUI(): void {
    if (this._onChange) {
      this._onChange(this.getTaskInfos());
    }
  }

  /** 清理（扩展停用时调用） */
  dispose(): void {
    this._pollTimer.dispose();
  }
}

```
</details>

```diff
@@ -15,6 +15,38 @@     }

+  /** 全部提交失败 → 删空文件夹 + 弹错误通知 */
+  private _cleanupFailedTask(task: TaskRecord): void {
+    try { fs.rmdirSync(task.folderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
+    const errors = dedupeErrors(task.jobs.flatMap(j => j.errors));
+    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
+      `全部 ${task.jobs.length} 个生成请求均失败:\n${errors.map(e => `  - ${e}`).join('\n')}`,
+    );
+  }
+
+  /** 任务终结 → 弹通知 + 无成图删空文件夹 */
+  private _notifyTaskCompletion(task: TaskRecord): void {
+    const succeeded = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length;
+    const failed = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length;
+
+    if (succeeded > 0 && failed > 0) {
+      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
+        `任务 ${task.folderName} 完成：${succeeded} 张成功，${failed} 个失败。已保存至 ${task.folderName}/`,
+      );
+    } else if (succeeded > 0) {
+      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
+        `任务 ${task.folderName} 完成：${succeeded} 张图片已保存至 ${task.folderName}/`,
+      );
+    } else {
+      // 无成图 → 删空文件夹 + 错误通知
+      try { fs.rmdirSync(task.folderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
+      const errors = dedupeErrors(task.jobs.flatMap(j => j.errors));
+      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
+        `任务 ${task.folderName} 全部失败:\n${errors.map(e => `  - ${e}`).join('\n')}`,
+      );
+    }
+  }
+

     this._pollTimer.dispose();
```

>

> 3. ✓ 单个定时器轮询所有进行中任务 (PollTimer with single interval)
> 4. ✓ 重入锁：下载慢时不会开启重叠轮询 (_isPolling flag in PollTimer)
> 5. ✓ 任务完成后刷新页面/重启 VS Code → 任务列表恢复并继续轮询 (globalState persistence + resume)
> 6. ✓ 超时任务正确标记失败 (isJobTimedOut check in resume)
