<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612093851/src/taskManager.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * 任务管理器（§7）
 *
 * 管理异步生成任务的全生命周期：提交 → 轮询 → 下载 → 持久化 → 续拉。
 * 使用单一 PollTimer 服务所有 running job，globalState 持久化任务列表。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { submitGenerate, pollResult, type ApiConfig, type GenerateResponse } from './apiClient';
import { PollTimer } from './pollTimer';
import { downloadImage } from './downloader';
import { isTransientError, isJobTimedOut, dedupeErrors } from './jobStateMachine';
import { getExtFromUrl, isImageExt } from './imageTypes';
import type { TaskInfo } from './shared';

// ── 可序列化的内部记录 ──

interface JobRecord {
  jobId: string;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  submitTime: number;
  errors: string[];
  results?: { url: string }[];
  downloadedImages: string[];
}

interface TaskRecord {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  model: string;
  status: 'running' | 'done' | 'failed';
  startedAt: number;
  mdName: string;
  jobs: JobRecord[];
  notified: boolean;
}

type ChangeCallback = (tasks: TaskInfo[]) => void;
type TaskCreatedCallback = () => void;

export class TaskManager {
  private _context: vscode.ExtensionContext;
  private _config: ApiConfig;
  private _pollTimer: PollTimer;
  private _tasks: TaskRecord[] = [];
  private _onChange: ChangeCallback | null = null;
  private _onTaskCreated: TaskCreatedCallback | null = null;
  private _sessionStartMs: number;

  constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, config: ApiConfig) {
    this._context = context;
    this._config = config;
    this._sessionStartMs = Date.now();
    this._pollTimer = new PollTimer(() => this._pollAllRunningJobs());
  }

  /** 更新配置（用于配置变更后同步） */
  setConfig(config: ApiConfig): void {
    this._config = config;
  }

  /** 注册 UI 变更回调 */
  setOnChange(cb: ChangeCallback): void {
    this._onChange = cb;
  }

  /** 注册任务创建回调（用于侧栏切到任务标签页） */
  setOnTaskCreated(cb: TaskCreatedCallback): void {
    this._onTaskCreated = cb;
  }

  /** 从 globalState 恢复未完成任务并续拉 */
  async resume(): Promise<void> {
    const stored: TaskRecord[] | undefined = this._context.globalState.get('tasks');
    if (!stored || !Array.isArray(stored)) return;

    let hasRunning = false;

    for (const t of stored) {
      if (t.status === 'done' || t.status === 'failed') {
        this._tasks.push(t);
        continue;
      }
      // 检查每个 job 是否超时 / 未完成提交
      let taskHasRunning = false;
      for (const j of t.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'submitting') {
          // submitting 态无 id → 提交未完成，直接判失败
          j.status = 'failed';
          j.errors.push('提交未完成（扩展在提交阶段被关闭）');
        } else if (j.status === 'running') {
          if (isJobTimedOut(this._sessionStartMs, j.submitTime)) {
            j.status = 'failed';
            j.errors.push('任务超时');
          } else {
            taskHasRunning = true;
            hasRunning = true;
          }
        }
      }
      if (!taskHasRunning) {
        t.status = t.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'failed') ? 'failed' : 'done';
      }
      this._tasks.push(t);
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();
    if (hasRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(true);
    }
  }

  /** 发起一次生成：提交 N 个并发 job，全部异步 */
  async createTask(
    config: ApiConfig,
    prompt: string,
    dataUris: string[],
    folderName: string,
    folderPath: string,
    mdName: string,
  ): Promise<void> {
    const N = Math.max(1, config.concurrency);
    const taskId = folderName;
    const startedAt = Date.now();

    const task: TaskRecord = {
      taskId,
      folderName,
      folderPath,
      model: config.model,
      status: 'running',
      startedAt,
      mdName,
      jobs: [],
      notified: false,
    };

    // 先持久化并通知 UI「提交中」状态
    this._tasks.unshift(task);
    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();

    // 通知侧栏切到任务标签页
    if (this._onTaskCreated) this._onTaskCreated();

    // 并发提交（独立提交，各自处理结果）
    const submitPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
      submitPromises.push(this._submitOneJob(task, config, prompt, dataUris));
    }

    // 等待所有提交完成，然后启动轮询
    await Promise.allSettled(submitPromises);

    // 检查是否有 running job 需要轮询
    const hasRunning = task.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running');
    if (hasRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(true);
    } else {
      // 全部提交失败 → 任务作废
      task.status = 'failed';
      task.notified = true;
      this._cleanupFailedTask(task);
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();
  }

  /** 提交单个 job */
  private async _submitOneJob(
    task: TaskRecord,
    config: ApiConfig,
    prompt: string,
    dataUris: string[],
  ): Promise<void> {
    const job: JobRecord = {
      jobId: '',
      status: 'submitting',
      submitTime: Date.now(),
      errors: [],
      downloadedImages: [],
    };
    task.jobs.push(job);

    try {
      const resp = await submitGenerate(config, prompt, dataUris);
      job.jobId = resp.id;
      job.status = 'running';
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
      job.status = 'failed';
      job.errors.push(msg);
    }
  }

  /** 轮询所有 running job */
  private async _pollAllRunningJobs(): Promise<void> {
    const runningJobs: { task: TaskRecord; job: JobRecord }[] = [];
    for (const t of this._tasks) {
      if (t.status !== 'running') continue;
      for (const j of t.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'running') {
          runningJobs.push({ task: t, job: j });
        }
      }
    }

    if (runningJobs.length === 0) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(false);
      return;
    }

    // 并发轮询所有 job
    await Promise.allSettled(
      runningJobs.map(({ task, job }) => this._pollOneJob(task, job)),
    );

    // 更新各 task 状态，处理完成/失败通知
    for (const t of this._tasks) {
      if (t.status !== 'running') continue;
      const hasRunning = t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running');
      if (!hasRunning) {
        t.status = t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'succeeded') ? 'done' : 'failed';
        if (!t.notified) {
          t.notified = true;
          this._notifyTaskCompletion(t);
        }
      }
    }

    await this._persist();
    this._notifyUI();

    // 检查是否还有 running job 需要继续轮询
    const stillRunning = this._tasks.some(t =>
      t.status === 'running' && t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running'),
    );
    if (!stillRunning) {
      this._pollTimer.setHasRunningJobs(false);
    }
  }

  /** 轮询单个 job */
  private async _pollOneJob(task: TaskRecord, job: JobRecord): Promise<void> {
    try {
      const resp = await pollResult(this._config.baseUrl, this._config.apiKey, job.jobId);
      this._handlePollResponse(task, job, resp);
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
      if (isTransientError(undefined, msg)) {
        job.errors.push(msg);
      } else {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.errors.push(msg);
      }
    }
  }

  /** 处理轮询响应 */
  private async _handlePollResponse(
    task: TaskRecord,
    job: JobRecord,
    resp: GenerateResponse,
  ): Promise<void> {
    switch (resp.status) {
      case 'succeeded': {
        job.status = 'succeeded';
        if (resp.results) {
          job.results = resp.results;
          // 下载图片
          for (const r of resp.results) {
            try {
              const imgSeq = job.downloadedImages.length + 1;
              const ext = getExtFromUrl(r.url);
              const safeExt = isImageExt(ext) ? ext : 'png';
              const destBase = path.join(task.folderPath, `${task.mdName}-${imgSeq}`);
              await downloadImage(r.url, destBase);
              job.downloadedImages.push(`${task.mdName}-${imgSeq}.${safeExt}`);
            } catch (e: unknown) {
              job.errors.push(e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));
            }
          }
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'failed':
      case 'violation': {
        job.status = resp.status;
        if (resp.error) job.errors.push(resp.error);
        break;
      }
      case 'running': {
        // 仍在运行，更新进度
        job.status = 'running';
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  /** 转换为 UI 用的 TaskInfo 列表 */
  getTaskInfos(): TaskInfo[] {
    return this._tasks.map(t => ({
      taskId: t.taskId,
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      status: t.status,
      jobCount: t.jobs.length,
      doneCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
      failedCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
      startedAt: t.startedAt,
      images: t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages),
      errors: dedupeErrors(t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.errors)),
    }));
  }

  /** 获取需要持久化的任务列表（仅进行中任务，已完成任务不持久化） */
  private _getSerializable(): TaskRecord[] {
    return this._tasks.filter(t => t.status === 'running');
  }

  /** 持久化到 globalState */
  private async _persist(): Promise<void> {
    await this._context.globalState.update('tasks', this._getSerializable());
  }

  /** 通知 UI */
  private _notifyUI(): void {
    if (this._onChange) {
      this._onChange(this.getTaskInfos());
    }
  }

  /** 全部提交失败 → 删空文件夹 + 弹错误通知 */
  private _cleanupFailedTask(task: TaskRecord): void {
    try { fs.rmdirSync(task.folderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
    const errors = dedupeErrors(task.jobs.flatMap(j => j.errors));
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
      `全部 ${task.jobs.length} 个生成请求均失败:\n${errors.map(e => `  - ${e}`).join('\n')}`,
    );
  }

  /** 任务终结 → 弹通知 + 无成图删空文件夹 */
  private _notifyTaskCompletion(task: TaskRecord): void {
    const succeeded = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length;
    const failed = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length;

    if (succeeded > 0 && failed > 0) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
        `任务 ${task.folderName} 完成：${succeeded} 张成功，${failed} 个失败。已保存至 ${task.folderName}/`,
      );
    } else if (succeeded > 0) {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
        `任务 ${task.folderName} 完成：${succeeded} 张图片已保存至 ${task.folderName}/`,
      );
    } else {
      // 无成图 → 删空文件夹 + 错误通知
      try { fs.rmdirSync(task.folderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
      const errors = dedupeErrors(task.jobs.flatMap(j => j.errors));
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
        `任务 ${task.folderName} 全部失败:\n${errors.map(e => `  - ${e}`).join('\n')}`,
      );
    }
  }

  /** 清理（扩展停用时调用） */
  dispose(): void {
    this._pollTimer.dispose();
  }
}

```
</details>

/** 前后端共享类型与 postMessage 消息协议（§8.1），两端共用以避免漂移 */

// ── 配置快照 ──
export interface AppConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

// ── 生效 MD 信息 ──
export interface MdInfo {
  fileName: string;
  filePath: string;
}

// ── 素材库（为 M4 预留接口） ──
export interface MaterialLib {
  type: 'auto' | 'manual';
  label: string;
  dirPath: string;
}

// ── 任务（为 M3 预留接口） ──
export interface TaskInfo {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  model: string;
  status: 'running' | 'done' | 'failed';
  jobCount: number;
  doneCount: number;
  failedCount: number;
  startedAt: number;
  images: string[];
  errors: string[];
}

// ── 消息定义 ──

/** 扩展 → Webview */
export type ExtMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; config: AppConfig; md?: MdInfo; tasks: TaskInfo[]; materialLibs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; config: AppConfig }
  | { type: 'activeMdChange'; md?: MdInfo }
  | { type: 'statusMessage'; message: string; isError: boolean }
  | { type: 'tasksUpdate'; tasks: TaskInfo[] }
  | { type: 'materialLibsUpdate'; libs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'switchTab'; tab: string };

/** Webview → 扩展 */
export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'updateConfig'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'generateClick' }
  | { type: 'previewClick' }
  | { type: 'addMaterialFolder' }
  | { type: 'removeMaterialFolder'; path: string };

```markdown
---

## M4 — 素材库

**目标**：工作台可浏览「当前路径」自动素材库与手动添加的素材库，右键缩略图插入 Markdown 引用。

### 产出物

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `src/materialLib.ts` | `scanAutoLibs(mdPath)`: 从工作区根下一层到 MD 所在目录，每层取直接图片（不递归）；`scanManualLib(dirPath)`: 递归扫描（深度 ≤3、条目 ≤500）；共用白名单过滤 |
| `src/markdownInsert.ts` | `insertRefAtCursor(editor, imgPath, mdPath)`: 检查当前编辑器是生效 MD；计算 POSIX 风格相对路径（非 `..` 加 `./`；含空格/括号用 `<>` 包裹）；alt 取文件名去扩展名；构造 `![alt](<relPath>)` 插入光标处；跨盘符警告 |
| `media/components/MaterialLibrary.tsx` | 素材库 UI：分段显示自动/手动库；每库折叠展开；缩略图网格（每行张数 = `workbenchCols`）；左键打开原图、右键插入引用 |

### 关键行为

1. **自动素材库（「当前路径」）**：
   a. 从工作区根目录的下一层开始，到生效 MD 所在目录，每一层为一个库
   b. 每层只取该目录下的直接图片文件（不递归），无图片不显示
   c. MD 不在工作区内 → 为空
   d. 生效 MD 变化时重新扫描

2. **手动素材库**：
   a. 「+ 添加」弹出系统文件夹选择器（`vscode.window.showOpenDialog`）
   b. 选中目录加入列表（去重），每个库可单独移除（x 按钮）
   c. 递归扫描：深度上限 3、条目上限 500
   d. 列表存 `workspaceState`

3. **插入引用**：
   a. 仅当前活动编辑器正是生效 MD 时插入（否则 `showWarningMessage` 后忽略）
   b. 路径 = 相对路径（POSIX 风格），非 `..` 时加 `./` 前缀
   c. 路径含空格/半角括号 → `<>` 包裹（与 §5 解析端兼容）
   d. alt = 文件名去扩展名
   e. 跨盘符无法相对引用 → 警告并放弃

4. `localResourceRoots` 随素材库增删重设（`vscode.WebviewView.webview.options.localResourceRoots`）

5. 缩略图经 `asWebviewUri` 转换后才能在 webview 显示

### 验证清单

- [ ] 自动素材库：工作区根有 a/、a/b/、a/b/c/ 三层，MD 在 c/，显示 b/ 和 c/ 两个库，各含直接图片
- [ ] 无图片的层不显示
- [ ] 手动素材库：添加文件夹 → 显示递归图片（不超 3 层 500 条）
- [ ] 重复添加同一文件夹 → 不重复
- [ ] 移除手动库 → 列表中消失
- [ ] 缩略图右键 → 图片引用插入生效 MD 光标处
- [ ] 非生效 MD 编辑器 → 右键插入 → 警告并忽略
- [ ] 路径含空格 → 插入时 `<>` 包裹
- [ ] 插入的引用在 §5 解析端能正确识别
- [ ] 缩略图左键 → VS Code 打开原图
- [ ] 缩略图每行张数随 `workbenchCols` 配置变化

---

## M5 — 预览请求

**目标**：点击「预览请求」生成预览文档，展示最终 prompt、请求地址、参数、参考图概览，不调 API。

### 产出物
```

```typescript
/**
 * 配置系统（§4）
 *
 * - apiKey 存 VS Code secrets（加密存储），不进 globalState
 * - 其余配置存 globalState，写入按字段合并（patch 语义）
 * - 素材库文件夹列表存 workspaceState（按工作区隔离）
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import type { AppConfig, MaterialLib } from './shared';

const CONFIG_SECTION = 'image-flow';

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: Omit<AppConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
  model: 'nano-banana-2',
  aspectRatio: '3:4',
  imageSize: '1K',
  concurrency: 1,
  workbenchCols: 4,
  tasksCols: 2,
  modelInjections: {},
};

const MODEL_INJECTION_SEEDS: Record<string, string> = {
  'gpt-image-2': '整体画面弱化微小细节，避免过度刻画。',
  'gpt-image-2-vip': '整体画面弱化微小细节，避免过度刻画。',
};

/** 读取完整配置：apiKey 来自 secrets，其余来自 globalState */
export async function getConfig(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<AppConfig> {
  const apiKey = (await context.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey')) || '';
  const stored = context.globalState.get<Partial<AppConfig>>('config') || {};
  return { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...stored, apiKey };
}

/** 更新单个配置字段 */
export async function updateConfigField(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  key: string,
  value: unknown,
): Promise<AppConfig> {
  if (key === 'apiKey') {
    await context.secrets.store('image-flow.apiKey', String(value ?? ''));
  } else {
    const stored = context.globalState.get<Partial<AppConfig>>('config') || {};
    stored[key as keyof Partial<AppConfig>] = value as never;
    await context.globalState.update('config', stored);
  }
  return getConfig(context);
}

/** 读取素材库列表 */
export function getMaterialLibs(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): MaterialLib[] {
  return context.workspaceState.get<MaterialLib[]>('materialLibs') || [];
}

/** 保存素材库列表 */
export async function setMaterialLibs(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  libs: MaterialLib[],
): Promise<void> {
  await context.workspaceState.update('materialLibs', libs);
}

/**
 * 首次激活时补种模型注入提示词（§4.3）。
 * 只补配置中尚不存在的模型键——用户改过（包括清空为空串）后不得再被种子覆盖。
 * 必须在注册侧栏之前调用，保证侧栏首次读取时默认句已可见。
 */
export async function seedModelInjections(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<void> {
  const stored = context.globalState.get<Partial<AppConfig>>('config') || {};
  const injections: Record<string, string> = stored.modelInjections ? { ...stored.modelInjections } : {};

  let changed = false;
  for (const [model, seed] of Object.entries(MODEL_INJECTION_SEEDS)) {
    if (!(model in injections)) {
      injections[model] = seed;
      changed = true;
    }
  }

  if (changed) {
    stored.modelInjections = injections;
    await context.globalState.update('config', stored);
  }
}

/** VSCode 原生配置变更监听：同步 globalState 中没有覆盖的字段（fallback 读） */
export function watchVsCodeConfig(
  onConfigChange: () => void,
): vscode.Disposable {
  return vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(e => {
    if (e.affectsConfiguration(CONFIG_SECTION)) {
      onConfigChange();
    }
  });
}

```
</details>

/** 工作台标签页（§8.3） */

import React from 'react';
import { postMessageToExt } from '../hooks/useVsCodeApi';
import type { AppConfig, MdInfo } from '../../src/shared';

interface Props {
  config: AppConfig;
  md?: MdInfo;
}

const MODEL_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'nano-banana-2', label: 'nano-banana-2' },
  { value: 'nano-banana-pro', label: 'nano-banana-pro' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2', label: 'gpt-image-2' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2-vip', label: 'gpt-image-2-vip' },
];

const RATIO_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1:1', label: '1:1' },
  { value: '16:9', label: '16:9' },
  { value: '9:16', label: '9:16' },
  { value: '4:3', label: '4:3' },
  { value: '3:4', label: '3:4' },
];

const SIZE_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1K', label: '1K' },
  { value: '2K', label: '2K' },
  { value: '4K', label: '4K' },
];

export const WorkbenchTab: React.FC<Props> = ({ config, md }) => {
  const update = (key: string, value: unknown) => {
    postMessageToExt({ type: 'updateConfig', key, value });
  };

  return (
    <div className="workbench-tab">
      {/* 素材库区 —— M4 实现 */}
      <div className="material-section">
        <p className="placeholder-text">素材库（M4 实现）</p>
      </div>

      {/* 底部停靠区 */}
      <div className="workbench-controls">
        {/* 控件行 */}
        <div className="controls-row">
          <label className="control-group">
            <span className="control-label">模型</span>
            <select
              className="control-select"
              value={config.model}
              onChange={e => update('model', e.target.value)}
            >
              {MODEL_OPTIONS.map(o => (
                <option key={o.value} value={o.value}>{o.label}</option>
              ))}
            </select>
          </label>

          <label className="control-group">
            <span className="control-label">分辨率</span>
            <select
              className="control-select"
              value={config.imageSize}
              onChange={e => update('imageSize', e.target.value)}
            >
              {SIZE_OPTIONS.map(o => (
                <option key={o.value} value={o.value}>{o.label}</option>
              ))}
            </select>
          </label>

          <label className="control-group">
            <span className="control-label">比例</span>
            <select
              className="control-select"
              value={config.aspectRatio}
              onChange={e => update('aspectRatio', e.target.value)}
            >
              {RATIO_OPTIONS.map(o => (
                <option key={o.value} value={o.value}>{o.label}</option>
              ))}
            </select>
          </label>

          <label className="control-group control-stepper">
            <span className="control-label">并发数</span>
            <input
              type="number"
              className="control-input"
              min={1}
              max={10}
              value={config.concurrency}
              onChange={e => {
                const v = Math.min(10, Math.max(1, parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 1));
                update('concurrency', v);
              }}
            />
          </label>
        </div>

        {/* 生成行 */}
        <div className="generate-row">
          <span className={md ? 'active-md' : 'active-md none'}>
            {md ? md.fileName : '未打开 Markdown 文件'}
          </span>
          <button
            className="btn btn-secondary"
            onClick={() => postMessageToExt({ type: 'previewClick' })}
          >
            预览请求
          </button>
          <button
            className="btn btn-primary"
            onClick={() => postMessageToExt({ type: 'generateClick' })}
          >
            生成
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* 状态行 */}
        <div className="status-row" id="status-row" />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

```

/** 图片扩展名白名单与 MIME 映射，供所有模块共用 */

export const IMAGE_EXTENSIONS = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg'] as const;

export type ImageExtension = typeof IMAGE_EXTENSIONS[number];

const MIME_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  png: 'image/png',
  jpg: 'image/jpeg',
  jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
  gif: 'image/gif',
  webp: 'image/webp',
  bmp: 'image/bmp',
  svg: 'image/svg+xml',
};

/** 检查扩展名是否在白名单内 */
export function isImageExt(ext: string): ext is ImageExtension {
  return IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext.toLowerCase() as ImageExtension);
}

/** 扩展名 → MIME（不含点号），不在白名单返回空串 */
export function extToMime(ext: string): string {
  const normalized = ext.toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
  return MIME_MAP[normalized] || '';
}

/** 从 URL 或文件路径提取扩展名（不含点号），小写 */
export function getExtFromUrl(url: string): string {
  const match = url.match(/\.([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(?:\?|#|$)/);
  return match ? match[1].toLowerCase() : '';
}

```

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612093851/src/materialLib.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * 素材库扫描（§9）
 *
 * - 自动素材库：从工作区根下一层到 MD 所在目录，每层取直接图片
 * - 手动素材库：递归扫描（深度 ≤3、条目 ≤500）
 */

import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './imageTypes';
import type { MaterialLibImage, MaterialLib } from './shared';

const MANUAL_MAX_DEPTH = 3;
const MANUAL_MAX_ENTRIES = 500;

function isImageFile(name: string): boolean {
  const ext = path.extname(name).toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
  return IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext as typeof IMAGE_EXTENSIONS[number]);
}

/** 扫描单个目录下的直接图片（不递归） */
function scanDirectImages(dirPath: string): MaterialLibImage[] {
  let entries: fs.Dirent[];
  try {
    entries = fs.readdirSync(dirPath, { withFileTypes: true });
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
  return entries
    .filter(e => e.isFile() && isImageFile(e.name))
    .map(e => ({
      absPath: path.join(dirPath, e.name),
      fileName: e.name,
      webviewUri: '', // 由 sidebarProvider 填充
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => a.fileName.localeCompare(b.fileName));
}

/**
 * 自动素材库（「当前路径」）：
 * 从工作区根目录的下一层开始，到 MD 所在目录为止，每一层为一个库。
 * 每层只取直接图片文件（不递归），无图片的层不返回。
 * 返回按路径深度升序排列（靠近工作区根的在前）。
 */
export function scanAutoLibs(workspaceRoot: string, mdPath: string): MaterialLib[] {
  if (!workspaceRoot || !mdPath) return [];
  // 规范化后比较：MD 必须在工作区内
  const root = path.resolve(workspaceRoot);
  const md = path.resolve(mdPath);
  if (!md.startsWith(root + path.sep) && md !== root) return [];

  const libs: MaterialLib[] = [];
  let current = path.dirname(md);

  // 从 MD 所在目录往上，到工作区根的直接子层（不含工作区根本身）
  while (current.startsWith(root + path.sep) || current === root) {
    if (current !== root) {
      const images = scanDirectImages(current);
      if (images.length > 0) {
        libs.unshift({
          type: 'auto',
          label: path.relative(root, current) || path.basename(current),
          dirPath: current,
          images,
        });
      }
    }
    if (current === root) break;
    current = path.dirname(current);
  }

  return libs;
}

/**
 * 手动素材库：递归扫描目录。
 * 深度上限 3、条目上限 500。
 */
export function scanManualLib(dirPath: string): MaterialLibImage[] {
  const results: MaterialLibImage[] = [];
  const resolved = path.resolve(dirPath);

  function walk(dir: string, depth: number): void {
    if (depth > MANUAL_MAX_DEPTH || results.length >= MANUAL_MAX_ENTRIES) return;
    let entries: fs.Dirent[];
    try {
      entries = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
    } catch {
      return;
    }
    // 先收集图片，再递归子目录
    for (const e of entries) {
      if (results.length >= MANUAL_MAX_ENTRIES) return;
      if (e.isFile() && isImageFile(e.name)) {
        results.push({
          absPath: path.join(dir, e.name),
          fileName: e.name,
          webviewUri: '',
        });
      }
    }
    for (const e of entries) {
      if (results.length >= MANUAL_MAX_ENTRIES) return;
      if (e.isDirectory()) {
        walk(path.join(dir, e.name), depth + 1);
      }
    }
  }

  walk(resolved, 0);
  return results.sort((a, b) => a.fileName.localeCompare(b.fileName));
}

```typescript
/**
 * Markdown 图片引用插入（§9.3）
 *
 * - 计算 POSIX 风格相对路径
 * - 含空格/括号用 <> 包裹
 * - alt 取文件名去扩展名
 * - 仅活动编辑器是生效 MD 时才插入
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';

/**
 * 在生效 MD 编辑器光标处插入图片引用。
 * @param imgAbsPath 图片绝对路径
 * @param mdAbsPath 生效 MD 的绝对路径
 */
export async function insertRefAtCursor(
  imgAbsPath: string,
  mdAbsPath: string,
): Promise<void> {
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (!editor || editor.document.uri.fsPath !== mdAbsPath) {
    vscode.window.showWarningMessage('请先打开对应的 Markdown 文件再进行插入');
    return;
  }

  // 跨盘符检测
  const imgParsed = path.parse(imgAbsPath);
  const mdParsed = path.parse(mdAbsPath);
  if (imgParsed.root !== mdParsed.root) {
    vscode.window.showWarningMessage('图片与 Markdown 文件不在同一盘符下，无法生成相对引用');
    return;
  }

  // POSIX 风格相对路径
  const rel = path.posix.relative(
    path.dirname(mdAbsPath).split(path.sep).join('/'),
    imgAbsPath.split(path.sep).join('/'),
  );

  // 非 ".." 开头加 "./" 前缀
  const prefixed = rel.startsWith('..') ? rel : `./${rel}`;

  // 含空格或半角括号 → <> 包裹
  const needsAngle = /[ ()]/.test(prefixed);
  const refPath = needsAngle ? `<${prefixed}>` : prefixed;

  // alt = 文件名去扩展名
  const alt = path.parse(imgAbsPath).name;

  const ref = `![${alt}](${refPath})`;

  await editor.edit(eb => {
    eb.insert(editor.selection.active, ref);
  });
}

```
</details>

/** 素材库面板（§9.4）—— 自动/手动库缩略图网格，左键打开原图，右键插入引用 */

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { postMessageToExt } from '../hooks/useVsCodeApi';
import type { MaterialLib } from '../../src/shared';

interface Props {
  libs: MaterialLib[];
  cols: number;
  hasMd: boolean;
}

export const MaterialLibrary: React.FC<Props> = ({ libs, cols, hasMd }) => {
  const [collapsed, setCollapsed] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({});

  const toggle = (key: string) => {
    setCollapsed(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: !prev[key] }));
  };

  const handleLeftClick = (absPath: string) => {
    postMessageToExt({ type: 'openImage', absPath });
  };

  const handleRightClick = (e: React.MouseEvent, absPath: string) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!hasMd) return;
    postMessageToExt({ type: 'insertImageRef', absPath });
  };

  if (libs.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="material-section">
        <p className="placeholder-text">素材库为空——打开 Markdown 文件后自动显示「当前路径」库，或点击下方按钮手动添加</p>
        <div className="material-actions">
          <button
            className="btn btn-secondary"
            onClick={() => postMessageToExt({ type: 'addMaterialFolder' })}
          >
            + 添加素材库
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="material-section">
      {libs.map((lib, i) => {
        const key = `${lib.type}-${lib.dirPath}`;
        const isCollapsed = collapsed[key] ?? false;

        return (
          <div key={key} className="material-lib">
            <div className="material-lib-header" onClick={() => toggle(key)}>
              <span className="material-lib-caret">{isCollapsed ? '▸' : '▾'}</span>
              <span className="material-lib-label">{lib.label}</span>
              <span className="material-lib-count">{lib.images.length}</span>
              {lib.type === 'manual' && (
                <button
                  className="material-lib-remove"
                  onClick={e => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    postMessageToExt({ type: 'removeMaterialFolder', path: lib.dirPath });
                  }}
                  title="移除此素材库"
                >
                  ×
                </button>
              )}
            </div>
            {!isCollapsed && (
              <div
                className="material-lib-grid"
                style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)` }}
              >
                {lib.images.map(img => (
                  <img
                    key={img.absPath}
                    className="material-thumb"
                    src={img.webviewUri}
                    title={img.fileName}
                    onClick={() => handleLeftClick(img.absPath)}
                    onContextMenu={e => handleRightClick(e, img.absPath)}
                  />
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        );
      })}
      <div className="material-actions">
        <button
          className="btn btn-secondary"
          onClick={() => postMessageToExt({ type: 'addMaterialFolder' })}
        >
          + 添加素材库
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 侧栏 Webview Provider（§8）
 *
 * 管理 webview 生命周期、CSP、localResourceRoots、postMessage 双向通信。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { getConfig, updateConfigField, getMaterialLibs } from './configuration';
import type { ExtMessage, MdInfo, WebviewMessage, TaskInfo } from './shared';

function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  public static readonly viewType = 'image-flow.sidebar';

  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;
  private _currentMd?: MdInfo;
  private _context: vscode.ExtensionContext;
  private _onConfigChange?: () => Promise<void>;

  constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
    this._context = context;
  }

  /** 注册配置变更回调（供 TaskManager 同步配置用） */
  setOnConfigChange(cb: () => Promise<void>): void {
    this._onConfigChange = cb;
  }

  /** 推一条消息到 webview */
  private postMessage(msg: ExtMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  /** 推送当前生效 MD 到 webview */
  setActiveMd(md: MdInfo | undefined): void {
    this._currentMd = md;
    this.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChange', md });
  }

  /** 推送状态消息 */
  showStatus(message: string, isError = false): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'statusMessage', message, isError });
  }

  /** 推送任务列表 */
  updateTasks(tasks: TaskInfo[]): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'tasksUpdate', tasks });
  }

  /** 切换侧栏标签页 */
  switchToTab(tab: string): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'switchTab', tab });
  }

  /** 推送素材库 */
  updateMaterialLibs(): void {
    const libs = getMaterialLibs(this._context);
    this.postMessage({ type: 'materialLibsUpdate', libs });
  }

  /** 更新 localResourceRoots（素材库增删后调用） */
  updateResourceRoots(libPaths: string[]): void {
    if (!this._view) return;
    const workspaceUri = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri;
    const roots: vscode.Uri[] = [];
    if (workspaceUri) roots.push(workspaceUri);
    for (const p of libPaths) {
      roots.push(vscode.Uri.file(p));
    }
    this._view.webview.options = {
      ...this._view.webview.options,
      localResourceRoots: roots,
    };
  }

  async resolveWebviewView(
    webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,
    _context: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,
    _token: vscode.CancellationToken,
  ): Promise<void> {
    this._view = webviewView;

    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri ?? vscode.Uri.file('/')],
    };

    const nonce = getNonce();
    const sidebarJsUri = webviewView.webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.file(path.join(this._context.extensionPath, 'media', 'sidebar.js')),
    );
    const sidebarCssUri = webviewView.webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.file(path.join(this._context.extensionPath, 'media', 'sidebar.css')),
    );
    const cspSource = webviewView.webview.cspSource;

    webviewView.webview.html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}' ${cspSource};
                 style-src ${cspSource} 'unsafe-inline';
                 img-src ${cspSource} data:;
                 font-src ${cspSource};">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${sidebarCssUri}">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarJsUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;

    // 监听 webview 消息
    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(
      (msg: WebviewMessage) => { this.handleMessage(msg); },
    );
  }

  private async handleMessage(msg: WebviewMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        const config = await getConfig(this._context);
        const libs = getMaterialLibs(this._context);
        this.postMessage({
          type: 'init',
          config,
          md: this._currentMd,
          tasks: [],
          materialLibs: libs,
        });
        break;
      }
      case 'updateConfig': {
        // 「获取 API Key →」链接：用系统浏览器打开
        if (msg.key === 'openExternal') {
          await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(String(msg.value)));
          break;
        }
        const newConfig = await updateConfigField(this._context, msg.key, msg.value);
        // 推送完整最新配置回 webview
        this.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', config: newConfig });
        // 通知 TaskManager 同步配置
        if (this._onConfigChange) await this._onConfigChange();
        break;
      }
      case 'generateClick': {
        await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.generateImage');
        break;
      }
      case 'previewClick': {
        await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.previewRequest');
        break;
      }
      case 'addMaterialFolder': {
        // M4 实现
        break;
      }
      case 'removeMaterialFolder': {
        // M4 实现
        break;
      }
    }
  }
}

```
</details>

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612093851/src/sidebarProvider.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * 侧栏 Webview Provider（§8, §9）
 *
 * 管理 webview 生命周期、CSP、localResourceRoots、postMessage 双向通信。
 * M4：素材库扫描、webview URI 转换、插入引用、打开原图。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { getConfig, updateConfigField, getMaterialLibs, setMaterialLibs } from './configuration';
import { scanAutoLibs, scanManualLib } from './materialLib';
import { insertRefAtCursor } from './markdownInsert';
import type { ExtMessage, MdInfo, WebviewMessage, TaskInfo, MaterialLib, MaterialLibImage } from './shared';

function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  public static readonly viewType = 'image-flow.sidebar';

  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;
  private _currentMd?: MdInfo;
  private _context: vscode.ExtensionContext;
  private _onConfigChange?: () => Promise<void>;

  constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
    this._context = context;
  }

  /** 注册配置变更回调（供 TaskManager 同步配置用） */
  setOnConfigChange(cb: () => Promise<void>): void {
    this._onConfigChange = cb;
  }

  /** 推一条消息到 webview */
  private postMessage(msg: ExtMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  /** 推送当前生效 MD 到 webview，同时重扫素材库 */
  setActiveMd(md: MdInfo | undefined): void {
    this._currentMd = md;
    this.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChange', md });
    // MD 变化时重扫自动素材库
    this.pushMaterialLibs();
  }

  /** 推送状态消息 */
  showStatus(message: string, isError = false): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'statusMessage', message, isError });
  }

  /** 推送任务列表 */
  updateTasks(tasks: TaskInfo[]): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'tasksUpdate', tasks });
  }

  /** 切换侧栏标签页 */
  switchToTab(tab: string): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'switchTab', tab });
  }

  /** 扫描并推送素材库（自动 + 手动），含 webview URI 转换 */
  pushMaterialLibs(): void {
    if (!this._view) return;
    const libs = this.scanAllLibs();
    // 转换 webview URI
    for (const lib of libs) {
      for (const img of lib.images) {
        img.webviewUri = this._view.webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(img.absPath)).toString();
      }
    }
    this.postMessage({ type: 'materialLibsUpdate', libs });
  }

  /** 收集全部素材库（自动 + 手动），不含 webview URI */
  private scanAllLibs(): MaterialLib[] {
    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath || '';
    const mdPath = this._currentMd?.filePath || '';

    // 自动素材库
    const autoLibs = scanAutoLibs(workspaceRoot, mdPath);

    // 手动素材库：从 workspaceState 读取，扫描图片
    const storedLibs = getMaterialLibs(this._context);
    const manualLibs: MaterialLib[] = [];
    for (const sl of storedLibs) {
      const images = scanManualLib(sl.dirPath);
      manualLibs.push({
        type: 'manual',
        label: sl.label,
        dirPath: sl.dirPath,
        images,
      });
    }

    return [...autoLibs, ...manualLibs];
  }

  /** 收集所有素材库根路径（用于 localResourceRoots） */
  private allLibPaths(): string[] {
    const paths: string[] = [];
    for (const lib of this.scanAllLibs()) {
      paths.push(lib.dirPath);
    }
    return paths;
  }

  /** 更新 localResourceRoots（素材库增删后调用） */
  private updateResourceRoots(): void {
    if (!this._view) return;
    const workspaceUri = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri;
    const roots: vscode.Uri[] = [];
    if (workspaceUri) roots.push(workspaceUri);
    for (const p of this.allLibPaths()) {
      roots.push(vscode.Uri.file(p));
    }
    this._view.webview.options = {
      ...this._view.webview.options,
      localResourceRoots: roots,
    };
  }

  async resolveWebviewView(
    webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,
    _context: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,
    _token: vscode.CancellationToken,
  ): Promise<void> {
    this._view = webviewView;

    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri ?? vscode.Uri.file('/')],
    };

    const nonce = getNonce();
    const sidebarJsUri = webviewView.webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.file(path.join(this._context.extensionPath, 'media', 'sidebar.js')),
    );
    const sidebarCssUri = webviewView.webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.file(path.join(this._context.extensionPath, 'media', 'sidebar.css')),
    );
    const cspSource = webviewView.webview.cspSource;

    webviewView.webview.html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}' ${cspSource};
                 style-src ${cspSource} 'unsafe-inline';
                 img-src ${cspSource} data:;
                 font-src ${cspSource};">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${sidebarCssUri}">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarJsUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;

    // 监听 webview 消息
    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(
      (msg: WebviewMessage) => { this.handleMessage(msg); },
    );

    // 初始化 localResourceRoots
    this.updateResourceRoots();
  }

  private async handleMessage(msg: WebviewMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        const config = await getConfig(this._context);
        this.postMessage({
          type: 'init',
          config,
          md: this._currentMd,
          tasks: [],
          materialLibs: [], // webview 初始化后由 pushMaterialLibs 推送
        });
        // 此时 _view 已就绪，推送含 webview URI 的素材库
        this.pushMaterialLibs();
        break;
      }
      case 'updateConfig': {
        // 「获取 API Key →」链接：用系统浏览器打开
        if (msg.key === 'openExternal') {
          await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(String(msg.value)));
          break;
        }
        const newConfig = await updateConfigField(this._context, msg.key, msg.value);
        // 推送完整最新配置回 webview
        this.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', config: newConfig });
        // 通知 TaskManager 同步配置
        if (this._onConfigChange) await this._onConfigChange();
        break;
      }
      case 'generateClick': {
        await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.generateImage');
        break;
      }
      case 'previewClick': {
        await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.previewRequest');
        break;
      }
      case 'addMaterialFolder': {
        const folders = await vscode.window.showOpenDialog({
          canSelectFolders: true,
          canSelectFiles: false,
          canSelectMany: false,
          openLabel: '添加素材库',
        });
        if (!folders || folders.length === 0) break;
        const dirPath = folders[0].fsPath;
        const existing = getMaterialLibs(this._context);
        // 去重
        if (existing.some(l => l.dirPath === dirPath)) break;
        existing.push({
          type: 'manual',
          label: path.basename(dirPath),
          dirPath,
          images: [],
        });
        await setMaterialLibs(this._context, existing);
        this.updateResourceRoots();
        this.pushMaterialLibs();
        break;
      }
      case 'removeMaterialFolder': {
        const existing = getMaterialLibs(this._context);
        const filtered = existing.filter(l => l.dirPath !== msg.path);
        if (filtered.length !== existing.length) {
          await setMaterialLibs(this._context, filtered);
          this.updateResourceRoots();
          this.pushMaterialLibs();
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'insertImageRef': {
        if (!this._currentMd) {
          vscode.window.showWarningMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          break;
        }
        await insertRefAtCursor(msg.absPath, this._currentMd.filePath);
        break;
      }
      case 'openImage': {
        const doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument(vscode.Uri.file(msg.absPath));
        await vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc, { preview: true });
        break;
      }
    }
  }
}

```

/* ── 素材库区 ── */
.material-section {

  background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border);

  resize: vertical;
}

}

/* ── 任务列表 ── */
.tasks-tab {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;

}

.task-card {
  background: var(--vscode-editor-background);

}

  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.task-folder {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;

  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.task-badge {
  font-size: 10px;
  padding: 1px 6px;
  border-radius: 8px;

}

}

Actually no, keep it for safety — it ensures roots are set even if pushMaterialLibs hasn't been called yet (e.g., no MD open, no manual libs). Actually, the path is already set in the options constructor. Let me keep it — it's harmless.
> 
> Let me also check if there's an issue with the `handleMessage` case 'init' calling `pushMaterialLibs` — at that point `_view` is set (from `resolveWebviewView`), so it should work.
> 
> Let me also think about the `addMaterialFolder` and `removeMaterialFolder` handlers. They call:
> 1. `updateResourceRoots()` — this is now redundant since `pushMaterialLibs` calls it
> 2. `pushMaterialLibs()` — this will call `updateResourceRoots` again

> Actually, let me keep them for now — the double call is idempotent and cheap. The important thing is correctness.
> 
> Wait, one more issue: in `handleMessage` case 'init', I'm calling `pushMaterialLibs()`. But previously the init handler also pushed materialLibs in the init message itself (via `getMaterialLibs`). Now I'm sending empty materialLibs in the init message and immediately pushing the full data via `materialLibsUpdate`. This means the webview will:
> 1. Receive `init` with `materialLibs: []`
> 2. Set state: `setMaterialLibs([])`
> 3. Receive `materialLibsUpdate` with full data
> 4. Set state: `setMaterialLibs(fullLibs)`
> 
> This works, but there's a brief flash of empty state. For a VS Code extension, this should be fine — it's nearly instant.
> 
> Let me now think about one more edge case in the MaterialLibrary component: the `hasMd` prop. I'm passing `!!md` to determine if right-click insert should work. But the MaterialLibrary component uses `hasMd` as a check before sending the insert message. This is correct — if there's no MD, right-click does nothing.
> 
> But wait, there's a subtle issue: the WorkbenchTab receives `md` but the MaterialLibrary doesn't know about `md`. The `hasMd` prop is the right bridge.
>

## M5 — 预览请求

**目标**：点击「预览请求」生成预览文档，展示最终 prompt、请求地址、参数、参考图概览，不调 API。

### 产出物

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `src/previewProvider.ts` | `generatePreview()`: 走与提交完全相同的解析+拼装管线，构造请求体后不调 API，生成四段文本 → 打开临时文档 |
| `src/promptAssembler.ts` | 抽取 M1/M3 的 prompt 拼装逻辑为独立函数 `assemblePrompt(mdContent, model, workspaceRoot)`（M6 会加入注入和 IMAGES.md），提交与预览共用 |

### 关键行为

1. `previewRequest` 触发后：
   a. 校验当前有生效 MD（否则提示）
   b. 读取 MD 内容 → 解析参考图 → 组装 prompt（与真实提交完全一致，共用 `assemblePrompt`）
   c. 构造完整请求体 JSON
   d. 生成预览文本，四段：
      - 「## 最终提示词」：完整 prompt（含注入，单独成段不转义）
      - 「## 请求地址」：`POST {baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`
      - 「## 请求参数」：请求体 JSON，剔除 `prompt` 和 `images` 字段
      - 「## 参考图」：每张 `imageN: data URI 前 48 字符…（总长度）`，无参考图则注明「无」
   e. 以 `untitled` scheme 打开预览文档，语言模式设为 markdown

### 验证清单

- [ ] 无生效 MD → 提示
- [ ] 预览文档四段齐全
- [ ] 请求参数不含 `prompt` 和 `images`
- [ ] 参考图概览格式：`image1: data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAA…（总长度 12345）`
- [ ] 无参考图时标注「无」
- [ ] 预览不消耗 API 额度（不调 POST generate）
- [ ] 与 M6 注入功能合并后，预览也展示注入后的完整 prompt

---

## M6 — 提示词注入

**目标**：模型注入句 + IMAGES.md 功能生效，提交与预览两处均反映注入。

### 产出物

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `src/injectionManager.ts` | `getInjectionForModel(model)`: 读取 modelInjections 配置，返回该模型的注入句（无则空串）；`seedDefaults()`: 首次激活时补种子（不覆盖已有键，含空串） |
| `src/promptAssembler.ts` | 扩展 `assemblePrompt`：最终 prompt = `[模型注入句]` + `[IMAGES.md 全文]` + `[替换后正文]`，空行连接，空段省略 |

### 关键行为

1. **首次激活种入**（已在 M2 中预埋）：
```

> import { getConfig } from './configuration';
> import { assemblePrompt } from './promptAssembler';
> import { readRefImages } from './markdownParser';

> import type { AppConfig } from './shared';

> export async function generatePreview(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<void> {
>   const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
>   if (!editor || path.extname(editor.document.fileName) !== '.md') {
>     vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
>     return;
>   }
> 
>   const config = await getConfig(context);
>   const mdContent = editor.document.getText();

>     dataUris = readRefImages(mdDir, refs);

>     return;
>   }
>

>     model: config.model,
>     prompt,
>     images: dataUris,
>     aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
>     imageSize: config.imageSize,
>   });
> 
>   // 四段预览文本

> 
>   // 1. 最终提示词
>   sections.push('## 最终提示词\n\n' + prompt);
> 
>   // 2. 请求地址

> 
>   // 3. 请求参数（剔除 prompt 和 images）
>   const paramsForDisplay: Record<string, unknown> = {};

>     if (k !== 'prompt' && k !== 'images') {
>       paramsForDisplay[k] = v;
>     }
>   }

> 
>   // 4. 参考图
>   if (dataUris.length === 0) {
>     sections.push('## 参考图\n\n无');
>   } else {
>     const refLines = dataUris.map((uri, i) => {
>       const preview = uri.length > 48 ? uri.substring(0, 48) + '…' : uri;
>       return `image${i + 1}: ${preview}（总长度 ${uri.length}）`;
>     });
>     sections.push('## 参考图\n\n' + refLines.join('\n'));
>   }
> 
>   const previewText = sections.join('\n\n');
> 
>   // 打开为 untitled 文档，语言模式 markdown
>   const doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({ content: previewText, language: 'markdown' });
>   await vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc, { preview: false });
> }
> ```

```typescript
/**
 * Markdown 解析与参考图处理（§5）
 *
 * - 匹配 ![alt](路径) 与 ![alt](<路径>) 两种写法
 * - 引用按首次出现顺序去重编号
 * - 正文中替换为 [imageN](文件名去扩展名)
 * - 参考图读取失败时中断并列出全部失败路径
 */

import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { extToMime } from './imageTypes';

/** 单条参考图信息 */
export interface RefImage {
  /** 序号，从 1 开始 */
  seq: number;
  /** 原始引用路径（Markdown 中写的） */
  rawPath: string;
  /** 去掉尖括号后的实际文件路径 */
  filePath: string;
  /** 文件名去扩展名 */
  nameWithoutExt: string;
}

/** 解析结果 */
export interface ParseResult {
  /** 替换后的正文 */
  body: string;
  /** 去重后的参考图列表 */
  refs: RefImage[];
}

/** 去除尖括号包裹 */
function unwrapAngle(uri: string): string {
  if (uri.startsWith('<') && uri.endsWith('>')) {
    return uri.slice(1, -1);
  }
  return uri;
}

/** 文件名去扩展名 */
function stripExt(filename: string): string {
  const parsed = path.parse(filename);
  return parsed.name;
}

/** 匹配 ![alt](路径) 或 ![alt](<路径>) */
const IMAGE_SYNTAX_RE = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\((<[^>]+>|[^)]+)\)/g;

/**
 * 解析 Markdown 正文，提取参考图引用。
 * 同一路径首次出现时分配新序号，后续复用。
 *
 * 两趟扫描：第一趟收集去重引用并分配序号，第二趟统一替换。
 */
export function parseMarkdown(content: string): ParseResult {
  const refs: RefImage[] = [];
  const pathToSeq = new Map<string, number>();

  // 第一趟：收集引用，按首次出现顺序去重编号
  let match: RegExpExecArray | null;
  const regex = new RegExp(IMAGE_SYNTAX_RE.source, 'g');
  while ((match = regex.exec(content)) !== null) {
    const rawPath = match[2];
    const filePath = unwrapAngle(rawPath);
    if (!pathToSeq.has(filePath)) {
      const seq = refs.length + 1;
      pathToSeq.set(filePath, seq);
      refs.push({
        seq,
        rawPath,
        filePath,
        nameWithoutExt: stripExt(path.basename(filePath)),
      });
    }
  }

  // 第二趟：替换所有图片语法为 [imageN](文件名去扩展名)
  const body = content.replace(new RegExp(IMAGE_SYNTAX_RE.source, 'g'), (_full, _alt, rawPath) => {
    const filePath = unwrapAngle(rawPath);
    const seq = pathToSeq.get(filePath)!;
    const nameWithoutExt = stripExt(path.basename(filePath));
    return `[image${seq}](${nameWithoutExt})`;
  });

  return { body, refs };
}

/**
 * 读取参考图文件并转为 base64 data URI。
 * 任一读取失败 → 抛出含全部失败路径的 Error，不返回部分结果。
 */
export function readRefImages(mdDir: string, refs: RefImage[]): string[] {
  const dataUris: string[] = [];
  const failures: string[] = [];

  for (const ref of refs) {
    const absPath = path.resolve(mdDir, ref.filePath);
    try {
      const buf = fs.readFileSync(absPath);
      const ext = path.extname(absPath).replace('.', '');
      const mime = extToMime(ext) || 'image/png';
      const b64 = buf.toString('base64');
      dataUris.push(`data:${mime};base64,${b64}`);
    } catch {
      failures.push(ref.filePath);
    }
  }

  if (failures.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败:\n${failures.map(f => `  - ${f}`).join('\n')}`);
  }

  return dataUris;
}

```
</details>

/**
 * Prompt 拼装器（§10）
 *
 * 提交与预览共用的 prompt 拼装入口。M5 只做解析，M6 加入注入与 IMAGES.md。
 */

import { parseMarkdown, type RefImage } from './markdownParser';

export interface AssembledPrompt {
  body: string;
  refs: RefImage[];
}

export function assemblePrompt(
  mdContent: string,
  _model: string,
  _workspaceRoot: string,
): AssembledPrompt {
  const parsed = parseMarkdown(mdContent);
  return { body: parsed.body, refs: parsed.refs };
}

```

```typescript
/**
 * 预览请求（§10）
 *
 * 走与真实提交完全相同的解析+拼装管线，构造请求体但不调 API，
 * 生成四段预览文档以 untitled scheme 打开。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { getConfig } from './configuration';
import { assemblePrompt } from './promptAssembler';
import { readRefImages } from './markdownParser';
import { buildGenerateBody } from './apiClient';

export async function generatePreview(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<void> {
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (!editor || path.extname(editor.document.fileName) !== '.md') {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
    return;
  }

  const config = await getConfig(context);
  const mdContent = editor.document.getText();
  const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath || '';

  const { body: prompt, refs } = assemblePrompt(mdContent, config.model, workspaceRoot);

  const mdDir = path.dirname(editor.document.uri.fsPath);
  let dataUris: string[];
  try {
    dataUris = readRefImages(mdDir, refs);
  } catch (e: unknown) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`参考图读取失败: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    return;
  }

  // 构造请求体（与真实提交完全一致）
  const reqBody = buildGenerateBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt,
    images: dataUris,
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
  });

  // 四段预览文本
  const sections: string[] = [];

  // 1. 最终提示词
  sections.push(`## 最终提示词\n\n${prompt}`);

  // 2. 请求地址
  sections.push(`## 请求地址\n\n\`POST ${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate\``);

  // 3. 请求参数（剔除 prompt 和 images）
  const paramsForDisplay: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(reqBody)) {
    if (k !== 'prompt' && k !== 'images') {
      paramsForDisplay[k] = v;
    }
  }
  sections.push(`## 请求参数\n\n\`\`\`json\n${JSON.stringify(paramsForDisplay, null, 2)}\n\`\`\``);

  // 4. 参考图
  if (dataUris.length === 0) {
    sections.push('## 参考图\n\n无');
  } else {
    const refLines = dataUris.map((uri, i) => {
      const preview = uri.length > 48 ? `${uri.substring(0, 48)}…` : uri;
      return `image${i + 1}: ${preview}（总长度 ${uri.length}）`;
    });
    sections.push(`## 参考图\n\n${refLines.join('\n')}`);
  }

  const previewText = sections.join('\n\n');

  const doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({ content: previewText, language: 'markdown' });
  await vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc, { preview: false });
}

```
</details>

// ── 核心生成命令 ──

async function handleGenerateImage(uri?: vscode.Uri) {
  const mdUri = uri || (vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri);
  if (!mdUri || path.extname(mdUri.fsPath) !== '.md') {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开或右键一个 Markdown 文件');
    return;
  }

  if (!taskManager) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('扩展尚未就绪，请稍后重试');
    return;
  }

  const config = await getConfigForGenerate();
  if (!config.apiKey) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在设置中配置 API Key');
    return;
  }

  const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
  const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');

  if (!content.trim()) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('内容为空：Markdown 文件无有效内容');
    return;
  }

## M6 — 提示词注入

**目标**：模型注入句 + IMAGES.md 功能生效，提交与预览两处均反映注入。

### 产出物

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `src/injectionManager.ts` | `getInjectionForModel(model)`: 读取 modelInjections 配置，返回该模型的注入句（无则空串）；`seedDefaults()`: 首次激活时补种子（不覆盖已有键，含空串） |
| `src/promptAssembler.ts` | 扩展 `assemblePrompt`：最终 prompt = `[模型注入句]` + `[IMAGES.md 全文]` + `[替换后正文]`，空行连接，空段省略 |

### 关键行为

1. **首次激活种入**（已在 M2 中预埋）：
   a. 读取当前 modelInjections 配置
   b. 检查 gpt-image-2 / gpt-image-2-vip 键是否存在（含空串为已存在）
   c. 只补不存在的键，写入「整体画面弱化微小细节，避免过度刻画。」
   d. nano-banana 系列不补种子

2. **IMAGES.md 注入**：
   a. 生成时从工作区根目录读取 `IMAGES.md` 全文
   b. 不存在/为空/无工作区 → 静默跳过
   c. 拼在注入句之后、正文之前，空行连接

3. **生成时最终 prompt 顺序**：`注入句` + `\n\n` + `IMAGES.md` + `\n\n` + `正文`，空段省略

4. **预览请求同步走同一拼装管线**

### 验证清单

- [ ] gpt-image-2 有默认注入句，nano-banana-2 无
- [ ] 用户清空 gpt-image-2 注入句 → 重启 → 不被种子恢复
- [ ] 工作区根有 IMAGES.md → 生成时 prompt 含其内容
- [ ] IMAGES.md 为空 → 静默跳过
- [ ] 无工作区 → 静默跳过（IMAGES.md 注入不阻断）
- [ ] 预览请求的最终 prompt 含注入句和 IMAGES.md
- [ ] 设置页可编辑各模型注入句，即时保存

---

## M7 — 体验打磨

**目标**：侧栏交互流畅——后台建卡、进度条动画、逐秒计时、MD 跟随、任务/历史列表。

### 产出物

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `media/components/TasksTab.tsx` | 重写：进行中与历史合并为一条倒序列表（按文件夹名排序）；进行中卡片默认展开（含进度条 + 计时器），历史卡片默认收起 |
| `media/components/ProgressBar.tsx` | 聚合进度条组件 |
```

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> Now I understand the full M6 requirements. Let me plan:
> 
> 1. **`src/injectionManager.ts`** — `getInjectionForModel(model)`: reads modelInjections config from globalState, returns the injection text for that model (empty string if none). `seedDefaults` is already in `configuration.ts` as `seedModelInjections`.
> 
> 2. **Update `src/promptAssembler.ts`** — Extend `assemblePrompt` to:
>    - Get injection text for the model
>    - Read IMAGES.md from workspace root
>    - Concatenate: injection + IMAGES.md + body, separated by blank lines, skip empty parts
>    - Still return { body, refs }
> 
> 3. The `assemblePrompt` function currently takes `(mdContent, _model, _workspaceRoot)`. Now the `_model` and `_workspaceRoot` params become active.
> 
> Let me implement:
> 
> ### `src/injectionManager.ts`:
> ```typescript
> import * as vscode from 'vscode';
> 
> export function getInjectionForModel(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, model: string): string {
>   const config = context.globalState.get<{ modelInjections?: Record<string, string> }>('config');
>   return config?.modelInjections?.[model] || '';
> }
> ```
> 
> Wait, but `assemblePrompt` doesn't have access to `vscode.ExtensionContext`. It takes `_model` and `_workspaceRoot` as strings. The injection text needs to come from somewhere.
> 
> Looking at the design: `assemblePrompt` is called from both `handleGenerateImage` (in extension.ts) and `generatePreview` (in previewProvider.ts). Both have access to `context` or config.
> 
> Options:
> 1. Pass the injection text as a parameter to `assemblePrompt`
> 2. Make `assemblePrompt` accept an optional injection text
> 3. Pass the full config to `assemblePrompt`
> 
> Looking at the spec: `assemblePrompt(mdContent, model, workspaceRoot)`. The model and workspaceRoot are passed, but not the config. For M6, I need to extend this to somehow get the injection text.
> 
> I think the cleanest approach is to add an optional `injection` parameter to `assemblePrompt`:
> ```typescript
> export function assemblePrompt(
>   mdContent: string,
>   model: string,
>   workspaceRoot: string,
>   injection?: string,
> ): AssembledPrompt {
> ```
> 
> But this changes the signature from the plan. The plan says `assemblePrompt(mdContent, model, workspaceRoot)`. The injection reading could happen inside `assemblePrompt` if it had access to the config.
> 
> Actually, `assemblePrompt` is a pure function that runs in the extension host (Node.js). It doesn't need `vscode.ExtensionContext` — it just needs the injection text. Let me add it as a `getInjection` callback or just pass it directly.
> 
> Simplest approach: `getInjectionForModel` takes an `AppConfig` and model name, extracts the injection. Then `assemblePrompt` takes the injection text as an optional 4th parameter. Both callers (extension.ts and previewProvider.ts) read the config, get the injection, and pass it.
> 
> Actually, even simpler: `getInjectionForModel` can be a pure function that takes the modelInjections record and model name:
> 
> ```typescript
> export function getInjectionForModel(modelInjections: Record<string, string>, model: string): string {
>   return modelInjections[model] || '';
> }
> ```
> 
> No need for ExtensionContext. The callers read the config and pass modelInjections.
> 
> Let me implement this.

/**
 * Prompt 拼装器（§10）
 *
 * 提交与预览共用的 prompt 拼装入口。M5 只做解析，M6 加入注入与 IMAGES.md。
 */

import { parseMarkdown, type RefImage } from './markdownParser';

export interface AssembledPrompt {
  body: string;
  refs: RefImage[];
}

export function assemblePrompt(
  mdContent: string,
  _model: string,
  _workspaceRoot: string,
): AssembledPrompt {
  const parsed = parseMarkdown(mdContent);
  return { body: parsed.body, refs: parsed.refs };
}

```typescript
  const contentBytes = await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri);
  const content = Buffer.from(contentBytes).toString('utf-8');

  if (!content.trim()) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('内容为空：Markdown 文件无有效内容');
    return;
  }

  const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath || '';
  const assembled = assemblePrompt(content, config.model, workspaceRoot);
  const prompt = assembled.body;

  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  let dataUris: string[];
  try {
    dataUris = readRefImages(mdDir, assembled.refs);
  } catch (e: unknown) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(e instanceof Error ? e.message : '参考图读取失败');
    return;
  }
  const mdName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

  const taskFolderName = nextTaskFolderName();
  const taskFolderPath = path.join(mdDir, taskFolderName);
  fs.mkdirSync(taskFolderPath, { recursive: true });

  // 推一条状态消息到侧栏
  sidebarProvider?.showStatus(`正在提交 ${config.concurrency} 个任务到 ${config.model}…`);

  try {
    await taskManager.createTask(config, prompt, dataUris, taskFolderName, taskFolderPath, mdName);
  } catch (e: unknown) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`任务提交失败: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    try { fs.rmdirSync(taskFolderPath, { recursive: true }); } catch { /* ignore */ }
  }
```

`02:17:27`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612093851/src/promptAssembler.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * Prompt 拼装器（§10, §11）
 *
 * 提交与预览共用的 prompt 拼装入口。
 * M5：解析 Markdown → body + refs
 * M6：注入句 + IMAGES.md + 正文拼接
 */

import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdown, type RefImage } from './markdownParser';

export interface AssembledPrompt {
  body: string;
  refs: RefImage[];
}

/**
 * 拼装最终 prompt：
 *   [模型注入句]\n\n[IMAGES.md 全文]\n\n[替换后正文]
 * 空段省略。
 */
export function assemblePrompt(
  mdContent: string,
  _model: string,
  workspaceRoot: string,
  injection?: string,
): AssembledPrompt {
  const parsed = parseMarkdown(mdContent);

  // 读取 IMAGES.md（不存在/为空/无工作区 → 静默跳过）
  let imagesMdContent = '';
  if (workspaceRoot) {
    const imagesMdPath = path.join(workspaceRoot, 'IMAGES.md');
    try {
      const raw = fs.readFileSync(imagesMdPath, 'utf-8').trim();
      if (raw) imagesMdContent = raw;
    } catch {
      // 文件不存在 → 静默跳过
    }
  }

  // 拼接：注入句 + IMAGES.md + 正文，空段省略
  const parts: string[] = [];
  if (injection) parts.push(injection);
  if (imagesMdContent) parts.push(imagesMdContent);
  parts.push(parsed.body);

  return { body: parts.join('\n\n'), refs: parsed.refs };
}

```
</details>

```markdown
## M7 — 体验打磨

**目标**：侧栏交互流畅——后台建卡、进度条动画、逐秒计时、MD 跟随、任务/历史列表。

### 产出物

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `media/components/TasksTab.tsx` | 重写：进行中与历史合并为一条倒序列表（按文件夹名排序）；进行中卡片默认展开（含进度条 + 计时器），历史卡片默认收起 |
| `media/components/ProgressBar.tsx` | 聚合进度条组件 |
| `media/hooks/useElapsedTime.ts` | 逐秒自增的计时 hook（格式 `mm:ss` / `h:mm:ss`） |
| `src/activeMdTracker.ts` | 监听 `vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor`：当前为 `.md` 则更新生效 MD；非 `.md` 保留上一个不清空；生效 MD 变化时 push 更新到 webview；右键触发时目标 MD 成为生效 MD 并聚焦侧栏 |

### 关键行为

1. **后台建卡**（M3 已实现，M7 确保 UI 侧体验丝滑）：
   a. 点击生成 → 任务卡片即时出现，按钮显示「生成中…」并禁用
   b. 全部提交失败 → 卡片消失 + 通知

2. **进行中卡片**：
   a. 标题：`文件夹名（模型）· 生成中 done/N · 失败 n · mm:ss`
   b. 聚合进度条 + 百分比：每 job 占 1/N，终结=满分，running=远端进度，submitting=0
   c. 已下载图片缩略图（随 job 完成实时出现）
   d. 状态文案：「正在提交 n 个请求…」「还有 n 张正在生成…」+ 错误列表
   e. 计时器每秒自增（基于真实提交时间），格式 `mm:ss`（超 1 小时 `h:mm:ss`）

3. **历史卡片**：
   a. 标题：`文件夹名（n 张）`
   b. 扫描生效 MD 同级 `task-*` 文件夹内图片，倒序
   c. **排除进行中任务的文件夹**，无图片不列出
   d. 缩略图点击用 VS Code 打开原图

4. **任务完成瞬间防闪烁**：
   a. 先把完成图并入历史列表
   b. 再移除进行中卡片

5. **生效 MD 跟随**：
   a. 活动编辑器切到 `.md` → 更新生效 MD
   b. 切到非 `.md` → 保留上一个，不清空
   c. 生效 MD 变化时刷新历史与自动素材库
   d. 生效 MD 未变化不重扫

6. **侧栏状态行**：显示最近操作结果/错误消息（错误红色）

### 验证清单

- [ ] 点击生成 → 任务卡片立即出现 → 不等待网络
- [ ] 生成中按钮禁用，文字为「生成中…」
- [ ] 进度条：全 submitting → 0%；混合态 → 正确均摊；全部完成 → 100%
- [ ] 计时器每秒自增
- [ ] 进行中卡片可折叠/展开
- [ ] 完成后卡片移入历史（无闪烁）
- [ ] 历史列表不出现进行中任务的文件夹
- [ ] 历史列表不出现无图片文件夹
- [ ] 切到 `.md` → 侧栏显示该文件信息
- [ ] 切到 `.txt` → 侧栏保留上一个 MD
- [ ] 生效 MD 变化 → 历史、自动素材库刷新
- [ ] 右键触发 → 目标 MD 成为生效 MD → 侧栏聚焦
- [ ] 状态行正确显示最近操作结果

---

## M8 — 健壮性收尾

**目标**：响应校验、错误分类、边界情况、测试补齐。

### 产出物

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `src/validators.ts` | `validateGenerateResponse()` + `validatePollResponse()`: 运行时校验 status 枚举、id 存在性、results 数组、error 字段形状，不裸断言 |
| `src/errorClassifier.ts` | `isTransientError(statusCode, errorMessage)`: 5xx/429/abort/fetch failed → true；其余 → false |
| `src/constants.ts` | 提取魔数：`POLL_INTERVAL_MS=4000`、`JOB_TIMEOUT_MS=600000`、`REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS=30000`、`MATERIAL_SCAN_MAX_DEPTH=3`、`MATERIAL_SCAN_MAX_ITEMS=500` |
| `test/markdownParser.test.ts` | 解析与替换：普通、`<>` 包裹（含空格/括号）、重复引用编号、编号与顺序、空内容 |
| `test/progressCalc.test.ts` | 聚合进度：全 submitting=0、混合态、全部终结=100 |
| `test/errorClassifier.test.ts` | 瞬时/非瞬时判定：5xx/429/abort/fetch failed → 瞬时；格式错误 → 非瞬时 |
| `test/pixelTable.test.ts` | 比例+分辨率 → 像素值查表，边界（超 3840、非 16 倍数、超长宽比） |
| `test/previewProvider.test.ts` | 组装预览文本：剔除 prompt/images、参考图概览格式（含「无」情况） |

### 关键行为
```
</details>

> This is a big milestone. Let me break it down:
> 
> **M7 requirements:**
> 
> 1. **TasksTab rewrite** — merge in-progress and history into one reverse-chronological list
>    - Running cards: expanded by default, show progress bar + timer + image thumbnails
>    - History cards: collapsed by default, show folder name and image count
>    - History excludes running task folders and empty (no-image) folders
> 
> 2. **ProgressBar component** — aggregated progress: each job = 1/N, running=remote progress, submitting=0, done=100
>

> For M7, I think the simplest approach is:
> - submitting jobs: progress = 0
> - running jobs: progress = 0 (we don't have granular progress)
> - succeeded jobs: progress = 100
> - failed jobs: progress = 100 (they're done)

> So for a task with N jobs: `progressPercent = (doneCount + failedCount) / jobCount * 100`

> But the current display shows `doneCount` as succeeded only and `failedCount` separately. Let me adjust: progress = `(doneCount + failedCount) / jobCount * 100`.

```typescript
/** 逐秒自增计时 hook（§12.2）—— 格式 mm:ss，超 1 小时 h:mm:ss */

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';

export function useElapsedTime(startedAt: number, isRunning: boolean): string {
  const [tick, setTick] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isRunning) return;
    const timer = setInterval(() => setTick(t => t + 1), 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [isRunning]);

  const elapsed = Math.max(0, Date.now() - startedAt + tick * 0); // tick 仅驱动重渲染
  const secs = Math.floor(elapsed / 1000);
  const mins = Math.floor(secs / 60);
  const hours = Math.floor(mins / 60);

  const pad = (n: number) => String(n).padStart(2, '0');
  if (hours > 0) return `${hours}:${pad(mins % 60)}:${pad(secs % 60)}`;
  return `${pad(mins)}:${pad(secs % 60)}`;
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/** 逐秒自增计时 hook（§12.2）—— 格式 mm:ss，超 1 小时 h:mm:ss */

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';

function formatElapsed(ms: number): string {
  const secs = Math.floor(ms / 1000);
  const mins = Math.floor(secs / 60);
  const hours = Math.floor(mins / 60);
  const pad = (n: number) => String(n).padStart(2, '0');
  if (hours > 0) return `${hours}:${pad(mins % 60)}:${pad(secs % 60)}`;
  return `${pad(mins)}:${pad(secs % 60)}`;
}

export function useElapsedTime(startedAt: number, isRunning: boolean): string {
  const [elapsed, setElapsed] = useState(() => Date.now() - startedAt);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isRunning) return;
    const timer = setInterval(() => setElapsed(Date.now() - startedAt), 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [isRunning, startedAt]);

  return formatElapsed(Math.max(0, elapsed));
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/** 聚合进度条（§12.2）—— 终结=满分，running/submitting=0 */

import React from 'react';

interface Props {
  jobCount: number;
  doneCount: number;
  failedCount: number;
}

export const ProgressBar: React.FC<Props> = ({ jobCount, doneCount, failedCount }) => {
  if (jobCount === 0) return null;
  const terminal = doneCount + failedCount;
  const pct = Math.round((terminal / jobCount) * 100);

  return (
    <div className="progress-bar">
      <div className="progress-fill" style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} />
    </div>
  );
};

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 侧栏 Webview Provider（§8, §9）
 *
 * 管理 webview 生命周期、CSP、localResourceRoots、postMessage 双向通信。
 * M4：素材库扫描、webview URI 转换、插入引用、打开原图。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { getConfig, updateConfigField, getMaterialLibs, setMaterialLibs } from './configuration';
import { scanAutoLibs, scanManualLib } from './materialLib';
import { insertRefAtCursor } from './markdownInsert';
import type { ExtMessage, MdInfo, WebviewMessage, TaskInfo, MaterialLib } from './shared';

function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  public static readonly viewType = 'image-flow.sidebar';

  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;
  private _currentMd?: MdInfo;
  private _context: vscode.ExtensionContext;
  private _onConfigChange?: () => Promise<void>;

  constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
    this._context = context;
  }

  /** 注册配置变更回调（供 TaskManager 同步配置用） */
  setOnConfigChange(cb: () => Promise<void>): void {
    this._onConfigChange = cb;
  }

  /** 推一条消息到 webview */
  private postMessage(msg: ExtMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  /** 推送当前生效 MD 到 webview，同时重扫素材库 */
  setActiveMd(md: MdInfo | undefined): void {
    this._currentMd = md;
    this.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChange', md });
    // MD 变化时重扫自动素材库
    this.pushMaterialLibs();
  }

  /** 推送状态消息 */
  showStatus(message: string, isError = false): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'statusMessage', message, isError });
  }

  /** 推送任务列表 */
  updateTasks(tasks: TaskInfo[]): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'tasksUpdate', tasks });
  }

  /** 切换侧栏标签页 */
  switchToTab(tab: string): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'switchTab', tab });
  }

  /** 扫描并推送素材库（自动 + 手动），含 webview URI 转换 */
  pushMaterialLibs(): void {
    if (!this._view) return;
    // 先更新 localResourceRoots，确保 asWebviewUri 能覆盖所有路径
    this.updateResourceRoots();
    const libs = this.scanAllLibs();
    // 转换 webview URI
    for (const lib of libs) {
      for (const img of lib.images) {
        img.webviewUri = this._view.webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(img.absPath)).toString();
      }
    }
    this.postMessage({ type: 'materialLibsUpdate', libs });
  }

  /** 收集全部素材库（自动 + 手动），不含 webview URI */
  private scanAllLibs(): MaterialLib[] {
    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath || '';
    const mdPath = this._currentMd?.filePath || '';

    // 自动素材库
    const autoLibs = scanAutoLibs(workspaceRoot, mdPath);

    // 手动素材库：从 workspaceState 读取，扫描图片
    const storedLibs = getMaterialLibs(this._context);
    const manualLibs: MaterialLib[] = [];
    for (const sl of storedLibs) {
      const images = scanManualLib(sl.dirPath);
      manualLibs.push({
        type: 'manual',
        label: sl.label,
        dirPath: sl.dirPath,
        images,
      });
    }

    return [...autoLibs, ...manualLibs];
  }

  /** 收集所有素材库根路径（用于 localResourceRoots） */
  private allLibPaths(): string[] {
    const paths: string[] = [];
    for (const lib of this.scanAllLibs()) {
      paths.push(lib.dirPath);
    }
    return paths;
  }

  /** 更新 localResourceRoots（素材库增删后调用） */
  private updateResourceRoots(): void {
    if (!this._view) return;
    const workspaceUri = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri;
    const roots: vscode.Uri[] = [];
    if (workspaceUri) roots.push(workspaceUri);
    for (const p of this.allLibPaths()) {
      roots.push(vscode.Uri.file(p));
    }
    this._view.webview.options = {
      ...this._view.webview.options,
      localResourceRoots: roots,
    };
  }

  async resolveWebviewView(
    webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,
    _context: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,
    _token: vscode.CancellationToken,
  ): Promise<void> {
    this._view = webviewView;

    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri ?? vscode.Uri.file('/')],
    };

    const nonce = getNonce();
    const sidebarJsUri = webviewView.webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.file(path.join(this._context.extensionPath, 'media', 'sidebar.js')),
    );
    const sidebarCssUri = webviewView.webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.file(path.join(this._context.extensionPath, 'media', 'sidebar.css')),
    );
    const cspSource = webviewView.webview.cspSource;

    webviewView.webview.html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}' ${cspSource};
                 style-src ${cspSource} 'unsafe-inline';
                 img-src ${cspSource} data:;
                 font-src ${cspSource};">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${sidebarCssUri}">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarJsUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;

    // 监听 webview 消息
    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(
      (msg: WebviewMessage) => { this.handleMessage(msg); },
    );

    // 初始化 localResourceRoots
    this.updateResourceRoots();
  }

  private async handleMessage(msg: WebviewMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        const config = await getConfig(this._context);
        this.postMessage({
          type: 'init',
          config,
          md: this._currentMd,
          tasks: [],
          materialLibs: [], // webview 初始化后由 pushMaterialLibs 推送
        });
        // 此时 _view 已就绪，推送含 webview URI 的素材库
        this.pushMaterialLibs();
        break;
      }
      case 'updateConfig': {
        // 「获取 API Key →」链接：用系统浏览器打开
        if (msg.key === 'openExternal') {
          await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(String(msg.value)));
          break;
        }
        const newConfig = await updateConfigField(this._context, msg.key, msg.value);
        // 推送完整最新配置回 webview
        this.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', config: newConfig });
        // 通知 TaskManager 同步配置
        if (this._onConfigChange) await this._onConfigChange();
        break;
      }
      case 'generateClick': {
        await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.generateImage');
        break;
      }
      case 'previewClick': {
        await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.previewRequest');
        break;
      }
      case 'addMaterialFolder': {
        const folders = await vscode.window.showOpenDialog({
          canSelectFolders: true,
          canSelectFiles: false,
          canSelectMany: false,
          openLabel: '添加素材库',
        });
        if (!folders || folders.length === 0) break;
        const dirPath = folders[0].fsPath;
        const existing = getMaterialLibs(this._context);
        // 去重
        if (existing.some(l => l.dirPath === dirPath)) break;
        existing.push({
          type: 'manual',
          label: path.basename(dirPath),
          dirPath,
          images: [],
        });
        await setMaterialLibs(this._context, existing);
        this.updateResourceRoots();
        this.pushMaterialLibs();
        break;
      }
      case 'removeMaterialFolder': {
        const existing = getMaterialLibs(this._context);
        const filtered = existing.filter(l => l.dirPath !== msg.path);
        if (filtered.length !== existing.length) {
          await setMaterialLibs(this._context, filtered);
          this.updateResourceRoots();
          this.pushMaterialLibs();
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'insertImageRef': {
        if (!this._currentMd) {
          vscode.window.showWarningMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          break;
        }
        await insertRefAtCursor(msg.absPath, this._currentMd.filePath);
        break;
      }
      case 'openImage': {
        const doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument(vscode.Uri.file(msg.absPath));
        await vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc, { preview: true });
        break;
      }
    }
  }
}

```
</details>

### 🤖 Assistant: *Now add the `pushHistory` method after `pushMaterialLibs…*

`02:20:26`

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> Now add the `pushHistory` method. Let me add it after `pushMaterialLibs`:
</details>

> Now add the `pushHistory` method after `pushMaterialLibs`:

#### ✏️  Edit `sidebarProvider.ts`

`02:20:33`

```diff
@@ -7,3 +7,53 @@     }
     this.postMessage({ type: 'materialLibsUpdate', libs });
   }
+
+  /** 扫描生效 MD 同级 task-* 历史文件夹，推送到 webview */
+  pushHistory(): void {
+    if (!this._view || !this._currentMd) return;
+    const mdDir = path.dirname(this._currentMd.filePath);
+    let entries: fs.Dirent[];
+    try {
+      entries = fs.readdirSync(mdDir, { withFileTypes: true });
+    } catch {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const isImage = (name: string): boolean => {
+      const ext = path.extname(name).toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
+      return IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext as typeof IMAGE_EXTENSIONS[number]);
+    };
+
+    const folders: HistoryFolder[] = [];
+
+    for (const e of entries) {
+      if (!e.isDirectory() || !e.name.startsWith('task-')) continue;
+      // 排除运行中任务
+      if (this._runningTaskIds.has(e.name)) continue;
+
+      const folderPath = path.join(mdDir, e.name);
+      let imgEntries: fs.Dirent[];
+      try {
+        imgEntries = fs.readdirSync(folderPath, { withFileTypes: true });
+      } catch {
+        continue;
+      }
+
+      const images: HistoryImage[] = imgEntries
+        .filter(f => f.isFile() && isImage(f.name))
+        .map(f => ({
+          fileName: f.name,
+          absPath: path.join(folderPath, f.name),
+          webviewUri: this._view!.webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(path.join(folderPath, f.name))).toString(),
+        }))
+        .sort((a, b) => a.fileName.localeCompare(b.fileName));
+
+      if (images.length === 0) continue; // 无图片不列出
+
+      folders.push({ folderName: e.name, folderPath, images });
+    }
+
+    // 倒序（最新的在前）
+    folders.sort((a, b) => b.folderName.localeCompare(a.folderName));
+    this.postMessage({ type: 'historyUpdate', folders });
+  }
```
