### 🤖 Assistant: *\*\*Step 5\*\*: Fix MD tracking in `extension…*

`02:20:43`

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> **Step 5**: Fix `extension.ts` — MD tracking to not clear on non-.md. Let me update `extractMdInfo` to keep the previous MD when switching to non-.md.
> 
> Currently:
> ```typescript
> function extractMdInfo(editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined): MdInfo | undefined {
>   if (!editor) return undefined;
>   if (path.extname(editor.document.fileName) !== '.md') return undefined;
>   return { ... };
> }
> 
> function startTrackingActiveMd(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
>   const update = (editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined) => {
>     const md = extractMdInfo(editor);
>     sidebarProvider?.setActiveMd(md);
>   };
>   update(vscode.window.activeTextEditor);
>   ...
> }
> ```
> 
> The issue: when switching to non-.md, `extractMdInfo` returns undefined, and `setActiveMd(undefined)` is called, which clears the active MD.
> 
> Fix: Don't call `setActiveMd` when the new MD is undefined (i.e., non-.md file or no editor). Only update when we have a valid MD.
> 
> But what about the initial state? If the user opens VS Code with a .txt file active, we still want to initialize with `undefined`. But after that, switching to non-.md should keep the previous MD.
> 
> The simplest approach: store the last valid MD and only update when we have a new valid MD.
> 
> ```typescript
> let lastMd: MdInfo | undefined;
> 
> function startTrackingActiveMd(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
>   const update = (editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined) => {
>     const md = extractMdInfo(editor);
>     if (md) {
>       lastMd = md;
>       sidebarProvider?.setActiveMd(md);
>     }
>     // 非 MD → 不更新，保留上一个
>   };
>   // 初始化
>   const initial = extractMdInfo(vscode.window.activeTextEditor);
>   if (initial) lastMd = initial;
>   sidebarProvider?.setActiveMd(initial);
>   ...
> }
> ```
> 
> But wait, the initial call with `undefined` is needed so the sidebar shows "未打开 Markdown 文件". The spec says: "切到 `.txt` → 侧栏保留上一个 MD" — so it only applies AFTER the first MD has been set.
> 
> Let me adjust: on initial call, always set (even undefined). On subsequent calls, only set if it's a valid MD.
</details>

> **Step 5**: Fix MD tracking in `extension.ts` to not clear on non-.md:

```diff
+  let initialized = false;
+
   const update = (editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined) => {
     const md = extractMdInfo(editor);
-    sidebarProvider?.setActiveMd(md);
+    // 首次调用（含 undefined）直接设置，后续仅 .md 文件更新
+    if (!initialized || md) {
+      sidebarProvider?.setActiveMd(md);
+    }
+    initialized = true;
   };
 
   // 初始化
```

```typescript
/** 任务标签页（§12）—— 进行中 + 历史合并倒序列表 */

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { postMessageToExt } from '../hooks/useVsCodeApi';
import { useElapsedTime } from '../hooks/useElapsedTime';
import { ProgressBar } from './ProgressBar';
import type { TaskInfo, HistoryFolder } from '../../src/shared';

interface Props {
  tasks: TaskInfo[];
  history: HistoryFolder[];
}

function statusLabel(status: TaskInfo['status']): string {
  switch (status) {
    case 'running': return '进行中';
    case 'done': return '已完成';
    case 'failed': return '失败';
  }
}

const TaskCard: React.FC<{ task: TaskInfo }> = ({ task }) => {
  const [collapsed, setCollapsed] = useState(false);
  const elapsed = useElapsedTime(task.startedAt, task.status === 'running');
  const total = task.jobCount;
  const terminal = task.doneCount + task.failedCount;
  const remaining = total - terminal;

  return (
    <div key={task.taskId} className={`task-card status-${task.status}`}>
      <div className="task-card-header" onClick={() => setCollapsed(!collapsed)}>
        <span className="task-caret">{collapsed ? '▸' : '▾'}</span>
        <span className="task-folder" title={task.folderName}>
          {task.folderName}（{task.model}）
        </span>
        <span className={`task-badge badge-${task.status}`}>{statusLabel(task.status)}</span>
        {task.status === 'running' && <span className="task-timer">{elapsed}</span>}
      </div>

      {!collapsed && (
        <div className="task-card-body">
          {/* 进度信息 */}
          {total > 0 && (
            <div className="task-progress-row">
              <ProgressBar jobCount={total} doneCount={task.doneCount} failedCount={task.failedCount} />
              <span className="progress-text">
                {remaining > 0 ? `还有 ${remaining} 张正在生成…` : ''}
                {terminal}/{total}{task.failedCount > 0 ? `（${task.failedCount} 失败）` : ''}
              </span>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* 已下载图片 */}
          {task.images.length > 0 && (
            <div className="task-thumbnails">
              {task.images.map((img, i) => (
                <span key={i} className="task-image-name">{img}</span>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* 错误列表 */}
          {task.errors.length > 0 && (
            <ul className="task-errors">
              {task.errors.map((err, i) => (
                <li key={i}>{err}</li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

const HistoryCard: React.FC<{ folder: HistoryFolder }> = ({ folder }) => {
  const [collapsed, setCollapsed] = useState(true);

  return (
    <div key={folder.folderName} className="task-card status-done">
      <div className="task-card-header" onClick={() => setCollapsed(!collapsed)}>
        <span className="task-caret">{collapsed ? '▸' : '▾'}</span>
        <span className="task-folder" title={folder.folderName}>
          {folder.folderName}（{folder.images.length} 张）
        </span>
        <span className="task-badge badge-done">已完成</span>
      </div>

      {!collapsed && (
        <div className="task-card-body">
          <div className="task-thumbnails history-grid">
            {folder.images.map(img => (
              <img
                key={img.absPath}
                className="history-thumb"
                src={img.webviewUri}
                title={img.fileName}
                onClick={() => postMessageToExt({ type: 'openImage', absPath: img.absPath })}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export const TasksTab: React.FC<Props> = ({ tasks, history }) => {
  const hasContent = tasks.length > 0 || history.length > 0;

  if (!hasContent) {
    return (
      <div className="tasks-tab">
        <p className="placeholder-text">暂无任务——在编辑区右键 Markdown 文件选择「生成图片」</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="tasks-tab">
      {/* 进行中任务（已按倒序排列） */}
      {tasks.map(task => (
        <TaskCard key={task.taskId} task={task} />
      ))}
      {/* 历史任务 */}
      {history.map(folder => (
        <HistoryCard key={folder.folderName} folder={folder} />
      ))}
    </div>
  );
};

```
</details>

```typescript
/** 侧栏 Webview 入口（§8）—— React 19 单页应用，Radix UI Tabs */

import React, { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';
import { postMessageToExt } from './hooks/useVsCodeApi';
import { WorkbenchTab } from './components/WorkbenchTab';
import { TasksTab } from './components/TasksTab';
import { SettingsTab } from './components/SettingsTab';
import type { AppConfig, ExtMessage, MdInfo, TaskInfo, MaterialLib } from '../src/shared';

const App: React.FC = () => {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<AppConfig | null>(null);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('workbench');
  const [md, setMd] = useState<MdInfo | undefined>();
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<TaskInfo[]>([]);
  const [materialLibs, setMaterialLibs] = useState<MaterialLib[]>([]);
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<{ message: string; isError: boolean } | null>(null);

  const handleMessage = useCallback((e: MessageEvent<ExtMessage>) => {
    const msg = e.data;
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init':
        setConfig(msg.config);
        setMd(msg.md);
        setTasks(msg.tasks);
        setMaterialLibs(msg.materialLibs);
        break;
      case 'configUpdate':
        setConfig(prev => prev ? { ...prev, ...msg.config } : null);
        break;
      case 'activeMdChange':
        setMd(msg.md);
        break;
      case 'statusMessage':
        setStatus({ message: msg.message, isError: msg.isError });
        // 5 秒后自动清除
        setTimeout(() => setStatus(null), 5000);
        break;
      case 'tasksUpdate':
        setTasks(msg.tasks);
        break;
      case 'materialLibsUpdate':
        setMaterialLibs(msg.libs);
        break;
      case 'switchTab':
        setActiveTab(msg.tab);
        break;
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    window.addEventListener('message', handleMessage);
    // 挂载后发 init
    postMessageToExt({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handleMessage);
  }, [handleMessage]);

  // 暂未收到配置 → loading
  if (!config) {
    return <div className="loading">加载中...</div>;
  }

  return (
    <Tabs.Root
      className="tabs-root"
      value={activeTab}
      onValueChange={setActiveTab}
    >
      <Tabs.List className="tabs-list" aria-label="标签页">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="workbench">
          工作台
        </Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="tasks">
          任务
        </Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="settings">
          设置
        </Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="workbench">
        <WorkbenchTab config={config} md={md} materialLibs={materialLibs} />
      </Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="tasks">
        <TasksTab tasks={tasks} />
      </Tabs.Content>
      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="settings">
        <SettingsTab config={config} />
      </Tabs.Content>

      {/* 全局状态行 */}
      {status && (
        <div className={`global-status ${status.isError ? 'error' : ''}`}>
          {status.message}
        </div>
      )}
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
};

const rootEl = document.getElementById('root');
if (rootEl) {
  createRoot(rootEl).render(<App />);
}

```

> One more issue: the `pushHistory` condition `if (!this._view || !this._currentMd) return;` will suppress history push on init if there's no active MD yet. That's fine — if no MD is open, there's nothing to scan.
> 
> But wait, when the webview first loads and there IS an active MD (e.g., the user had a .md file open before opening the sidebar), `_currentMd` should already be set because `startTrackingActiveMd` runs before `resolveWebviewView` in the activation flow. Let me verify...
> 
> In `activate`:
> 1. `seedModelInjections` 
> 2. Register sidebarProvider (but resolveWebviewView is called later when sidebar opens)
> 3. `startTrackingActiveMd` — this calls `sidebarProvider.setActiveMd(initial)` where `initial` may be set if there's an active .md editor
> 4. Create TaskManager, resume
> 5. Register commands
> 
> So by the time the sidebar opens and `resolveWebviewView` is called, `_currentMd` should be set if there's an active .md. Then the init message handler calls `pushHistory` which scans correctly.
> 
> But if there's no MD open when the sidebar first loads, `_currentMd` is undefined, and pushHistory returns early. That's fine — when the user later opens a .md file, `setActiveMd` will be called and pushHistory will fire.
> 
> Let me also verify that `pushHistory` doesn't have issues with `asWebviewUri` when the MD directory isn't in localResourceRoots. The workspace root is always in localResourceRoots, and the MD is within the workspace. So `asWebviewUri` should work.
> 
> Actually, wait — history task-* folders are in the same directory as the MD. The `localResourceRoots` includes the workspace root. If the workspace root is `/home/user/project/`, and the MD is at `/home/user/project/docs/file.md`, then the task folders are at `/home/user/project/docs/task-*`. The `asWebviewUri` with the workspace root in localResourceRoots should handle any path within the workspace.

> The user wants me to implement M8 (Robustness Finalization) and also fix a bug in M7: the progress bar doesn't animate during task execution — it only jumps to 100% when the task completes.
> 
> Let me first understand the progress bar issue. Looking at the current `ProgressBar` component:
> 
> ```tsx
> export const ProgressBar: React.FC<Props> = ({ jobCount, doneCount, failedCount }) => {
>   if (jobCount === 0) return null;
>   const terminal = doneCount + failedCount;
>   const pct = Math.round((terminal / jobCount) * 100);
>   ...
> };
> ```
> 
> It only counts `doneCount + failedCount` — both are terminal states. While jobs are `running` or `submitting`, they don't contribute to progress. The progress only updates when a job transitions to `succeeded` or `failed`.
> 
> The spec says: "聚合进度条 + 百分比：每 job 占 1/N，终结=满分，running=远端进度，submitting=0"
> 
> So the issue is that `running` jobs should contribute their API-reported `progress` value. Currently, `TaskInfo` has `doneCount` and `failedCount` but no per-job progress. I need to:
> 
> 1. Track per-job progress from API responses (the `GenerateResponse.progress` field)
> 2. Expose it in `TaskInfo` 
> 3. Use it in the `ProgressBar`
> 
> Let me re-read the M8 section to understand what needs to be done.
> 
> Actually, let me first read the full M8 section from the implementation plan, then fix the progress bug, then implement M8.

```typescript
  /** 轮询单个 job */
  private async _pollOneJob(task: TaskRecord, job: JobRecord): Promise<void> {
    try {
      const resp = await pollResult(this._config.baseUrl, this._config.apiKey, job.jobId);
      this._handlePollResponse(task, job, resp);
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
      if (isTransientError(undefined, msg)) {
        job.errors.push(msg);
      } else {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.errors.push(msg);
      }
    }
  }
```

### 🤖 Assistant: *问题明确了：`JobRecord` 没有 `progress` 字段，轮询 `running…*

`02:24:53`

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> Now I see the problem clearly:
> 
> 1. `JobRecord` has no `progress` field to store the API-reported progress
> 2. `_handlePollResponse` for `case 'running'` doesn't store `resp.progress` (line 297-300: just sets `job.status = 'running'`)
> 3. `getTaskInfos()` only reports `doneCount` and `failedCount` — no running job progress info
> 4. `TaskInfo` has no field for aggregate progress
> 5. `ProgressBar` only uses `doneCount + failedCount`
> 
> The fix:
> 1. Add `progress` field to `JobRecord` (0-100 from API)
> 2. Store `resp.progress` in `_handlePollResponse` case 'running'
> 3. Add `progress` to `TaskInfo` — aggregate progress across all jobs
> 4. Update `ProgressBar` to use the aggregate progress
> 
> The aggregate progress formula: 
> - Each job contributes 1/N to the total
> - succeeded/failed jobs: contribute 1/N (100%)
> - running jobs: contribute (progress/100) * (1/N) 
> - submitting jobs: contribute 0
> 
> Total = (doneCount/N) + (failedCount/N) + sum(runningProgress/100 * 1/N)
>      = (doneCount + failedCount + avgRunningProgress/100) / N * 100... no wait.
> 
> Let me compute differently:
> - Total possible = N * 100 (each job max 100%)
> - Current = succeeded*100 + failed*100 + sum(running progress) + submitting*0
> - Progress percentage = current / (N * 100) * 100 = current / N
> 
> So: `progress = ((doneCount + failedCount) * 100 + sumRunningProgress) / jobCount`
> 
> Let me implement this.
> 
> Now for M8, let me re-read the full section:
</details>

`02:24:55`

*(lines 369–429)*

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612093851/implementation-plan.md</code></summary>

```markdown
## M8 — 健壮性收尾

**目标**：响应校验、错误分类、边界情况、测试补齐。

### 产出物

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `src/validators.ts` | `validateGenerateResponse()` + `validatePollResponse()`: 运行时校验 status 枚举、id 存在性、results 数组、error 字段形状，不裸断言 |
| `src/errorClassifier.ts` | `isTransientError(statusCode, errorMessage)`: 5xx/429/abort/fetch failed → true；其余 → false |
| `src/constants.ts` | 提取魔数：`POLL_INTERVAL_MS=4000`、`JOB_TIMEOUT_MS=600000`、`REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS=30000`、`MATERIAL_SCAN_MAX_DEPTH=3`、`MATERIAL_SCAN_MAX_ITEMS=500` |
| `test/markdownParser.test.ts` | 解析与替换：普通、`<>` 包裹（含空格/括号）、重复引用编号、编号与顺序、空内容 |
| `test/progressCalc.test.ts` | 聚合进度：全 submitting=0、混合态、全部终结=100 |
| `test/errorClassifier.test.ts` | 瞬时/非瞬时判定：5xx/429/abort/fetch failed → 瞬时；格式错误 → 非瞬时 |
| `test/pixelTable.test.ts` | 比例+分辨率 → 像素值查表，边界（超 3840、非 16 倍数、超长宽比） |
| `test/previewProvider.test.ts` | 组装预览文本：剔除 prompt/images、参考图概览格式（含「无」情况） |

### 关键行为

1. **响应运行时校验**（贯穿所有 API 调用）：
   a. status 必须为 `running | succeeded | failed | violation`
   b. `id` 必须存在且为 string
   c. `results` 存在时必须为数组，每项含 `url` string
   d. `error` 存在时必须为 string
   e. 不匹配 → 视为格式异常 → 判失败

2. **瞬时错误重试**：
   a. 5xx、429、fetch failed、abort → 保持 running，下轮重试
   b. 格式异常、VPN/代理错误（非 HTTP 层）→ 直接判失败

3. **空文件夹清理**：任务终结时无任何成图 → 删除任务文件夹

4. **轮询重入锁**：已在 M3 实现，M8 确保稳定性

5. **纯函数抽取与测试**：
   a. markdownParser 的解析与替换函数为纯函数
   b. 进度计算为纯函数
   c. 错误分类为纯函数
   d. 像素查表为纯函数
   e. 预览文本组装为纯函数

### 验证清单

- [ ] `npm run check-types`（两次 tsc）通过
- [ ] `npm run lint` 通过
- [ ] `npm run compile` 通过
- [ ] `npm run test` 全部通过（5 个测试文件至少覆盖 spec §12 所列场景）
- [ ] 响应格式异常 → 任务判失败（不死循环重试）
- [ ] HTTP 5xx → 保持 running，下轮重试
- [ ] 轮询重入锁无误（高负载下载不触发重叠轮询）
- [ ] 空文件夹在任务无成图时被正确删除
- [ ] 任务超时 10 分钟 → 标记失败
- [ ] 图片下载扩展名不在白名单 → 回退 png
- [ ] F5 运行时检查（compile/check-types/lint/test 四检全绿）

---

## 跨里程碑关注点

### 文件结构终态
```
</details>

#### 👀 Read `ProgressBar.tsx`

`02:25:39`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612093851/media/components/ProgressBar.tsx</code></summary>

```typescript
/** 聚合进度条（§12.2）—— 终结=满分，running/submitting=0 */

import React from 'react';

interface Props {
  jobCount: number;
  doneCount: number;
  failedCount: number;
}

export const ProgressBar: React.FC<Props> = ({ jobCount, doneCount, failedCount }) => {
  if (jobCount === 0) return null;
  const terminal = doneCount + failedCount;
  const pct = Math.round((terminal / jobCount) * 100);

  return (
    <div className="progress-bar">
      <div className="progress-fill" style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} />
    </div>
  );
};

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 响应运行时校验（§13）
 *
 * 校验 generate 提交与 poll 轮询的返回结构。
 * 格式异常 → 抛出 Error（由上层按非瞬时错误处理）。
 */

import type { GenerateResponse } from './apiClient';

export function validateGenerateResponse(json: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  return validateResponse(json);
}

export function validatePollResponse(json: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  return validateResponse(json);
}

function validateResponse(json: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (!json || typeof json !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('API 返回非 JSON 对象');
  }
  const obj = json as Record<string, unknown>;
  if (typeof obj.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('API 返回缺少 id 字段');
  }
  const status = obj.status;
  if (status !== 'running' && status !== 'violation' && status !== 'succeeded' && status !== 'failed') {
    throw new Error(`API 返回未知状态: ${String(status)}`);
  }
  const result: GenerateResponse = {
    id: obj.id,
    status: status as GenerateResponse['status'],
  };
  if (Array.isArray(obj.results)) {
    result.results = (obj.results as unknown[]).filter(
      (r): r is { url: string } =>
        typeof r === 'object' && r !== null && typeof (r as Record<string, unknown>).url === 'string',
    );
  }
  if (typeof obj.progress === 'number') result.progress = obj.progress;
  if (typeof obj.error === 'string') result.error = obj.error;
  return result;
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * Grsai API 调用层（§6）
 *
 * M3：使用 replyType: 'async' 异步提交 + 轮询结果。
 */

import { getPixelSize } from './pixelTable';
import { REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS } from './jobStateMachine';

/** API 生成请求参数 */
export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
}

/** 生成 / 轮询响应 */
export interface GenerateResponse {
  id: string;
  status: 'running' | 'violation' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';
  results?: { url: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

/** 配置快照 */
export interface ApiConfig {
  baseUrl: string;
  apiKey: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
}

function isNanoBanana(model: string): boolean {
  return model.startsWith('nano-banana');
}

/**
 * 构造请求体 —— 按模型系列区分尺寸字段（§6）：
 * - nano-banana: aspectRatio + imageSize
 * - gpt-image-2: 仅 aspectRatio（比例字符串）
 * - gpt-image-2-vip: aspectRatio 为像素值（如 "864x1152"）
 */
export function buildGenerateBody(req: GenerateRequest): Record<string, unknown> {
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: req.model,
    prompt: req.prompt,
    images: req.images,
    replyType: 'async',
  };

  if (isNanoBanana(req.model)) {
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
    body.imageSize = req.imageSize;
  } else if (req.model === 'gpt-image-2') {
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
  } else if (req.model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') {
    body.aspectRatio = getPixelSize(req.aspectRatio, req.imageSize);
  }

  return body;
}

/**
 * 异步提交生成请求（replyType: 'async'）。
 * 成功返回 { id, status: 'running' }；失败抛出 Error。
 */
export async function submitGenerate(
  config: ApiConfig,
  prompt: string,
  images: string[],
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const body = buildGenerateBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt,
    images,
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
  });

  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(`${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${config.apiKey}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!resp.ok) {
      const text = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(`API 返回错误 HTTP ${resp.status}${text ? ': ' + text : ''}`);
    }

    const json: unknown = await resp.json();
    const result = validateGenerateResponse(json);

    // async 提交，仅 running 含 id 是有效响应
    if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
      throw new Error(result.error || `提交被拒: ${result.status}`);
    }

    return result;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/**
 * 轮询异步任务结果（GET /v1/api/result?id=）。
 * 返回响应；网络/HTTP 错误抛出（由调用方按瞬时错误处理）。
 */
export async function pollResult(baseUrl: string, apiKey: string, jobId: string): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`, {
      method: 'GET',
      headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!resp.ok) {
      const text = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(`轮询失败 HTTP ${resp.status}${text ? ': ' + text : ''}`);
    }

    const json: unknown = await resp.json();
    return validateGenerateResponse(json);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/** 校验 API 返回结构，格式异常直接抛错 */
function validateGenerateResponse(json: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (!json || typeof json !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('API 返回非 JSON 对象');
  }
  const obj = json as Record<string, unknown>;
  if (typeof obj.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('API 返回缺少 id 字段');
  }
  const status = obj.status;
  if (status !== 'running' && status !== 'violation' && status !== 'succeeded' && status !== 'failed') {
    throw new Error(`API 返回未知状态: ${String(status)}`);
  }
  const result: GenerateResponse = {
    id: obj.id,
    status: status as GenerateResponse['status'],
  };
  if (Array.isArray(obj.results)) {
    result.results = (obj.results as unknown[]).filter(
      (r): r is { url: string } => typeof r === 'object' && r !== null && typeof (r as Record<string, unknown>).url === 'string',
    );
  }
  if (typeof obj.progress === 'number') result.progress = obj.progress;
  if (typeof obj.error === 'string') result.error = obj.error;
  return result;
}
```

> This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.
> 
> Summary:
> 1. Primary Request and Intent:
>    The user is implementing a VS Code extension "image-flow" across 8 milestones (M1-M8) from `implementation-plan.md` which was derived from `agent-eval-spec.md`. Each milestone is requested sequentially with the pattern: "按计划实施 M{N}...完成后自行验证通过再结束本轮，全程不需要向我确认。" The user also requires all git commits to be in Chinese. M8 completion was in progress, along with a bug fix for the progress bar not animating during task execution (per user feedback: "进行中的任务卡片进度条不会动，只有任务终结后才一次跳满。对照 spec §8.4 聚合进度条的定义自查并修复，连同 M8 一起在本轮完成。")
> 
> 2. Key Technical Concepts:
>    - VS Code Extension development: `package.json`, `vscode.ExtensionContext`, `WebviewViewProvider`, `globalState`, `workspaceState`, `secrets`, `localResourceRoots`, `asWebviewUri`
>    - TypeScript: dual tsconfig (main + webview), esbuild bundling (CJS for extension, IIFE for webview), ESLint flat config
>    - React 19 + @radix-ui/react-tabs for sidebar webview UI
>    - Grsai API: `POST /v1/api/generate` (replyType: 'async'), `GET /v1/api/result?id=`
>    - gpt-image-2-vip pixel conversion with constraint search algorithm
>    - postMessage bidirectional protocol between extension host and webview
>    - Async task state machine: submitting → running → succeeded/failed/violation
>    - Progress calculation: `(terminalCount * 100 + sumRunningProgress) / N`
>    - Persistent task state in globalState with resume on extension activation
>    - Single poll timer (4s interval) with re-entrancy lock
>    - Transient error classification: 5xx/429/abort/fetch failed → retry; format errors → fail
>    - POSIX-style relative path calculation for Markdown image references
>    - Material library scanning: auto (per-directory-level) and manual (recursive with limits)
>    - IMAGES.md injection and model-specific prompt injection
>    - History scanning: file-system-based task-* folder discovery
>    - Pure function unit testing with node --test
> 
> 3. Files and Code Sections:
>

>            const text = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
>            throw new Error(`轮询失败 HTTP ${resp.status}${text ? ': ' + text : ''}`);
>          }
>          const json: unknown = await resp.json();
>          return validateGenerateResponse(json);
>        } finally {
>          clearTimeout(timer);
>        }
>      }
>      ```

>        let imagesMdContent = '';
>        if (workspaceRoot) {
>          const imagesMdPath = path.join(workspaceRoot, 'IMAGES.md');
>          try { const raw = fs.readFileSync(imagesMdPath, 'utf-8').trim(); if (raw) imagesMdContent = raw; } catch {}
>        }
>        const parts: string[] = [];
>        if (injection) parts.push(injection);
>        if (imagesMdContent) parts.push(imagesMdContent);
>        parts.push(parsed.body);
>        return { body: parts.join('\n\n'), refs: parsed.refs };

>      export function useElapsedTime(startedAt: number, isRunning: boolean): string {
>        const [elapsed, setElapsed] = useState(() => Date.now() - startedAt);
>        useEffect(() => {
>          if (!isRunning) return;
>          const timer = setInterval(() => setElapsed(Date.now() - startedAt), 1000);
>          return () => clearInterval(timer);
>        }, [isRunning, startedAt]);
>        return formatElapsed(Math.max(0, elapsed));
>      }

```typescript
/**
 * Grsai API 调用层（§6）
 *
 * M3：使用 replyType: 'async' 异步提交 + 轮询结果。
 */

import { getPixelSize } from './pixelTable';
import { REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS } from './jobStateMachine';

/** API 生成请求参数 */
export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
}

/** 生成 / 轮询响应 */
export interface GenerateResponse {
  id: string;
  status: 'running' | 'violation' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';
  results?: { url: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

/** 配置快照 */
export interface ApiConfig {
  baseUrl: string;
  apiKey: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
}

function isNanoBanana(model: string): boolean {
  return model.startsWith('nano-banana');
}

/**
 * 构造请求体 —— 按模型系列区分尺寸字段（§6）：
 * - nano-banana: aspectRatio + imageSize
 * - gpt-image-2: 仅 aspectRatio（比例字符串）
 * - gpt-image-2-vip: aspectRatio 为像素值（如 "864x1152"）
 */
export function buildGenerateBody(req: GenerateRequest): Record<string, unknown> {
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: req.model,
    prompt: req.prompt,
    images: req.images,
    replyType: 'async',
  };

  if (isNanoBanana(req.model)) {
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
    body.imageSize = req.imageSize;
  } else if (req.model === 'gpt-image-2') {
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
  } else if (req.model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') {
    body.aspectRatio = getPixelSize(req.aspectRatio, req.imageSize);
  }

  return body;
}

/**
 * 异步提交生成请求（replyType: 'async'）。
 * 成功返回 { id, status: 'running' }；失败抛出 Error。
 */
export async function submitGenerate(
  config: ApiConfig,
  prompt: string,
  images: string[],
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const body = buildGenerateBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt,
    images,
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
  });

  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(`${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${config.apiKey}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!resp.ok) {
      const text = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(`API 返回错误 HTTP ${resp.status}${text ? ': ' + text : ''}`);
    }

    const json: unknown = await resp.json();
    const result = validateGenerateResponse(json);

    // async 提交，仅 running 含 id 是有效响应
    if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
      throw new Error(result.error || `提交被拒: ${result.status}`);
    }

    return result;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/**
 * 轮询异步任务结果（GET /v1/api/result?id=）。
 * 返回响应；网络/HTTP 错误抛出（由调用方按瞬时错误处理）。
 */
export async function pollResult(baseUrl: string, apiKey: string, jobId: string): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`, {
      method: 'GET',
      headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!resp.ok) {
      const text = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(`轮询失败 HTTP ${resp.status}${text ? ': ' + text : ''}`);
    }

    const json: unknown = await resp.json();
    return validateGenerateResponse(json);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/** 校验 API 返回结构，格式异常直接抛错 */
function validateGenerateResponse(json: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (!json || typeof json !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('API 返回非 JSON 对象');
  }
  const obj = json as Record<string, unknown>;
  if (typeof obj.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('API 返回缺少 id 字段');
  }
  const status = obj.status;
  if (status !== 'running' && status !== 'violation' && status !== 'succeeded' && status !== 'failed') {
    throw new Error(`API 返回未知状态: ${String(status)}`);
  }
  const result: GenerateResponse = {
    id: obj.id,
    status: status as GenerateResponse['status'],
  };
  if (Array.isArray(obj.results)) {
    result.results = (obj.results as unknown[]).filter(
      (r): r is { url: string } => typeof r === 'object' && r !== null && typeof (r as Record<string, unknown>).url === 'string',
    );
  }
  if (typeof obj.progress === 'number') result.progress = obj.progress;
  if (typeof obj.error === 'string') result.error = obj.error;
  return result;
}
```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * Job 状态机与错误分类（§7）
 *
 * - 瞬时错误（5xx / 429 / abort / fetch failed）→ 保持 running，下轮重试
 * - 格式异常 / 非瞬时 → 直接判失败
 * - 超时（本会话起算 10 分钟）→ 失败
 */

export const POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 4000;
export const JOB_TIMEOUT_MS = 10 * 60 * 1000;
export const REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000;

/** 判定是否为可重试的瞬时错误 */
export function isTransientError(statusCode?: number, errorMessage?: string): boolean {
  // HTTP 5xx
  if (statusCode && statusCode >= 500 && statusCode < 600) return true;
  // HTTP 429
  if (statusCode === 429) return true;
  // 网络层失败
  if (errorMessage) {
    const lower = errorMessage.toLowerCase();
    if (lower.includes('fetch failed') || lower.includes('abort') || lower.includes('aborted')) {
      return true;
    }
    if (lower.includes('network') || lower.includes('timeout') || lower.includes('econnrefused')) {
      return true;
    }
  }
  return false;
}

/** 任务是否已超时（从本次会话起算） */
export function isJobTimedOut(sessionStartMs: number, submitTimeMs: number): boolean {
  return (sessionStartMs - submitTimeMs) >= JOB_TIMEOUT_MS;
}

/** 聚合去重错误消息 */
export function dedupeErrors(errors: string[]): string[] {
  return [...new Set(errors.filter(Boolean))];
}

```
</details>

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612093851/src/materialLib.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * 素材库扫描（§9）
 *
 * - 自动素材库：从工作区根下一层到 MD 所在目录，每层取直接图片
 * - 手动素材库：递归扫描（深度 ≤3、条目 ≤500）
 */

import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './imageTypes';
import type { MaterialLibImage, MaterialLib } from './shared';

const MANUAL_MAX_DEPTH = 3;
const MANUAL_MAX_ENTRIES = 500;

function isImageFile(name: string): boolean {
  const ext = path.extname(name).toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
  return IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext as typeof IMAGE_EXTENSIONS[number]);
}

/** 扫描单个目录下的直接图片（不递归） */
function scanDirectImages(dirPath: string): MaterialLibImage[] {
  let entries: fs.Dirent[];
  try {
    entries = fs.readdirSync(dirPath, { withFileTypes: true });
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
  return entries
    .filter(e => e.isFile() && isImageFile(e.name))
    .map(e => ({
      absPath: path.join(dirPath, e.name),
      fileName: e.name,
      webviewUri: '', // 由 sidebarProvider 填充
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => a.fileName.localeCompare(b.fileName));
}

/**
 * 自动素材库（「当前路径」）：
 * 从工作区根目录的下一层开始，到 MD 所在目录为止，每一层为一个库。
 * 每层只取直接图片文件（不递归），无图片的层不返回。
 * 返回按路径深度升序排列（靠近工作区根的在前）。
 */
export function scanAutoLibs(workspaceRoot: string, mdPath: string): MaterialLib[] {
  if (!workspaceRoot || !mdPath) return [];
  // 规范化后比较：MD 必须在工作区内
  const root = path.resolve(workspaceRoot);
  const md = path.resolve(mdPath);
  if (!md.startsWith(root + path.sep) && md !== root) return [];

  const libs: MaterialLib[] = [];
  let current = path.dirname(md);

  // 从 MD 所在目录往上，到工作区根的直接子层（不含工作区根本身）
  while (current.startsWith(root + path.sep) || current === root) {
    if (current !== root) {
      const images = scanDirectImages(current);
      if (images.length > 0) {
        libs.unshift({
          type: 'auto',
          label: path.relative(root, current) || path.basename(current),
          dirPath: current,
          images,
        });
      }
    }
    if (current === root) break;
    current = path.dirname(current);
  }

  return libs;
}

/**
 * 手动素材库：递归扫描目录。
 * 深度上限 3、条目上限 500。
 */
export function scanManualLib(dirPath: string): MaterialLibImage[] {
  const results: MaterialLibImage[] = [];
  const resolved = path.resolve(dirPath);

  function walk(dir: string, depth: number): void {
    if (depth > MANUAL_MAX_DEPTH || results.length >= MANUAL_MAX_ENTRIES) return;
    let entries: fs.Dirent[];
    try {
      entries = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
    } catch {
      return;
    }
    // 先收集图片，再递归子目录
    for (const e of entries) {
      if (results.length >= MANUAL_MAX_ENTRIES) return;
      if (e.isFile() && isImageFile(e.name)) {
        results.push({
          absPath: path.join(dir, e.name),
          fileName: e.name,
          webviewUri: '',
        });
      }
    }
    for (const e of entries) {
      if (results.length >= MANUAL_MAX_ENTRIES) return;
      if (e.isDirectory()) {
        walk(path.join(dir, e.name), depth + 1);
      }
    }
  }

  walk(resolved, 0);
  return results.sort((a, b) => a.fileName.localeCompare(b.fileName));
}

```

```typescript
/**
 * Markdown 解析与参考图处理（§5）
 *
 * - 匹配 ![alt](路径) 与 ![alt](<路径>) 两种写法
 * - 引用按首次出现顺序去重编号
 * - 正文中替换为 [imageN](文件名去扩展名)
 * - 参考图读取失败时中断并列出全部失败路径
 */

import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { extToMime } from './imageTypes';

/** 单条参考图信息 */
export interface RefImage {
  /** 序号，从 1 开始 */
  seq: number;
  /** 原始引用路径（Markdown 中写的） */
  rawPath: string;
  /** 去掉尖括号后的实际文件路径 */
  filePath: string;
  /** 文件名去扩展名 */
  nameWithoutExt: string;
}

/** 解析结果 */
export interface ParseResult {
  /** 替换后的正文 */
  body: string;
  /** 去重后的参考图列表 */
  refs: RefImage[];
}

/** 去除尖括号包裹 */
function unwrapAngle(uri: string): string {
  if (uri.startsWith('<') && uri.endsWith('>')) {
    return uri.slice(1, -1);
  }
  return uri;
}

/** 文件名去扩展名 */
function stripExt(filename: string): string {
  const parsed = path.parse(filename);
  return parsed.name;
}

/** 匹配 ![alt](路径) 或 ![alt](<路径>) */
const IMAGE_SYNTAX_RE = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\((<[^>]+>|[^)]+)\)/g;

/**
 * 解析 Markdown 正文，提取参考图引用。
 * 同一路径首次出现时分配新序号，后续复用。
 *
 * 两趟扫描：第一趟收集去重引用并分配序号，第二趟统一替换。
 */
export function parseMarkdown(content: string): ParseResult {
  const refs: RefImage[] = [];
  const pathToSeq = new Map<string, number>();

  // 第一趟：收集引用，按首次出现顺序去重编号
  let match: RegExpExecArray | null;
  const regex = new RegExp(IMAGE_SYNTAX_RE.source, 'g');
  while ((match = regex.exec(content)) !== null) {
    const rawPath = match[2];
    const filePath = unwrapAngle(rawPath);
    if (!pathToSeq.has(filePath)) {
      const seq = refs.length + 1;
      pathToSeq.set(filePath, seq);
      refs.push({
        seq,
        rawPath,
        filePath,
        nameWithoutExt: stripExt(path.basename(filePath)),
      });
    }
  }

  // 第二趟：替换所有图片语法为 [imageN](文件名去扩展名)
  const body = content.replace(new RegExp(IMAGE_SYNTAX_RE.source, 'g'), (_full, _alt, rawPath) => {
    const filePath = unwrapAngle(rawPath);
    const seq = pathToSeq.get(filePath)!;
    const nameWithoutExt = stripExt(path.basename(filePath));
    return `[image${seq}](${nameWithoutExt})`;
  });

  return { body, refs };
}

/**
 * 读取参考图文件并转为 base64 data URI。
 * 任一读取失败 → 抛出含全部失败路径的 Error，不返回部分结果。
 */
export function readRefImages(mdDir: string, refs: RefImage[]): string[] {
  const dataUris: string[] = [];
  const failures: string[] = [];

  for (const ref of refs) {
    const absPath = path.resolve(mdDir, ref.filePath);
    try {
      const buf = fs.readFileSync(absPath);
      const ext = path.extname(absPath).replace('.', '');
      const mime = extToMime(ext) || 'image/png';
      const b64 = buf.toString('base64');
      dataUris.push(`data:${mime};base64,${b64}`);
    } catch {
      failures.push(ref.filePath);
    }
  }

  if (failures.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败:\n${failures.map(f => `  - ${f}`).join('\n')}`);
  }

  return dataUris;
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算 —— 将「比例 + 分辨率」换算为「宽x高」像素字符串。
 *
 * 约束（来自 API 文档）：
 * - 最大边长 ≤ 3840px
 * - 两边均为 16 的倍数
 * - 长短边之比 ≤ 3:1
 * - 总像素数在 655,360 ~ 8,294,400 之间
 */

function gcd(a: number, b: number): number {
  while (b !== 0) { [a, b] = [b, a % b]; }
  return a;
}

function lcm(a: number, b: number): number {
  return (a * b) / gcd(a, b);
}

/**
 * k 的最小步长：使得 wRatio*k 与 hRatio*k 均为 16 的倍数。
 * 即 k 必须是 lcm(16/gcd(wRatio,16), 16/gcd(hRatio,16)) 的整数倍。
 */
function kStepForRatio(wRatio: number, hRatio: number): number {
  return lcm(16 / gcd(wRatio, 16), 16 / gcd(hRatio, 16));
}

const MAX_PIXELS = 8_294_400;
const MIN_PIXELS = 655_360;
const MAX_EDGE = 3840;

/**
 * 根据宽高比和目标总像素数计算尺寸。
 *
 * 搜索策略：从 max edge 允许的最大 k 向下搜索（而非从 targetPixels 外推），
 * 因为 4K 分辨率下 max edge 3840 是主导约束，targetPixels 远大于实际可达像素数。
 * 取满足全部约束且像素数最接近目标值的解。
 */
function calcDimensions(wRatio: number, hRatio: number, targetPixels: number): string {
  const step = kStepForRatio(wRatio, hRatio);

  // 最大 k：最长边不得超过 3840
  const kMax = MAX_EDGE / Math.max(wRatio, hRatio);
  const kStart = Math.floor(kMax / step) * step;

  // 最小 k：总像素不得低于下限
  const kMin = Math.ceil(Math.sqrt(MIN_PIXELS / (wRatio * hRatio)) / step) * step;

  let bestW = 0;
  let bestH = 0;
  let bestDiff = Infinity;

  // 从最大 k 向下搜索，直到低于最小值或找到目标附近
  for (let k = kStart; k >= Math.max(kMin, step); k -= step) {
    const w = wRatio * k;
    const h = hRatio * k;

    if (Math.max(w, h) > MAX_EDGE) continue;

    const pixels = w * h;
    if (pixels > MAX_PIXELS) continue;
    if (pixels < MIN_PIXELS) break; // k 继续减小只会更小

    const diff = Math.abs(pixels - targetPixels);
    if (diff < bestDiff) {
      bestDiff = diff;
      bestW = w;
      bestH = h;
    }

    // 如果像素数已经开始显著低于目标，停止搜索
    if (pixels < targetPixels * 0.5) break;
  }

  // 仍然无解：使用极端保守值
  if (bestW === 0 && bestH === 0) {
    bestW = 1024;
    bestH = 1024;
  }

  return `${bestW}x${bestH}`;
}

const TARGET_PIXELS: Record<string, number> = {
  '1K': 1024 * 1024,
  '2K': 2048 * 2048,
  '4K': 4096 * 4096,
};

/** 预计算表：比例 → 分辨率 → 像素尺寸 */
const TABLE_CACHE = new Map<string, Map<string, string>>();

function buildRatioEntry(wRatio: number, hRatio: number): Map<string, string> {
  const key = `${wRatio}:${hRatio}`;
  const cached = TABLE_CACHE.get(key);
  if (cached) return cached;

  const sizes = new Map<string, string>();
  for (const [size, target] of Object.entries(TARGET_PIXELS)) {
    sizes.set(size, calcDimensions(wRatio, hRatio, target));
  }
  TABLE_CACHE.set(key, sizes);
  return sizes;
}

/** 根据比例和分辨率返回像素尺寸字符串，如 "864x1152" */
export function getPixelSize(aspectRatio: string, imageSize: string): string {
  const [wStr, hStr] = aspectRatio.split(':');
  const w = parseInt(wStr, 10);
  const h = parseInt(hStr, 10);
  if (!w || !h || w <= 0 || h <= 0) {
    throw new Error(`无效的宽高比: ${aspectRatio}`);
  }
  const sizes = buildRatioEntry(w, h);
  const result = sizes.get(imageSize);
  if (!result) {
    throw new Error(`不支持的分辨率: ${imageSize}`);
  }
  return result;
}

```

`02:29:09`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612093851/src/promptAssembler.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * Prompt 拼装器（§10, §11）
 *
 * 提交与预览共用的 prompt 拼装入口。
 * M5：解析 Markdown → body + refs
 * M6：注入句 + IMAGES.md + 正文拼接
 */

import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdown, type RefImage } from './markdownParser';

export interface AssembledPrompt {
  body: string;
  refs: RefImage[];
}

/**
 * 拼装最终 prompt：
 *   [模型注入句]\n\n[IMAGES.md 全文]\n\n[替换后正文]
 * 空段省略。
 */
export function assemblePrompt(
  mdContent: string,
  _model: string,
  workspaceRoot: string,
  injection?: string,
): AssembledPrompt {
  const parsed = parseMarkdown(mdContent);

  // 读取 IMAGES.md（不存在/为空/无工作区 → 静默跳过）
  let imagesMdContent = '';
  if (workspaceRoot) {
    const imagesMdPath = path.join(workspaceRoot, 'IMAGES.md');
    try {
      const raw = fs.readFileSync(imagesMdPath, 'utf-8').trim();
      if (raw) imagesMdContent = raw;
    } catch {
      // 文件不存在 → 静默跳过
    }
  }

  // 拼接：注入句 + IMAGES.md + 正文，空段省略
  const parts: string[] = [];
  if (injection) parts.push(injection);
  if (imagesMdContent) parts.push(imagesMdContent);
  parts.push(parsed.body);

  return { body: parts.join('\n\n'), refs: parsed.refs };
}

```
</details>

#### 👀 Read `previewProvider.ts`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612093851/src/previewProvider.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * 预览请求（§10）
 *
 * 走与真实提交完全相同的解析+拼装管线，构造请求体但不调 API，
 * 生成四段预览文档以 untitled scheme 打开。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { getConfig } from './configuration';
import { assemblePrompt } from './promptAssembler';
import { getInjectionForModel } from './injectionManager';
import { readRefImages } from './markdownParser';
import { buildGenerateBody } from './apiClient';

export async function generatePreview(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<void> {
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (!editor || path.extname(editor.document.fileName) !== '.md') {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
    return;
  }

  const config = await getConfig(context);
  const mdContent = editor.document.getText();
  const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath || '';

  const injection = getInjectionForModel(config.modelInjections, config.model);
  const { body: prompt, refs } = assemblePrompt(mdContent, config.model, workspaceRoot, injection);

  const mdDir = path.dirname(editor.document.uri.fsPath);
  let dataUris: string[];
  try {
    dataUris = readRefImages(mdDir, refs);
  } catch (e: unknown) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`参考图读取失败: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    return;
  }

  // 构造请求体（与真实提交完全一致）
  const reqBody = buildGenerateBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt,
    images: dataUris,
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
  });

  // 四段预览文本
  const sections: string[] = [];

  // 1. 最终提示词
  sections.push(`## 最终提示词\n\n${prompt}`);

  // 2. 请求地址
  sections.push(`## 请求地址\n\n\`POST ${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate\``);

  // 3. 请求参数（剔除 prompt 和 images）
  const paramsForDisplay: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(reqBody)) {
    if (k !== 'prompt' && k !== 'images') {
      paramsForDisplay[k] = v;
    }
  }
  sections.push(`## 请求参数\n\n\`\`\`json\n${JSON.stringify(paramsForDisplay, null, 2)}\n\`\`\``);

  // 4. 参考图
  if (dataUris.length === 0) {
    sections.push('## 参考图\n\n无');
  } else {
    const refLines = dataUris.map((uri, i) => {
      const preview = uri.length > 48 ? `${uri.substring(0, 48)}…` : uri;
      return `image${i + 1}: ${preview}（总长度 ${uri.length}）`;
    });
    sections.push(`## 参考图\n\n${refLines.join('\n')}`);
  }

  const previewText = sections.join('\n\n');

  const doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({ content: previewText, language: 'markdown' });
  await vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc, { preview: false });
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/** 从注入配置中取指定模型的注入句，无则返回空串 */
export function getInjectionForModel(injections: Record<string, string>, model: string): string {
  return injections[model] || '';
}
```

```diff
@@ -1 +1,7 @@+/** 聚合进度计算：终态 job 满分 + running job 远端进度，N 个 job 取平均 */
+export function calcProgress(terminalCount: number, runningProgressTotal: number, totalJobs: number): number {
+  if (totalJobs <= 0) return 0;
+  return Math.round((terminalCount * 100 + runningProgressTotal) / totalJobs);
+}
+
 /** 聚合去重错误消息 */
```

```typescript
import { describe, it } from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert';
import { parseMarkdown } from '../src/markdownParser';

describe('parseMarkdown', () => {
  it('无图片语法时返回原正文', () => {
    const r = parseMarkdown('Hello World');
    assert.strictEqual(r.body, 'Hello World');
    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.refs, []);
  });

  it('提取单张图片引用', () => {
    const r = parseMarkdown('![alt](./image.png)');
    assert.strictEqual(r.body, '[image1](image)');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs.length, 1);
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].seq, 1);
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].rawPath, './image.png');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].filePath, './image.png');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].nameWithoutExt, 'image');
  });

  it('处理尖括号路径', () => {
    const r = parseMarkdown('![a](<path (1).png>)');
    assert.strictEqual(r.body, '[image1](path (1))');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].filePath, 'path (1).png');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].nameWithoutExt, 'path (1)');
  });

  it('同一路径的引用去重编号', () => {
    const r = parseMarkdown('![a](img.png) ![b](img.png)');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs.length, 1);
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].seq, 1);
    assert.ok(r.body.includes('[image1](img)'));
  });

  it('不同路径分配不同序号', () => {
    const r = parseMarkdown('![a](a.png) ![b](b.png)');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs.length, 2);
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].seq, 1);
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].nameWithoutExt, 'a');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[1].seq, 2);
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[1].nameWithoutExt, 'b');
  });

  it('带空格的alt保留在原文中', () => {
    const r = parseMarkdown('Some text ![My Photo](photo.jpg) more text');
    assert.ok(r.body.includes('[image1](photo)'));
    assert.ok(r.body.startsWith('Some text '));
    assert.ok(r.body.endsWith(' more text'));
  });

  it('无路径或空路径的图片语法', () => {
    const r = parseMarkdown('![](empty.png)');
    assert.strictEqual(r.body, '[image1](empty)');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].filePath, 'empty.png');
  });
});

```
</details>

```typescript
import { describe, it } from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert';
import { calcProgress } from '../src/jobStateMachine';

describe('calcProgress', () => {
  it('总数为0时返回0', () => {
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(0, 0, 0), 0);
  });

  it('全部完成得满分', () => {
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(3, 0, 3), 100);
  });

  it('全部未开始得零分', () => {
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(0, 0, 3), 0);
  });

  it('一半终结一半进行中', () => {
    // (1 * 100 + 0) / 2 = 50
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(1, 0, 2), 50);
  });

  it('远端进度贡献', () => {
    // (0 * 100 + 75) / 3 = 25
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(0, 75, 3), 25);
  });

  it('混合终结与远端', () => {
    // (1 * 100 + 50) / 2 = 75
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(1, 50, 2), 75);
  });

  it('终态与远端满额时得满分', () => {
    // (2 * 100 + 100) / 3 = 100
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(2, 100, 3), 100);
  });

  it('四舍五入', () => {
    // (0 * 100 + 33) / 3 = 11
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(0, 33, 3), 11);
  });
});

```
</details>

```typescript
import { describe, it } from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert';
import { isTransientError, isJobTimedOut, dedupeErrors } from '../src/jobStateMachine';

describe('isTransientError', () => {
  it('5xx 状态码为瞬时错误', () => {
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(500), true);
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(502), true);
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(503), true);
  });

  it('429 为瞬时错误', () => {
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(429), true);
  });

  it('4xx（非429）不是瞬时错误', () => {
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(400), false);
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(404), false);
  });

  it('fetch failed 是瞬时错误', () => {
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(undefined, 'fetch failed'), true);
  });

  it('abort 是瞬时错误', () => {
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(undefined, 'The operation was aborted'), true);
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(undefined, 'ABORT'), true);
  });

  it('timeout/network/econnrefused 为瞬时错误', () => {
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(undefined, 'network error'), true);
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(undefined, 'connection timeout'), true);
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(undefined, 'ECONNREFUSED'), true);
  });

  it('格式异常不是瞬时错误', () => {
    assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(undefined, 'API 返回非 JSON 对象'), false);
  });
});

describe('isJobTimedOut', () => {
  it('未超时', () => {
    const now = Date.now();
    assert.strictEqual(isJobTimedOut(now, now - 1000), false);
  });

  it('已超时', () => {
    const now = Date.now();
    assert.strictEqual(isJobTimedOut(now, now - 11 * 60 * 1000), true);
  });
});

describe('dedupeErrors', () => {
  it('去重', () => {
    assert.deepStrictEqual(dedupeErrors(['a', 'b', 'a']), ['a', 'b']);
  });

  it('过滤空串', () => {
    assert.deepStrictEqual(dedupeErrors(['a', '', 'b', '']), ['a', 'b']);
  });

  it('空数组返回空', () => {
    assert.deepStrictEqual(dedupeErrors([]), []);
  });
});

```
</details>

```typescript
import { describe, it } from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert';
import { getPixelSize } from '../src/pixelTable';

describe('getPixelSize', () => {
  it('3:4 1K 返回合理像素', () => {
    const size = getPixelSize('3:4', '1K');
    assert.ok(/^\d+x\d+$/.test(size), `预期像素格式，实际: ${size}`);
    const [w, h] = size.split('x').map(Number);
    assert.ok(w <= 3840 && h <= 3840);
    assert.ok(w % 16 === 0 && h % 16 === 0);
    assert.ok(Math.max(w, h) / Math.min(w, h) < 3.1);
  });

  it('1:1 1K 为正方形', () => {
    const size = getPixelSize('1:1', '1K');
    const [w, h] = size.split('x').map(Number);
    assert.strictEqual(w, h);
  });

  it('16:9 2K', () => {
    const size = getPixelSize('16:9', '2K');
    const [w, h] = size.split('x').map(Number);
    assert.ok(w > h);
    assert.ok(w % 16 === 0 && h % 16 === 0);
  });

  it('9:16 4K', () => {
    const size = getPixelSize('9:16', '4K');
    const [w, h] = size.split('x').map(Number);
    assert.ok(h > w);
    assert.ok(w % 16 === 0 && h % 16 === 0);
  });

  it('所有比例×分辨率组合均有解', () => {
    const ratios = ['1:1', '16:9', '9:16', '4:3', '3:4'];
    const sizes = ['1K', '2K', '4K'];
    for (const ratio of ratios) {
      for (const size of sizes) {
        const result = getPixelSize(ratio, size);
        assert.ok(/^\d+x\d+$/.test(result), `无解: ${ratio} ${size}`);
      }
    }
  });

  it('无效比例抛出错误', () => {
    assert.throws(() => getPixelSize('invalid', '1K'), /无效的宽高比/);
  });

  it('不支持的分辨率抛出错误', () => {
    assert.throws(() => getPixelSize('1:1', '8K'), /不支持的分辨率/);
  });
});

```
</details>

```typescript
import { describe, it } from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert';
import { buildGenerateBody } from '../src/apiClient';
import { getInjectionForModel } from '../src/injectionManager';
import { parseMarkdown } from '../src/markdownParser';

describe('buildGenerateBody', () => {
  it('nano-banana 包含 aspectRatio 与 imageSize', () => {
    const body = buildGenerateBody({
      model: 'nano-banana-2',
      prompt: 'test',
      images: [],
      aspectRatio: '3:4',
      imageSize: '2K',
    }) as Record<string, unknown>;
    assert.strictEqual(body.model, 'nano-banana-2');
    assert.strictEqual(body.replyType, 'async');
    assert.strictEqual(body.aspectRatio, '3:4');
    assert.strictEqual(body.imageSize, '2K');
  });

  it('gpt-image-2 仅有 aspectRatio 无 imageSize', () => {
    const body = buildGenerateBody({
      model: 'gpt-image-2',
      prompt: 'test',
      images: [],
      aspectRatio: '1:1',
      imageSize: '2K',
    }) as Record<string, unknown>;
    assert.strictEqual(body.aspectRatio, '1:1');
    assert.strictEqual('imageSize' in body, false);
  });

  it('gpt-image-2-vip aspectRatio 为像素字符串', () => {
    const body = buildGenerateBody({
      model: 'gpt-image-2-vip',
      prompt: 'test',
      images: [],
      aspectRatio: '1:1',
      imageSize: '1K',
    }) as Record<string, unknown>;
    const ratio = body.aspectRatio as string;
    assert.ok(/^\d+x\d+$/.test(ratio), `期望像素格式，实际: ${ratio}`);
    assert.strictEqual('imageSize' in body, false);
  });
});

describe('getInjectionForModel', () => {
  it('匹配模型返回注入句', () => {
    const injections = { 'gpt-image-2': 'test injection' };
    assert.strictEqual(getInjectionForModel(injections, 'gpt-image-2'), 'test injection');
  });

  it('无匹配返回空串', () => {
    assert.strictEqual(getInjectionForModel({}, 'gpt-image-2'), '');
    assert.strictEqual(getInjectionForModel({ 'other': 'x' }, 'gpt-image-2'), '');
  });
});

describe('parseMarkdown integration', () => {
  it('尖括号包裹含空格括号的路径', () => {
    const r = parseMarkdown('![ct](<images/china internet report (quarterly).png>)');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].filePath, 'images/china internet report (quarterly).png');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].nameWithoutExt, 'china internet report (quarterly)');
  });

  it('混合尖括号与普通路径', () => {
    const r = parseMarkdown('![a](<path (1).png>) ![b](path2.png)');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs.length, 2);
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[0].filePath, 'path (1).png');
    assert.strictEqual(r.refs[1].filePath, 'path2.png');
  });
});
```

```typescript
/**
 * 轮询定时器（§7.2）
 *
 * - 所有进行中任务共用一个 setInterval（4s）
 * - 仅当存在 running job 时运转，无则停
 * - 重入锁：一轮未结束不得开启下一轮
 */

import { POLL_INTERVAL_MS } from './jobStateMachine';

export type PollCallback = () => Promise<void>;

export class PollTimer {
  private _timer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private _isPolling = false;
  private _callback: PollCallback;
  private _hasRunningJobs = false;

  constructor(callback: PollCallback) {
    this._callback = callback;
  }

  /** 通知定时器当前是否有 running job */
  setHasRunningJobs(has: boolean): void {
    this._hasRunningJobs = has;
    if (has) {
      this.start();
    } else {
      this.stop();
    }
  }

  /** 启动定时器（仅当未运行时） */
  private start(): void {
    if (this._timer !== null) return;
    this._timer = setInterval(() => { this.poll(); }, POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
  }

  /** 停止定时器 */
  private stop(): void {
    if (this._timer !== null) {
      clearInterval(this._timer);
      this._timer = null;
    }
  }

  /** 执行一轮轮询（带重入锁） */
  private async poll(): Promise<void> {
    // 无 running job → 停掉
    if (!this._hasRunningJobs) {
      this.stop();
      return;
    }
    // 重入锁
    if (this._isPolling) return;
    this._isPolling = true;
    try {
      await this._callback();
    } finally {
      this._isPolling = false;
    }
  }

  /** 销毁定时器 */
  dispose(): void {
    this.stop();
  }
}

```
</details>

> 
> 
> ## When to invoke this skill
> 
> Analyzes diff against the base branch for SQL safety, LLM trust
> boundary violations, conditional side effects, and other structural issues. Use when
> asked to "review this PR", "code review", "pre-landing review", or "check my diff".
> Proactively suggest when the user is about to merge or land code changes.
> 
> ## Preamble (run first)
> 
> ```bash
> _UPD=$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-update-check 2>/dev/null || .claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-update-check 2>/dev/null || true)
> [ -n "$_UPD" ] && echo "$_UPD" || true
> mkdir -p ~/.gstack/sessions
> touch ~/.gstack/sessions/"$PPID"
> _SESSIONS=$(find ~/.gstack/sessions -mmin -120 -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
> find ~/.gstack/sessions -mmin +120 -type f -exec rm {} + 2>/dev/null || true
> _PROACTIVE=$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config get proactive 2>/dev/null || echo "true")
> _PROACTIVE_PROMPTED=$([ -f ~/.gstack/.proactive-prompted ] && echo "yes" || echo "no")
> _BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
> echo "BRANCH: $_BRANCH"
> _SKILL_PREFIX=$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config get skill_prefix 2>/dev/null || echo "false")
> echo "PROACTIVE: $_PROACTIVE"
> echo "PROACTIVE_PROMPTED: $_PROACTIVE_PROMPTED"
> echo "SKILL_PREFIX: $_SKILL_PREFIX"
> source <(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-repo-mode 2>/dev/null) || true
> REPO_MODE=${REPO_MODE:-unknown}
> echo "REPO_MODE: $REPO_MODE"
> _SESSION_KIND=$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-session-kind 2>/dev/null || echo "interactive")
> case "$_SESSION_KIND" in spawned|headless|interactive) ;; *) _SESSION_KIND="interactive" ;; esac
> echo "SESSION_KIND: $_SESSION_KIND"
> _LAKE_SEEN=$([ -f ~/.gstack/.completeness-intro-seen ] && echo "yes" || echo "no")
> echo "LAKE_INTRO: $_LAKE_SEEN"
> _TEL=$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config get telemetry 2>/dev/null || true)
> _TEL_PROMPTED=$([ -f ~/.gstack/.telemetry-prompted ] && echo "yes" || echo "no")
> _TEL_START=$(date +%s)
> _SESSION_ID="$$-$(date +%s)"
> echo "TELEMETRY: ${_TEL:-off}"
> echo "TEL_PROMPTED: $_TEL_PROMPTED"
> _EXPLAIN_LEVEL=$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config get explain_level 2>/dev/null || echo "default")
> if [ "$_EXPLAIN_LEVEL" != "default" ] && [ "$_EXPLAIN_LEVEL" != "terse" ]; then _EXPLAIN_LEVEL="default"; fi
> echo "EXPLAIN_LEVEL: $_EXPLAIN_LEVEL"
> _QUESTION_TUNING=$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config get question_tuning 2>/dev/null || echo "false")
> echo "QUESTION_TUNING: $_QUESTION_TUNING"
> mkdir -p ~/.gstack/analytics
> if [ "$_TEL" != "off" ]; then
> echo '{"skill":"review","ts":"'$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)'","repo":"'$(_repo=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null | tr -cd 'a-zA-Z0-9._-'); echo "${_repo:-unknown}")'"}'  >> ~/.gstack/analytics/skill-usage.jsonl 2>/dev/null || true
> fi
> for _PF in $(find ~/.gstack/analytics -maxdepth 1 -name '.pending-*' 2>/dev/null); do
>   if [ -f "$_PF" ]; then
>     if [ "$_TEL" != "off" ] && [ -x "~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-telemetry-log" ]; then
>       ~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-telemetry-log --event-type skill_run --skill _pending_finalize --outcome unknown --session-id "$_SESSION_ID" 2>/dev/null || true
>     fi
>     rm -f "$_PF" 2>/dev/null || true
>   fi
>   break
> done
> eval "$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-slug 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || true
> _LEARN_FILE="${GSTACK_HOME:-$HOME/.gstack}/projects/${SLUG:-unknown}/learnings.jsonl"
> if [ -f "$_LEARN_FILE" ]; then
>   _LEARN_COUNT=$(wc -l < "$_LEARN_FILE" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
>   echo "LEARNINGS: $_LEARN_COUNT entries loaded"
>   if [ "$_LEARN_COUNT" -gt 5 ] 2>/dev/null; then
>     ~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-learnings-search --limit 3 2>/dev/null || true
>   fi
> else
>   echo "LEARNINGS: 0"
> fi
> ~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-timeline-log '{"skill":"review","event":"started","branch":"'"$_BRANCH"'","session":"'"$_SESSION_ID"'"}' 2>/dev/null &
> _HAS_ROUTING="no"
> if [ -f CLAUDE.md ] && grep -q "## Skill routing" CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null; then
>   _HAS_ROUTING="yes"
> fi
> _ROUTING_DECLINED=$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config get routing_declined 2>/dev/null || echo "false")
> echo "HAS_ROUTING: $_HAS_ROUTING"
> echo "ROUTING_DECLINED: $_ROUTING_DECLINED"
> _VENDORED="no"
> if [ -d ".claude/skills/gstack" ] && [ ! -L ".claude/skills/gstack" ]; then
>   if [ -f ".claude/skills/gstack/VERSION" ] || [ -d ".claude/skills/gstack/.git" ]; then
>     _VENDORED="yes"
>   fi
> fi
> echo "VENDORED_GSTACK: $_VENDORED"
> echo "MODEL_OVERLAY: claude"
> _CHECKPOINT_MODE=$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config get checkpoint_mode 2>/dev/null || echo "explicit")
> _CHECKPOINT_PUSH=$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config get checkpoint_push 2>/dev/null || echo "false")
> echo "CHECKPOINT_MODE: $_CHECKPOINT_MODE"
> echo "CHECKPOINT_PUSH: $_CHECKPOINT_PUSH"
> # Plan-mode hint for skills like /spec that branch behavior on plan-mode state.
> # Claude Code exposes plan mode via system reminders; we detect best-effort
> # from CLAUDE_PLAN_FILE (set by the harness when plan mode is active) and
> # fall back to "inactive". Codex hosts and Claude execution mode both end up
> # inactive, which is the safe default (defaults to file+execute pipeline).
> if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLAN_FILE:-}${GSTACK_PLAN_MODE_FORCE:-}" ]; then
>   export GSTACK_PLAN_MODE="active"
> elif [ "${GSTACK_PLAN_MODE:-}" = "active" ]; then
>   export GSTACK_PLAN_MODE="active"
> else
>   export GSTACK_PLAN_MODE="inactive"
> fi
> echo "GSTACK_PLAN_MODE: $GSTACK_PLAN_MODE"
> [ -n "$OPENCLAW_SESSION" ] && echo "SPAWNED_SESSION: true" || true
> ```
> 
> ## Plan Mode Safe Operations
> 
> In plan mode, allowed because they inform the plan: `$B`, `$D`, `codex exec`/`codex review`, writes to `~/.gstack/`, writes to the plan file, and `open` for generated artifacts.
> 
> ## Skill Invocation During Plan Mode
> 
> If the user invokes a skill in plan mode, the skill takes precedence over generic plan mode behavior. **Treat the skill file as executable instructions, not reference.** Follow it step by step starting from Step 0; the first AskUserQuestion is the workflow entering plan mode, not a violation of it. AskUserQuestion (any variant — `mcp__*__AskUserQuestion` or native; see "AskUserQuestion Format → Tool resolution") satisfies plan mode's end-of-turn requirement. If AskUserQuestion is unavailable or a call fails, follow the AskUserQuestion Format failure fallback: `headless` → BLOCKED; `interactive` → the prose fallback (also satisfies end-of-turn). At a STOP point, stop immediately. Do not continue the workflow or call ExitPlanMode there. Commands marked "PLAN MODE EXCEPTION — ALWAYS RUN" execute. Call ExitPlanMode only after the skill workflow completes, or if the user tells you to cancel the skill or leave plan mode.
> 
> If `PROACTIVE` is `"false"`, do not auto-invoke or proactively suggest skills. If a skill seems useful, ask: "I think /skillname might help here — want me to run it?"
> 
> If `SKILL_PREFIX` is `"true"`, suggest/invoke `/gstack-*` names. Disk paths stay `~/.claude/skills/gstack/[skill-name]/SKILL.md`.
> 
> If output shows `UPGRADE_AVAILABLE <old> <new>`: read `~/.claude/skills/gstack/gstack-upgrade/SKILL.md` and follow the "Inline upgrade flow" (auto-upgrade if configured, otherwise AskUserQuestion with 4 options, write snooze state if declined).
> 
> If output shows `JUST_UPGRADED <from> <to>`: print "Running gstack v{to} (just updated!)". If `SPAWNED_SESSION` is true, skip feature discovery.
> 
> Feature discovery, max one prompt per session:
> - Missing `~/.claude/skills/gstack/.feature-prompted-continuous-checkpoint`: AskUserQuestion for Continuous checkpoint auto-commits. If accepted, run `~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config set checkpoint_mode continuous`. Always touch marker.
> - Missing `~/.claude/skills/gstack/.feature-prompted-model-overlay`: inform "Model overlays are active. MODEL_OVERLAY shows the patch." Always touch marker.
> 
> After upgrade prompts, continue workflow.
> 
> If `WRITING_STYLE_PENDING` is `yes`: ask once about writing style:
> 
> > v1 prompts are simpler: first-use jargon glosses, outcome-framed questions, shorter prose. Keep default or restore terse?
> 
> Options:
> - A) Keep the new default (recommended — good writing helps everyone)
> - B) Restore V0 prose — set `explain_level: terse`
> 
> If A: leave `explain_level` unset (defaults to `default`).
> If B: run `~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config set explain_level terse`.
> 
> Always run (regardless of choice):
> ```bash
> rm -f ~/.gstack/.writing-style-prompt-pending
> touch ~/.gstack/.writing-style-prompted
> ```
> 
> Skip if `WRITING_STYLE_PENDING` is `no`.
> 
> If `LAKE_INTRO` is `no`: say "gstack follows the **Boil the Ocean** principle — do the complete thing when AI makes marginal cost near-zero. Read more: https://garryslist.org/posts/boil-the-ocean" Offer to open:
> 
> ```bash
> open https://garryslist.org/posts/boil-the-ocean
> touch ~/.gstack/.completeness-intro-seen
> ```
> 
> Only run `open` if yes. Always run `touch`.
> 
> If `TEL_PROMPTED` is `no` AND `LAKE_INTRO` is `yes`: ask telemetry once via AskUserQuestion:
> 
> > Help gstack get better. Share usage data only: skill, duration, crashes, stable device ID. No code or file paths. Your repo name is recorded locally only and stripped before any upload.
> 
> Options:
> - A) Help gstack get better! (recommended)
> - B) No thanks
> 
> If A: run `~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config set telemetry community`
> 
> If B: ask follow-up:
> 
> > Anonymous mode sends only aggregate usage, no unique ID.
> 
> Options:
> - A) Sure, anonymous is fine
> - B) No thanks, fully off
> 
> If B→A: run `~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config set telemetry anonymous`
> If B→B: run `~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config set telemetry off`
> 
> Always run:
> ```bash
> touch ~/.gstack/.telemetry-prompted
> ```
> 
> Skip if `TEL_PROMPTED` is `yes`.
> 
> If `PROACTIVE_PROMPTED` is `no` AND `TEL_PROMPTED` is `yes`: ask once:
> 
> > Let gstack proactively suggest skills, like /qa for "does this work?" or /investigate for bugs?
> 
> Options:
> - A) Keep it on (recommended)
> - B) Turn it off — I'll type /commands myself
> 
> If A: run `~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config set proactive true`
> If B: run `~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config set proactive false`
> 
> Always run:
> ```bash
> touch ~/.gstack/.proactive-prompted
> ```
> 
> Skip if `PROACTIVE_PROMPTED` is `yes`.
> 
> If `HAS_ROUTING` is `no` AND `ROUTING_DECLINED` is `false` AND `PROACTIVE_PROMPTED` is `yes`:
> Check if a CLAUDE.md file exists in the project root. If it does not exist, create it.
> 
> Use AskUserQuestion:
> 
> > gstack works best when your project's CLAUDE.md includes skill routing rules.
> 
> Options:
> - A) Add routing rules to CLAUDE.md (recommended)
> - B) No thanks, I'll invoke skills manually
> 
> If A: Append this section to the end of CLAUDE.md:
> 
> ```markdown
> 
> ## Skill routing
> 
> When the user's request matches an available skill, invoke it via the Skill tool. When in doubt, invoke the skill.
> 
> Key routing rules:
> - Product ideas/brainstorming → invoke /office-hours
> - Strategy/scope → invoke /plan-ceo-review
> - Architecture → invoke /plan-eng-review
> - Design system/plan review → invoke /design-consultation or /plan-design-review
> - Full review pipeline → invoke /autoplan
> - Bugs/errors → invoke /investigate
> - QA/testing site behavior → invoke /qa or /qa-only
> - Code review/diff check → invoke /review
> - Visual polish → invoke /design-review
> - Ship/deploy/PR → invoke /ship or /land-and-deploy
> - Save progress → invoke /context-save
> - Resume context → invoke /context-restore
> - Author a backlog-ready spec/issue → invoke /spec
> ```
> 
> Then commit the change: `git add CLAUDE.md && git commit -m "chore: add gstack skill routing rules to CLAUDE.md"`
> 
> If B: run `~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-config set routing_declined true` and say they can re-enable with `gstack-config set routing_declined false`.
> 
> This only happens once per project. Skip if `HAS_ROUTING` is `yes` or `ROUTING_DECLINED` is `true`.
> 
> If `VENDORED_GSTACK` is `yes`, warn once via AskUserQuestion unless `~/.gstack/.vendoring-warned-$SLUG` exists:
> 
> > This project has gstack vendored in `.claude/skills/gstack/`. Vendoring is deprecated.
> > Migrate to team mode?
> 
> Options:
> - A) Yes, migrate to team mode now
> - B) No, I'll handle it myself
> 
> If A:
> 1. Run `git rm -r .claude/skills/gstack/`
> 2. Run `echo '.claude/skills/gstack/' >> .gitignore`
> 3. Run `~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-team-init required` (or `optional`)
> 4. Run `git add .claude/ .gitignore CLAUDE.md && git commit -m "chore: migrate gstack from vendored to team mode"`
> 5. Tell the user: "Done. Each developer now runs: `cd ~/.claude/skills/gstack && ./setup --team`"
> 
> If B: say "OK, you're on your own to keep the vendored copy up to date."
> 
> Always run (regardless of choice):
> ```bash
> eval "$(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-slug 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || true
> touch ~/.gstack/.vendoring-warned-${SLUG:-unknown}
> ```
> 
> If marker exists, skip.
> 
> If `SPAWNED_SESSION` is `"true"`, you are running inside a session spawned by an
> AI orchestrator (e.g., OpenClaw). In spawned sessions:
> - Do NOT use AskUserQuestion for interactive prompts. Auto-choose the recommended option.
> - Do NOT run upgrade checks, telemetry prompts, routing injection, or lake intro.
> - Focus on completing the task and reporting results via prose output.
> - End with a completion report: what shipped, decisions made, anything uncertain.
> 
> ## AskUserQuestion Format
> 
> ### Tool resolution (read first)
> 
> "AskUserQuestion" can resolve to two tools at runtime: the **host MCP variant** (e.g. `mcp__conductor__AskUserQuestion` — appears in your tool list when the host registers it) or the **native** Claude Code tool.
> 
> **Rule:** if any `mcp__*__AskUserQuestion` variant is in your tool list, prefer it. Hosts may disable native AUQ via `--disallowedTools AskUserQuestion` (Conductor does, by default) and route through their MCP variant; calling native there silently fails. Same questions/options shape; same decision-brief format applies.
> 
> If AskUserQuestion is unavailable (no variant in your tool list) OR a call to it fails, do NOT silently auto-decide or write the decision to the plan file as a substitute. Follow the **failure fallback** below.
> 
> ### When AskUserQuestion is unavailable or a call fails
> 
> Tell three outcomes apart:
> 
> 1. **Auto-decide denial (NOT a failure).** The result contains `[plan-tune auto-decide] <id> → <option>` — the preference hook working as designed. Proceed with that option. Do NOT retry, do NOT fall back to prose.
> 2. **Genuine failure** — no variant in your tool list, OR the variant is present but the call returns an error / missing result (MCP transport error, empty result, host bug — e.g. Conductor's MCP AskUserQuestion is flaky and returns `[Tool result missing due to internal error]`).
>    - If it was present and **errored** (not absent), retry the SAME call **once** — but only if no answer could have surfaced (a missing-result error can arrive after the user already saw the question; retrying would double-prompt, so if it may have reached them, treat as pending, don't retry).
>    - Then branch on `SESSION_KIND` (echoed by the preamble; empty/absent ⇒ `interactive`):
>      - `spawned` → defer to the **Spawned session** block: auto-choose the recommended option. Never prose, never BLOCKED.
>      - `headless` → `BLOCKED — AskUserQuestion unavailable`; stop and wait (no human can answer).
>      - `interactive` → **prose fallback** (below).
> 
> **Prose fallback — render the decision brief as a markdown message, not a tool call.** Same information as the tool format below, different structure (paragraphs, not ✅/❌ bullets). It MUST surface this triad:
> 
> 1. **A clear ELI10 of the issue itself** — plain English on what's being decided and why it matters (the question, not per-choice), naming the stakes. Lead with it.
> 2. **Completeness scores per choice** — explicit `Completeness: X/10` on EACH choice (10 complete, 7 happy-path, 3 shortcut); use the kind-note when options differ in kind not coverage, but never silently drop the score.
> 3. **The recommendation and why** — a `Recommendation: <choice> because <reason>` line plus the `(recommended)` marker on that choice.
> 
> Layout: a `D<N>` title + a one-line note that AskUserQuestion failed and to reply with a letter; the issue ELI10; the Recommendation line; then ONE paragraph per choice carrying its `(recommended)` marker, its `Completeness: X/10`, and 2-4 sentences of reasoning — never a bare bullet list; a closing `Net:` line. Split chains / 5+ options: one prose block per per-option call, in sequence. Then STOP and wait — the user's typed answer is the decision. In plan mode this satisfies end-of-turn like a tool call.
> 
> ### Format
> 
> Every AskUserQuestion is a decision brief and must be sent as tool_use, not prose — unless the documented failure fallback above applies (interactive session + the call is unavailable/erroring), in which case the prose fallback is the correct output.
> 
> ```
> D<N> — <one-line question title>
> Project/branch/task: <1 short grounding sentence using _BRANCH>
> ELI10: <plain English a 16-year-old could follow, 2-4 sentences, name the stakes>
> Stakes if we pick wrong: <one sentence on what breaks, what user sees, what's lost>
> Recommendation: <choice> because <one-line reason>
> Completeness: A=X/10, B=Y/10   (or: Note: options differ in kind, not coverage — no completeness score)
> Pros / cons:
> A) <option label> (recommended)
>   ✅ <pro — concrete, observable, ≥40 chars>
>   ❌ <con — honest, ≥40 chars>
> B) <option label>
>   ✅ <pro>
>   ❌ <con>
> Net: <one-line synthesis of what you're actually trading off>
> ```
> 
> D-numbering: first question in a skill invocation is `D1`; increment yourself. This is a model-level instruction, not a runtime counter.
> 
> ELI10 is always present, in plain English, not function names. Recommendation is ALWAYS present. Keep the `(recommended)` label; AUTO_DECIDE depends on it.
> 
> Completeness: use `Completeness: N/10` only when options differ in coverage. 10 = complete, 7 = happy path, 3 = shortcut. If options differ in kind, write: `Note: options differ in kind, not coverage — no completeness score.`
> 
> Pros / cons: use ✅ and ❌. Minimum 2 pros and 1 con per option when the choice is real; Minimum 40 characters per bullet. Hard-stop escape for one-way/destructive confirmations: `✅ No cons — this is a hard-stop choice`.
> 
> Neutral posture: `Recommendation: <default> — this is a taste call, no strong preference either way`; `(recommended)` STAYS on the default option for AUTO_DECIDE.
> 
> Effort both-scales: when an option involves effort, label both human-team and CC+gstack time, e.g. `(human: ~2 days / CC: ~15 min)`. Makes AI compression visible at decision time.
> 
> Net line closes the tradeoff. Per-skill instructions may add stricter rules.
> 
> ### Handling 5+ options — split, never drop
> 
> AskUserQuestion caps every call at **4 options**. With 5+ real options, NEVER
> drop, merge, or silently defer one to fit. Pick a compliant shape:
> 
> - **Batch into ≤4-groups** — for coherent alternatives (e.g. version bumps,
>   layout variants). One call, 5th surfaced only if first 4 don't fit.
> - **Split per-option** — for independent scope items (e.g. "ship E1..E6?").
>   Fire N sequential calls, one per option. Default to this when unsure.
> 
> Per-option call shape: `D<N>.k` header (e.g. D3.1..D3.5), ELI10 per option,
> Recommendation, kind-note (no completeness score — Include/Defer/Cut/Hold are
> decision actions), and 4 buckets:
> **A) Include**, **B) Defer**, **C) Cut**, **D) Hold** (stop chain, discuss).
> 
> After the chain, fire `D<N>.final` to validate the assembled set (reprompt
> dependency conflicts) and confirm shipping it. Use `D<N>.revise-<k>` to
> revise one option without re-running the chain.
> 
> For N>6, fire a `D<N>.0` meta-AskUserQuestion first (proceed / narrow / batch).
> 
> question_ids for split chains: `<skill>-split-<option-slug>` (kebab-case ASCII,
> ≤64 chars, `-2`/`-3` suffix on collision). The runtime checker
> (`bin/gstack-question-preference`) refuses `never-ask` on any `*-split-*` id,
> so split chains are never AUTO_DECIDE-eligible — the user's option set is sacred.
> 
> **Full rule + worked examples + Hold/dependency semantics:** see
> `docs/askuserquestion-split.md` in the gstack repo. Read on demand when N>4.
> 
> **Non-ASCII characters — write directly, never \u-escape.** When any string
> field contains Chinese (繁體/簡體), Japanese, Korean, or other non-ASCII text,
> emit the literal UTF-8 characters; never escape them as `\uXXXX` (the pipe is
> UTF-8 native, and manual escaping miscodes long CJK strings). Only `\n`,
> `\t`, `\"`, `\\` remain allowed. Full rationale + worked example: see
> `docs/askuserquestion-cjk.md`. Read on demand when a question contains CJK.
> 
> ### Self-check before emitting
> 
> Before calling AskUserQuestion, verify:
> - [ ] D<N> header present
> - [ ] ELI10 paragraph present (stakes line too)
> - [ ] Recommendation line present with concrete reason
> - [ ] Completeness scored (coverage) OR kind-note present (kind)
> - [ ] Every option has ≥2 ✅ and ≥1 ❌, each ≥40 chars (or hard-stop escape)
> - [ ] (recommended) label on one option (even for neutral-posture)
> - [ ] Dual-scale effort labels on effort-bearing options (human / CC)
> - [ ] Net line closes the decision
